title: Cybersecurity Engineer
description:
We are seeking a skilled and motivated Cybersecurity Engineer to join our team. As a Cybersecurity Engineer, you will play a critical role in protecting our clients’ IT environments by identifying vulnerabilities, implementing security measures, and responding to potential threats.



This is an exciting opportunity to work in a dynamic and collaborative environment, where you’ll help safeguard businesses from cyber risks while growing your expertise in the ever-evolving field of cybersecurity.



Key Responsibilities

* Design, implement, and maintain security solutions to protect IT systems and data.

* Develop and enforce security policies, procedures, and best practices.

* Analyze security alerts, logs, and i
 to identify potential threats.

* Conduct vulnerability assessments to identify and mitigate risks.

* Respond to and investigate security i
, providing detailed reports and recommendations.

* Collaborate with IT teams to ensure systems are configured securely.

* Stay up-to-date with the latest cybersecurity trends, threats, and technologies.

* Provide training and guidance to tea
mbers and clients on cybersecurity best practices.



Technologies You’ll Work With

* Endpoint protection and monitoring tools.

* Firewalls, VPNs, and intrusion detection/prevention systems.

* Cloud security tools for Microsoft 365, Azure, and AWS.

* SIEM platforms.

* Vulnerability scanning tools (e.g., Nessus, Qualys).



What We’re Looking For

* Strong understanding of network security and firewalls.

* Familiarity with vulnerability assessments and i
 response.

* Knowledge of security frameworks and standards (e.g., NIST, ISO 27001, CIS).

* Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.

* Strong communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences.



Preferred but Not Required:

* Certifications such as CISSP, CEH, CompTIA Security+, or CISM.

* Experience with cloud security (Microsoft 365, Azure, AWS).

* Experience in cybersecurity or a related IT field (2+ years preferred).



Why Join Us?

* Be part of a forward-thinking team dedicated to protecting businesses from cyber threats.

* Opportunities for professional growth and paid certifications.

* Competitive salary and performance-based incentives.

* Monthly healthcare allowance.

* 13th-month pay.

* Structured training and onboarding.

* Company-provided work equipment.

* Remote work flexibility.



How to Apply

If you’re interested in this position, please submit your application and include the numbers (2026) in your subject line. This helps us ensure you’ve read the full job description.



**Please also attach your updated CV to your application or provide a link to your CV. Applications without a CV will not be considered.



**Currently looking for candidates in NCR or nearby areas of the Philippines



*** The working hours for this role are 8:00 AM -5:00 PM CST with an hour of Lunch break, Monday to Friday.



We look forward to hearing from you and exploring how you can contribute to our team!

title: AI Automation Partner (Weekly Strategy + Build Role)
description:
We are a fast-growing LinkedIn Ads agency looking to integrate AI and automation into every part of our business.



This is not a standard VA or task-based role.



We are looking for someone who can:

???? Build AI systems

???? Teach us how they work

???? Help us improve every week



???? The Goal



We want to automate 70–90% of our business operations, including:



Lead generation

Workshop bookings

 outreach (without hitting spam filters)

Content creation (LinkedIn posts, video repurposing)

CRM and follow-ups

Internal operations (ClickUp, reporting, etc.)

???? How the Role Works

You will join a weekly live session (every Friday) with the founders

Together, we will:

Review current processes

Identify what can be automated

Build new AI systems live

You will then:

Improve and complete these systems during the week

Suggest new ideas and opportunities



???? This is a long-term partnership role, not just task execution



????? Tools You Should Know



You don’t need to know everything, but you should have experience with:



Automation tools (e.g. Make or Zapier)

AI tools (OpenAI, Claude, etc.)

Basic APIs or connecting tools together

CRM systems (HubSpot, Pipedrive, etc.)

???? IMPORTANT:
 Knowledge Required



A key part of this role is helping us build
 outreach systems that avoid spam filters.



You should understand:



 deliverability

Domain warming

Sending limits

Personalisation at scale



If you do NOT have experience with this, please do not apply.



???? Bonus Skills (Not Required but Valuable)

AI voice / calling tools

Chatbot building

LinkedIn automation (safe methods only)

ClickUp or project management automation

???? What We Care About Most



We are NOT looking for the most technical person.



We are looking for someone who can:



Explain things simply

Think creatively

Suggest improvements

Help us learn AI and automation



???? If you cannot teach what you build, this role is not for you



???? Salary

Part-time role (3-5 hours per week initially)

$6–$12 per hour depending on experience

Opportunity to increase hours and pay over time

???? How to Apply (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, please include:

title: Technical Problem Solver – Web, Conversion Tracking & Systems (Wix, GA, GTM, Hubspot, others)
description:
Overview:



We are not looking for a manager. We are looking for someone who can figure things out, build systems from scratch, and fix anything that breaks.



This is a part-time, hourly role for a highly resourceful Technical Problem Solver who steps in whenever technical challenges arise across our marketing stack, websites, and business systems. You will not manage systems day-to-day—you will solve problems, implement solutions, and make things work.



The first project will be migrating our entire website into Wix and setting up all Google integrations and conversion tracking. We expect this to take up to a month to complete. After that, you will work on ongoing projects, including building additional websites, troubleshooting issues, and resolving other technical challenges across our systems.



You should be someone who:

*Can understand a problem and turn it into a working solution

*Knows how to research, test, and troubleshoot across multiple platforms

*Is comfortable using tools you haven’t used before

*Takes full ownership of problems until they are solved

*You don’t need to know everything—but you must be able to learn quickly and adapt. 

*If you enjoy solving complex problems and building functional systems from start to finish, this role is for you.





Key Responsibilities:



A. Marketing & Tracking Systems (Build + Troubleshoot)

*Set up and implement tracking systems (Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Google Ads, Search Console, YouTube, social media pixels)

*Configure accurate conversion tracking across platforms

*Troubleshoot and fix tracking issues, data discrepancies, or broken integrations

*Implement new tracking or measurement solutions as needed

 

NOTE: This is not a campaign management role. You build and fix, you don’t monitor daily performance



B. Website Development & Systems (Build + Troubleshoot)

*Build websites and landing pages using Wix and other common website builders

*Work with Wix CMS to create dynamic, database-driven pages

*Implement site functionality (forms, tracking, integrations, etc.)

*Troubleshoot and fix issues across front-end, CMS, and integrations

 

NOTE: This is not an ongoing maintenance role. You build it right and fix it when needed



C. Business Systems & Integrations (Build + Troubleshoot)

*Set up and connect business systems (Hubspot, CTM/Dialpad, store locators, other tools)

*Ensure systems communicate properly and data flows correctly

*Troubleshoot and resolve system issues, broken automations, or integration failures

 

NOTE: This is not an operations role. You set up integrations and fix problems, not manage day-to-day usage



Qualifications:



A. Technical Skills

*Experience with marketing and analytics tools (GA, GTM, Ads, Search Console, social pixels)

*Hands-on experience with conversion tracking and pixel implementation

*Proficiency in website builders, especially Wix, including CMS/database-driven pages

*Familiarity with CRMs, business operations tools, and system integrations



B. Soft Skills

*Independent problem-solver with strong critical thinking

*Highly adaptable and able to learn new systems quickly

*Strong communication skills with proactive “over-communication”

*Detail-oriented with a systems-thinking mindset



C. Company Core Values

Radical Candor

Extreme Ownership

Anticipation

Lean

Drive

Overcommunication

Growth Mindset 



Compensation:

Part-time, hourly role

$8–$12 USD per hour, depending on experience and skill level
salary: $8–$12 per hour based on skill level ...

title: Virtual Assistant - Permanent Role
description:
*First - Why Join Mi PA?**

At Mi PA, our Virtual Assistants are a core part of our company, not just external support. Most of our VAs have been with us for years, and we invest in long-term relationships because we know that when you grow, we grow!

• The same holidays and length-of-service benefits as our UK team.

• Annual pay reviews as a minimum - your hard work will always be recognised.

• Opportunities for career development within a growing company.

• A dynamic, fast-paced role working with a variety of global clients.

• A friendly, supportive team that values and respects its Virtual Assistants.



**About Mi PA**

Mi PA is a leading UK-based virtual personal assistant and call answering service. Our PA team ensures our clients receive world-class customer support. We’re looking for a Virtual Assistant to join our dynamic team.



**What You’ll Be Doing**

This is an execution-based role. You’ll receive requests from our friendly EAs, who, along with videos and text processes to help, will be on hand for 1-2-1 support. Some of the tasks you’ll be responsible for could include:

• Customer Support
s

• Ordering Gifts and supplies

• Managing an Inbox

• Research tasks

• Customer service tasks

• Operational admin Tasks



This is a fast-paced role. If you are organised, detail-oriented, and love the process of getting things done, you’ll thrive here.



**Tools You May Use**

• Pipedrive

• Gmail

• Office 365 & Teams

• Asana

• Harvest

• ChatGPT or similar AI tools, but be able to work without them too.



**What We’re Looking For**

• Excellent written English

• Detail-oriented – you double-check your work, especially if its sensitive information

• Able to manage your own workload and deadlines

• Can follow established processes and help meet weekly team goals

• Available during UK working hours, ideally up to 3.30pm UK time.

• Reliable, high-speed internet is a must!



**Your First Test Starts Now – Here’s How to Apply**

Please apply with the following 3 things:

1. A link to a piece of work you’re proud of

2. A Loom video (2 minutes max) explaining what makes you a great VA

3. Answer this: “What’s the most tedious admin task you've had to do, and how did you make it easier or faster?”



So, tell us why you’d make a truly exceptional VA, and let’s see if we’re a great fit :)

USA Est hours

Ownership mentality

Consistency

 I’m looking for the right person.

Opportunity

---



Final note



This is a part-time role, but we are looking for someone who treats their hours seriously and delivers results.

dia buying and client strategy, to agency internal operations.

title: Script Writer for Meta Ads
description:
About Us

We're a fast-growing Scandinavian e-commerce brand scaling aggressively with Meta ads. We have winning creatives already running — now we need someone who can help us build the next batch.

We don't need someone who writes pretty copy. We need someone who understands why people buy and can translate that into scripts that stop the scroll and convert.



What You'll Be Doing



Writing scripts for short-form video ads (30–60 sec) based on our creative briefs

Crafting hooks, body copy, and CTAs tailored to specific customer avatars

Working across multiple angles per batch — problem aware, solution aware, emotional

Scripts are written in English — our team handles translation and voiceover





You Are Probably a Fit If...



You've written scripts specifically for Meta ads that have generated sales — not just views

You understand concepts like hook rate, problem/solution aware, and direct-response copy

You think about the customer first, not the product

You've read books like $100M Offers, Breakthrough Advertising, or similar

You can write conversationally — short sentences, no fluff, reads like a human wrote it





You Are NOT a Fit If...



Your portfolio is only organic social content or brand awareness copy

You write formal, polished English that sounds like a press release

You've never seen or cared about ad metrics like hook rate, CTR, or ROAS





How to Apply

No generic applications. We will ignore them.

Send us:



2–3 Meta ad scripts you've written that generated real results — what was the product, what was the angle, what happened?

Write a hook (one sentence, text-on-screen format) for this product: a wrist blood pressure monitor sold to adults aged 35–55 who are worried about an aging parent

Answer this: What's the difference between a problem aware and solution aware customer — and how does that change how you write the ad?



Question 3 is the filter. If you can't answer it, this role isn't for you.

title: GoHighLevel / Wordpress Specialist — Funnels, Automations & CRM
description:
I'm looking for an expert GoHighLevel specialist for a full infrastructure build. This is for a course-based equity jurisprudence education brand with active students and live revenue. The system needs to be built right the first time — no template drops, no guesswork.



Here's what I need built:



CRM & PIPELINES

- Full contact migration (~400 alumni) into GHL

- Pipeline architecture: Prospect ? Warm Lead ? Enrolled ? Active Student ? Alumni ? Referral Partner

- Tag and segment by course type, payment plan, covenant status, and engagement

- Private coaching pipeline tracking documents, deadlines, and session history

- Referral partner tracking with credit balance fields



/SMS AUTOMATIONS

- Pre-enrollment nurture sequence 
 + SMS)

- Post-enrollment onboarding sequence

- Zoom class reminders: 24hr / 6hr / 1hr / live-now 
 + SMS)

- Re-engagement campaigns for cold leads

- Abandoned cart / incomplete checkout recovery

- Post-course upsell sequence

- Covenant follow-up sequence (days 2, 5, 10 if unsigned)



SALES FUNNELS & LANDING PAGES

- Multi-step quiz funnel with lead scoring and conditional routing (high-fit ? calendar, low-fit ? nurture)

- Course enrollment funnel: opt-in ? VSL/webinar ? checkout ? confirmation ? upsell/downsell

- Lead magnet opt-in pages

- Webinar reminder sequences



PAYMENT INTEGRATION

- Stripe integration (existing)

- Easy Pay Direct integration (primary card processor — being onboarded)

- 3-payment plan access gating (release content per payment milestone)

- Payment upgrade path (3PP ? full one-time ? immediate full access trigger)



WEBSITE (Phase 4)

- Full WordPress site build

- SEO-optimized (Yoast)

- Hosted on Iceland-based VPS (OrangeWebsite)

- GHL forms embedded throughout

- VDO Cipher iframe integration for video content



Before we move forward, I need to know:



1. How many GHL builds have you completed? Please share 2–3 live links — not Google Drive screenshots, actual URLs I can click and evaluate.

2. Have you built course enrollment funnels with payment-gated content access? Describe specifically how you handled it.

3. Have you built multi-step quiz funnels with conditional routing in GHL? Walk me through how you approach the logic.

4. Are you comfortable with Stripe AND Easy Pay Direct integration inside GHL?

5. Have you worked with WordPress + Elementor alongside a GHL build? (Both are required for this project.)

6. What is your turnaround time for a full funnel + automation build at this scope?

7. Do you offer revisions and post-launch support?

8. What is your rate? Build fee + monthly retainer if applicable.



Budget: $1,750 for the initial build. Ongoing retainer available at $750/month for the right person.



This is a real business with active students. I need someone with proven experience, clean automation logic, and the ability to manage a complex multi-phase build without hand-holding.



If this is in your wheelhouse, send your answers, live portfolio links, and include the word "covenant" somewhere in your response so I know you read this carefully.



Thanks.

title: Reservoir Geologist
description:
Our company, Black Belt Operating, LLC. is a Texas-based, privately-owned firm in The Woodlands, focusing on modernizing and improving historic oil and gas projects through exploration and redevelopment.



Join Black Belt Operating LLC, a leading player in the energy sector, as we expand our team! We're seeking highly experienced Filipino Reservoir Geologists to contribute their expertise to our dynamic projects.



Key qualifications include:



Stratigraphy: Reservoir Geologists study the sequence and layering of rocks to determine the geological history of an area. This helps in understanding the deposition of sediments and the formation of potential reservoirs.



Subsurface Mapping: Proficient in constructing detailed subsurface structure maps with a focus on data quality verification from well logs, demonstrating precision and accuracy.



Software Proficiency: Adaptable to new software platforms, ensuring seamless utilization for optimal results in project outcomes.



Reservoir Analysis: Expertise in calculating Original Oil in Place (OOIP) and Original Gas in Place (OGIP) for reservoirs, showcasing a deep understanding of reservoir dynamics.



Production Records: Skilled in utilizing production records to calculate Remaining Oil in Place (OIP) and Remaining Gas in Place (GIP), contributing to efficient reservoir management.



Risk Assessment: Assess the risks associated with exploration and production activities. They evaluate factors such as reservoir quality, connectivity, and potential for fluid movement to estimate the likelihood of successful hydrocarbon recovery.



Collaboration with Other Disciplines: Work closely with other professionals, including geophysicists, petrophysicists, and engineers. Collaborative efforts help in integrating various data sets and disciplines to gain a comprehensive understanding of the subsurface.



Reservoir Management: After the discovery of a reservoir, geologists contribute to its ongoing management. They monitor reservoir performance, suggest strategies for enhanced oil recovery (EOR), and provide input for field development plans.



If you are a proactive and seasoned Reservoir Geologist looking to make a significant impact, apply now and become a vital part of our innovative team at Black Belt Operating LLC!

title: Financial Modeler
description:
Our company, Black Belt Operating, LLC. is a Texas-based, privately-owned firm in The Woodlands, focusing on modernizing and improving historic oil and gas projects through exploration and redevelopment.



We are currently looking for PH-based, high-skilled financial modelers experts in the Upstream Oil and Gas Business.



In the Oil and Gas industry, a financial modeler plays a crucial role in developing and maintaining financial models that help analyze and make informed decisions about various aspects of the business. Here are some key responsibilities and tasks that a financial modeler in the oil and gas sector might undertake:



1. Project Valuation: Financial modelers are often involved in estimating the economic viability of oil and gas projects. They use financial models to assess the potential returns, risks, and overall value of exploration, drilling, and production projects.



2. Cash Flow Analysis: Financial modelers create cash flow models to project the cash inflows and outflows associated with exploration, development, and production activities. This involves considering factors such as production volumes, commodity prices, operating costs, and capital expenditures.



3. Risk Analysis: Oil and gas projects are subject to various risks, including commodity price fluctuations, geopolitical events, and operational challenges. Financial modelers incorporate risk factors into their models to assess the impact on financial outcomes and evaluate the project's resilience to different scenarios.



4. Scenario Analysis: Financial modelers conduct scenario analyses to evaluate the sensitivity of financial outcomes to changes in key variables, such as oil and gas prices, production volumes, and operating costs. This helps decision-makers understand the range of potential outcomes under different conditions.



5. Budgeting and Forecasting: Financial modelers contribute to the budgeting and forecasting process by developing models that project financial performance over a specific period. This includes creating detailed revenue projections, cost estimates, and overall financial statements.



6. Capital Budgeting: Financial modelers assist in the evaluation and prioritization of capital investments. They analyze the financial feasibility of various investment opportunities, considering factors like net present value (NPV), internal rate of return (IRR), and payback period.



7. Financial Reporting: Financial modelers contribute to the preparation of financial reports for internal and external stakeholders. This involves summarizing key financial metrics, explaining variances, and presenting the financial implications of different decisions.



8. Mergers and Acquisitions (M&A): In the context of M&A activities, financial modelers assess the financial impact of potential acquisitions or divestitures. They analyze the financial health of target companies and project the combined financials after a merger or acquisition.



Join our dynamic team, bringing expertise to contribute to cutting-edge projects, and harnessing your in-depth knowledge. Elevate your career with a company committed to innovation and growth. Apply now at Black Belt Operating, LLC. to be part of our success in the dynamic energy sector!

title: Sales Consumer Advisor
description:
Company Overview

We are a US-based, remote-first consumer services business that helps clients resolve and exit unwanted long-term contracts. Our marketing engine is performing well, and we are expanding the sales team to increase close volume while maintaining a high-trust, consultative customer experience.



Role Summary

We are hiring two full-time Remote Sales Consumer Advisors to support a growing inbound lead flow. This is a closing role, not a cold-calling role. You will speak with primarily older, US-based prospects, educate them on the service, answer questions, guide them through the agreement live, collect required information, and then hand the client off to fulfillment.

This is a strong fit for someone who is confident on the phone, organized in a CRM, and comfortable handling sensitive conversations with clarity and empathy.



Work Hours

Full-time, 40 hours per week

US CST hours by default

Monthly performance bonus: tiered structure based on results

Bonus is tied to cash received, not just closed deals



Key Responsibilities

1) Phone Sales and Closing

Handle inbound and assigned leads, run consultative sales conversations

Build trust quickly with an older US demographic

Clearly explain the service, process, expectations, and next steps

Confidently ask for the sale, overcome objections, and close deals

Close within a typical cycle of same day to 14 days, including follow-ups as needed



2) Contract Review and Client Commitment

Walk clients through the agreement in real time on the call

Ensure clients understand what they are signing up for

Collect required details accurately to avoid downstream fulfillment issues





3) CRM and Lead Management (GoHighLevel)

Log all activity in the CRM with clean notes and accurate statuses

Follow the team’s lead management process to avoid missed follow-ups

Upload new clients into the CRM upon close, then hand off to fulfillment





4) Follow-up Discipline

Execute structured follow-up sequences to recover leads and close within the window

Stay responsive and organized across callbacks, scheduled follow-ups, and inbound replies





5) Performance and Continuous Improvement

Participate in daily quick check-ins during ramp (approx. 20 minutes)

Review performance metrics, identify breakdowns, and apply coaching fast

Contribute feedback to improve scripts, training docs, and call flow





Success Metrics

Contact rate and speed to first response

Show rate for scheduled calls

Close rate and close cycle length (0 to 14 days typical)

Revenue collected (used for bonus calculations)

CRM hygiene, no missed leads, accurate notes, consistent follow-ups

Call quality, clarity, trust-building, compliance with process



Required Skills and Experience

2+ years in phone-based sales, inside sales, or high-ticket closing preferred

Strong closing instincts, objection handling, and consultative communication

High comfort speaking with older US prospects

Strong CRM habits, preferably GoHighLevel (or similar CRMs)

Reliable internet, quiet workspace, professional headset setup

Coachable, consistent, and able to ramp quickly with daily feedback



Accent and Language Preferences

Strong preference for a neutral, easy-to-understand English accent



Please submit a mock/sales call recording.

Kano Kimonos is a fast-growing European brand in the Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu industry. We are known for premium quality products, strong design, and a fast-expanding presence across Europe.

This is not just a setup job — we are looking for someone who can think, solve problems, and improve the store over time.



Main Responsibilities

Full migration from WooCommerce to Shopify

Ensure data integrity (products, customers, orders, URLs)

Set up and customize Shopify theme

Configure all apps and integrations

Implement B2B and B2C logic

Manage and optimize website performance and speed

Ongoing website maintenance and updates

Shopify (themes, apps, backend)

WooCommerce ? Shopify migrations

Liquid (Shopify templating language)

B2B pricing system

Discounts based on customer roles

Must work without Shopify Plus

Use apps or custom solutions

Shipping system

Different shipping costs:

B2B vs B2C

Based on country

Affiliate marketing system

Setup and management (tracking, links, commissions)

SEO preservation

Proper redirects (301)

URL structure handling

Maintain rankings and traffic

Requirements

Strong experience with Shopify development

Experience with complex e-commerce setups

Ability to suggest best tools and solutions (apps, workflows)

Good written English communication

Detail-oriented and reliable

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

Nice to Have (Bonus)

Experience with European e-commerce

Experience with B2B e-commerce systems

Familiarity with performance optimization (Core Web Vitals)

What We Offer

Long-term position after initial project

Opportunity to take ownership of the full website

Flexible working setup

Important

Send examples of Shopify stores you have worked on

Explain briefly your experience with WooCommerce ? Shopify migration

title: Full-Time 3D Hard Surface Artist — Sci-Fi & Military Vehicles (Game-Ready Assets)
description:
We are building a 3D asset business selling game-ready vehicle packs on platforms like Fab (Epic Games), CGTrader, and TurboSquid. We are looking for a skilled hard surface 3D artist to join full-time and produce sci-fi and military vehicles, props, and modular environment pieces.



You will receive detailed reference images and a production schedule for each asset pack. Your job is to model, UV unwrap, texture, rig (where needed), render, and export each model to strict quality standards. Every asset must be game-ready, PBR-compatible, and delivered in multiple file formats.

This is a long-term position. If you produce quality work on time, there is room for pay increases as revenue grows.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING

• Modeling hard surface vehicles, weapons, props, and environment kits from provided reference images

• Creating clean, optimized topology suitable for real-time game engines (UE5, Unity)

• UV unwrapping with efficient, non-overlapping layouts and consistent texel density

• Texturing with PBR Metallic-Roughness workflow in Substance Painter, Quixel Mixer, or equivalent

• Creating 3 LOD levels per model (LOD0 full detail, LOD1 50% reduction, LOD2 25%)

• Exporting to multiple formats: FBX, OBJ, BLEND (mandatory); MAX, Maya (if available)

• Producing all required renders: hero shots, multi-angle, wireframe overlays, UV layout screenshots, textured vs. untextured comparisons

• Creating 15-second turntable videos (MP4, 1080p) for each model

• Basic rigging and animation where specified (turret rotation, wheel spin, walk cycles, hatch open/close)

• Maintaining consistent design language, naming conventions, and folder structures across all packs



REQUIRED SKILLS

• 3+ years experience in hard surface 3D modeling (vehicles, weapons, mechanical objects)

• Strong topology skills — clean quads/tris, proper edge flow, no n-gons, manifold meshes

• PBR texturing experience — Substance Painter or Quixel Mixer (Metallic-Roughness workflow)

• UV unwrapping — manual layout, efficient use of 0-1 UV space, consistent texel density

• LOD creation — ability to produce optimized lower-detail versions that maintain silhouette quality

• Blender proficiency (primary tool) — modeling, UV, rendering (Cycles/EEVEE), export

• FBX/OBJ export experience — understanding of scale, transforms, and engine compatibility

• Rendering skills — studio lighting, clean presentation renders, turntable animations

• Basic rigging — simple mechanical rigs (rotating turrets, opening hatches, spinning wheels)



PREFERRED (NOT REQUIRED)

• Experience with Unreal Engine 5 (material setup, demo scenes)

• Experience with Unity HDRP

• Familiarity with 3ds Max or Maya

• Experience selling on Fab, CGTrader, TurboSquid, or similar marketplaces

• Concept art or design skills (ability to interpret loose references into detailed models)



SOFTWARE

• Required: Blender, Substance Painter (or Quixel Mixer)

• Preferred: 3ds Max, Maya, Marmoset Toolbag, ZBrush (for detail sculpting)

What We Provide

• Detailed reference images for every model

• A clear production schedule with weekly/monthly milestones

• Technical specifications document with exact quality standards

•  Creative direction and feedback on each deliverable

• Long-term, stable work with growth potential



TO APPLY

Please include in your application:

 1. Your portfolio — show hard surface work (vehicles, weapons, mechanical models). If you have marketplace listings, link them.

 2. Software you use — list your primary tools

 3. Your experience level — years of hard surface modeling, any marketplace/game studio experience

 4. Availability — can you start within 1-2 weeks? Can you commit full-time (40 hrs/week)?

 5. A short message about why you’re a good fit for this role

Do NOT apply if you primarily do character/organic modeling. This role is 100% hard surface.

title: Executive Assistant to CEO
description:

As the Executive Assistant to the CEO, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the smooth and efficient functioning of the executive office. Your primary responsibility will be to provide comprehensive administrative support to the CEO, managing their schedule, and coordinating various tasks to enhance productivity. Your ability to maintain confidentiality, exercise sound judgment, and proactively handle administrative duties will contribute to the overall effectiveness of the CEO's office.

Power Plus Systems LLC has been a dominant force in the residential electrical contracting industry for two decades, and we continue to lead the way. Our vision is to successfully wire 28,000 homes to completion by the year 2029, ensuring safe and efficient electrical solutions, thereby making a positive impact on the lives of our customers and communities. At Power Plus Systems, LLC, a position with us isn't just a job; it's an opportunity to grow and develop within a company that genuinely appreciates your contributions and dedication to our shared mission.

• Proactive problem solver and resourceful thinker.

• High-speed internet connection to support video calls, cloud-based collaboration, and remote work.

Benefits:

• Ongoing training and professional development opportunities.

• Opportunity for advancement within the company.

mbers and offers excellent benefits, please submit your application through the link below.




/internationalcareers

title: E-Commerce Video Editor (AI B-ROLL AND CHARACTERS)
description:
Quick Summary

Daily Output: 3–4 concepts (30–90 seconds each)



Focus: Ultra-realistic AI product b-roll & talking characters



Location: Remote



About the Role

We are looking for a High-Volume AI Video Editor who can operate at the intersection of creative storytelling and cutting-edge technology. This is not a traditional "trimming" role; you will be responsible for prompting and generating entire scenes from scratch. You must be able to produce 3 to 4 finished video concepts per day that look like they were shot in a million-dollar studio.



Key Responsibilities

Rapid Concepting: Produce 3–4 unique video concepts daily, ranging from 30 to 90 seconds.



AI Product Cinematography: Generate ultra-realistic b-roll of product packaging with perfect lighting, textures, and fluid camera movements.



AI Character Creation: Build and animate hyper-realistic talking characters with seamless lip-syncing and emotive performance.



End-to-End Editing: Handle all prompting, upscaling, color grading, sound design, and final assembly.



Required Technical Stack

You must be an expert in the following tools to hit our daily output goals:



Video Generation: Runway Gen-3/Gen-4, Luma Dream Machine, or Kling.



Character/Voice: HeyGen (Avatar/Lip-sync), ElevenLabs (Voice), and D-ID.



Image/Product Gen: Midjourney (v6+) and Leonardo.ai (for consistent product styles).



Editing/Post-Production: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Desktop.



AI Enhancement: Topaz Video AI (for upscaling and cleaning AI artifacts).



Requirements

Speed: Ability to turn a concept into a polished video in under 2 hours.



Eye for Realism: You know how to spot and fix "AI-jank" (glitches, weird limbs, or unnatural lighting).



Proactive: You stay up-to-date with the weekly changes in the AI video landscape.



How to Apply

Provide a link to your portfolio or a folder of your best AI-generated video work (specifically product b-roll and talking characters).



List the AI tools you are currently paying for or use most frequently.



Application Requirement: To prove you have high attention to detail, please start your cover letter or subject line with the secret word: NEURAL.



LEVEL OF AI EDITING AND B-ROLL CREATION NEEDED :

title: Digital Sales & Growth Executive (VA)
description:
About Maverrik 



Maverrik is a B2B training, coaching, and consulting company focused on social selling, LinkedIn strategy, and digital growth. We train small, medium and enterprise businesses to increase their pipeline. 



The Mission



We are looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Digital Sales & Growth Executive VA to become the "engine room" of our sales process. You won’t just be doing data entry; you will be managing the lifecycle of our prospects from the 
nt they join a webinar/ event to the 
nt they receive a formal proposal.



You will also support nurturing these prospects until they become clients. 



Your goal is to ensure no lead falls through the cracks, and the Business Development Director / Trainer stays focused on high-level strategy while you handle the coordination and sales support



Key Responsibilities



1. Event & Webinar Ecosystem



- Lead Management: Bridge the gap between webinar platforms and our CRM (Zoho).

- The Follow-Up Machine: Execute a multi-touch follow-up process via LinkedIn and
 (Pre and Post-event).4

- Prospect Qualification: Analyse attendee lists to their personas, size of deals and which ones to prioritise for follow-ups.



2. Sales Asset & CRM Coordination



- Proposal Drafting: Reviewing sales call recordings to extract "bones" (pain points, pricing, specific needs) and populating our formal proposal templates.

- Zoho CRM Hygiene: Maintaining a "Zero-Gaps" policy. Every lead must have a documented "Next Step" and a due date.



3. LinkedIn Management & Prospecting



- Inbox Triage: Managing the Business Development Director’s LinkedIn inbox, tagging hot leads, clearing spam, and responding to FAQs in the Director's voice.

- Social Selling: Engaging with key prospects by commenting on their posts to maintain "top-of-mind" awareness.

Outbound Sourcing: Building targeted prospect lists based on webinar engagement and beginning the process



4. Content & Logistics



-Content Implementation: Taking raw video/images provided by the Business Development Director to schedule weekly thought-leadership posts.

- Logistics: Managing calendar invites, "pre-work"
s, and reminders to ensure a as close to 100% turn-up rate for sales calls.



Required Skills & Experience



- CRM Mastery: Experience with [Zoho] is essential.

- LinkedIn Savvy: Deep understanding of LinkedIn etiquette and Sales Navigator.

- Copywriting: Ability to adapt to a specific "voice" and draft professional, non-templated, natural -feeling messages.

- High Attention to Detail: To ensure proposal drafts  and follow-up drafts are relevant to the specific prospect, as we have an abundance of leads

- Sales Expertise: Sales Literacy: You must understand the sales funnel. You know the difference between a "Cold Lead," a "Warm Prospect," and an "MQL" (Marketing Qualified Lead).

- Contextual Drafting: You can listen to a sales call recording and identify the "Gap" where the client is now vs. where they want to be, and reflect that accurately in a written proposal.



Technical Requirements

- Stable, high-speed internet connection (with backup).

- Noise-cancelling headset for occasional sync meetings.

- Experience using Loom, LinkedIn, Sales Navigator, AI and Zoho



Why Join Us?



Salary: [Insert Amount P/ hour

Hours: 9 AM - 10 PM GMT (find a suitable working pattern and hours in the interview

Growth: We believe in training. You will learn the inner workings of a high-growth sales training consultancy





How to Apply



Please do not use the "Apply Now" button alone. To be considered, please send an
 to 
 with the subject line: "I am your Sales Ops VA - [Your Name]" and include:

A summary of your experience managing a CRM and LinkedIn

A 1-minute Loom video introducing yourself.

A summary of your sales experience and driven personality.

title: Senior Product Manager
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)  

Job Type: Full Time  

Experience: 5+ years



### About Us



We are on a mission to simplify the purchasing and management of supplies for real-estate properties. Our platform is transforming how property owners and managers procure essential items—making the process more efficient, transparent, and cost-effective. Join us in building software that meaningfully improves day-to-day property operations.



### Role Description



As a Product Manager, you will own the end-to-end product lifecycle for key areas of our platform. You’ll sit at the intersection of engineering, business, and users—translating real-world operational needs into clear product requirements. This role is ideal for someone who is organized, user-focused, and comfortable working closely with our clients and our engineering team in a remote environment.



### Key Responsibilities



- Define and own product requirements for core platform features related to purchasing, orders, vendors, and property workflows.

    

- Gather and synthesize input from customers, internal stakeholders, and leadership to inform product decisions.

    

- Write clear product requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria.

    

- Manage the product backlog and prioritize work based on impact, effort, and business goals.

    

- Collaborate with engineering teams throughout the development lifecycle to ensure timely and high-quality delivery.

    

- Support product launches by coordinating documentation, internal communication, and rollout plans.

    

- Continuously identify opportunities to improve usability, efficiency, and customer satisfaction.

    



### Qualifications



- 5+ years of experience in product management, preferably in a SaaS or B2B environment.

 

- Strong understanding of user-centered design and product discovery practices.

    

- Proven ability to manage competing priorities and drive projects to completion.

    

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

    

- Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities.

    

- Self-motivated and comfortable working independently as part of a fully remote team.

    



### Nice to Have



- Experience with e-commerce, procurement, or marketplace platforms.

    

-  Familiarity with tools like Jira, Linear, or similar product management systems.

    

- Experience working with distributed or fully remote engineering teams.

    



### How to Apply



If you are a product manager who enjoys building practical, high-impact software and collaborating with strong engineering teams, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume and a brief cover letter outlining your experience and interest in joining our team.

title: Website Graphics Assistant (Contract-Based)
description:
Website Graphics Assistant / Graphic Designer (Contract-Based)



We are looking for a creative **Website Graphics Assistant / Graphic Designer** to help develop original visual assets for a growing lifestyle brand.



This role will focus on creating graphics for **website use, apparel, accessories, and digital products**. Projects may include product graphics, website banners, promotional visuals, collection graphics, simple branding support, and marketplace-ready design assets.



Design themes may include **campus life, humor, cottagecore, pop-culture-inspired concepts, and lifestyle graphics**. We are looking for someone who enjoys creating **bold, fun, original, and commercially safe designs** that fit an online brand environment.



This is a **contract-based role**. Strong designers may also have opportunities for longer-term collaboration and potential publishing opportunities through our marketplace stores if their work aligns with our brand direction.



 Responsibilities:



* Create original graphic designs for website use, apparel, accessories, and digital products

* Design visual assets such as banners, collection graphics, product images, promotional graphics, and simple branded layouts

* Prepare designs suitable for print-on-demand and e-commerce production

* Ensure all designs follow commercial-use, originality, and copyright-safe guidelines

* Deliver files in production-ready formats such as PNG, vector, or layered source files

* Collaborate on creative concepts, seasonal themes, and product directions

* Maintain consistency with brand style, quality standards, and marketplace requirements



 Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



- has experience creating graphics for e-commerce, apparel, merchandise, or digital products

- understands online design trends and marketplace presentation

-can create original, non-copyrighted artwork

- is familiar with print-on-demand design requirements

- has a strong creative eye for layout, branding, and product presentation

- can follow direction while also contributing fresh ideas

-  is organized, responsive, and able to deliver production-ready files



Experience with tools such as:



* Adobe Illustrator

* Photoshop

* Procreate

* Canva

* Figma

* other digital illustration or graphic design tools



is a plus.



 Opportunity for Designers



In addition to contract design work, designers whose work strongly fits our brand may have the opportunity to collaborate on designs for our online marketplace stores.



This may provide additional exposure and potential revenue opportunities for high-quality work. Any collaboration terms will be discussed individually.



### To Apply



Please include the following:



* A link to your design portfolio

* Examples of website graphics, apparel designs, or merchandise designs you have created

* The design tools you use

* Your typical rate per project or per design

* Your turnaround time for a typical project



Very Important



To confirm that you read this job post, please start your message with the word:



**Design**



Applications without this word may not be reviewed.

title: E-Commerce Video Editor (MASTER WITH AI)
description:
Quick Summary

Daily Output: 3–4 concepts (30–90 seconds each)



Focus: Ultra-realistic AI product b-roll & talking characters



Location: Remote



About the Role

We are looking for a High-Volume AI Video Editor who can operate at the intersection of creative storytelling and cutting-edge technology. This is not a traditional "trimming" role; you will be responsible for prompting and generating entire scenes from scratch. You must be able to produce 3 to 4 finished video concepts per day that look like they were shot in a million-dollar studio.



Key Responsibilities

Rapid Concepting: Produce 3–4 unique video concepts daily, ranging from 30 to 90 seconds.



AI Product Cinematography: Generate ultra-realistic b-roll of product packaging with perfect lighting, textures, and fluid camera movements.



AI Character Creation: Build and animate hyper-realistic talking characters with seamless lip-syncing and emotive performance.



End-to-End Editing: Handle all prompting, upscaling, color grading, sound design, and final assembly.



Required Technical Stack

You must be an expert in the following tools to hit our daily output goals:



Video Generation: Runway Gen-3/Gen-4, Luma Dream Machine, or Kling.



Character/Voice: HeyGen (Avatar/Lip-sync), ElevenLabs (Voice), and D-ID.



Image/Product Gen: Midjourney (v6+) and Leonardo.ai (for consistent product styles).



Editing/Post-Production: Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut Desktop.



AI Enhancement: Topaz Video AI (for upscaling and cleaning AI artifacts).



Requirements

Speed: Ability to turn a concept into a polished video in under 2 hours.



Eye for Realism: You know how to spot and fix "AI-jank" (glitches, weird limbs, or unnatural lighting).



Proactive: You stay up-to-date with the weekly changes in the AI video landscape.



How to Apply

Provide a link to your portfolio or a folder of your best AI-generated video work (specifically product b-roll and talking characters).



List the AI tools you are currently paying for or use most frequently.



Application Requirement: To prove you have high attention to detail, please start your cover letter or subject line with the secret word: NEURAL.



LEVEL OF AI EDITING AND B-ROLL CREATION NEEDED :

title: Sales & Enrollment Specialist (Education/Coaching)
description:
Job Title: Sales & Enrollment Specialist (Education/Coaching)

Company: The College Game

Location: Remote (OnlineJobs.ph)

Type: Full-Time / Part-Time (Specify your preference)



About the Role

Are you a persuasive communicator who loves helping students and parents navigate the journey to college success? The College Game is looking for a results-driven Sales & Enrollment Specialist to join our growing team.



Your mission is simple: Turn our community members and leads into successful students by matching them with the right coaching services, courses, and resources. You will be the "bridge" between our free content (like our Podcast) and our life-changing paid programs.



Key Responsibilities

Direct Sales: Reach out to leads via
, social media DMs, and discovery calls to close sales for our flagship courses: College Success 101, The Admissions Playbook, The Financial Aid Playbook, and The College Athlete.



Community Growth: Actively move members from our unpaid community into our paid "Inner Circle" community.



Session Booking: Schedule prospective students and parents for coaching sessions with our founder.



Podcast Promotion: Encourage leads and current clients to engage with our weekly Podcast to build trust and brand authority.



CRM Management: Track all interactions and sales progress within our Kajabi platform (training provided, but familiarity is a plus!).



What We’re Looking For

Proven Sales Experience: At least 2+ years in digital sales, enrollment, or high-ticket coaching sales.



Exceptional English Skills: You must have world-class written and verbal communication skills. You’ll be talking to parents and students in the US.



The "Hustle" Mentality: You don't wait for leads to come to you; you enjoy the "hunt" and follow up consistently.



Empathy: You understand that choosing a college is stressful. You can sell with "heart" rather than just using high-pressure tactics.



Kajabi Knowledge: If you already know how to navigate Kajabi’s back end, you’ll be our top candidate!



Why Join The College Game?

Work with a passionate team (Project Manager, IT Expert, Copywriter, and Social Media Manager).



Flexible remote work environment.



Competitive base salary plus performance-based commissions/bonuses.



The chance to make a real impact on the lives of students and their families.



How to Apply

Please send your resume and a short video introduction (2 minutes max) explaining why you are the best person to grow The College Game. Use the subject line: "I’m Ready to Play for The College Game!"

title: Paid Media Manager
description:
Paid Media Manager (Lead Gen-Meta, TikTok, YouTube & Google)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full Time

Salary: $1,500-$2000 per month

Experience Required: Minimum 5 Years

Work Hours: 9-6pm UK Time

How to Apply: 

Fill the form: https: // forms. gle/ Es1tdVhVP8iM 3afx6 (remove the spaces)



Role Overview

We are a fast growing UK pay per lead marketing and scalable agency focused on high volume lead generation for clients in the legal claim sector. Our lead gen campaigns include but it is not limited to personal injury, financial claims, US Motor vehicle a
 & more.

We're looking for an experienced paid media manager who understands the pay per lead model at a strategic level and has experience managing campaigns that generate thousands of leads every month while building the internal systems required to support consistency and guidance for junior media buyers.



Requirements

• Minimum 5 years experience managing direct response lead generation in B2C vertical like Personal Injury

 • Proven experience managing profitable lead generation campaigns

 • Experience managing or leading a team of media buyers

 • Strong analytical and data interpretation skills

 • Experience managing campaigns across Meta,  TikTok, Google and X

 • Understanding of landing page optimisation and conversion rate optimisation

 • Experience with tracking tools and integrations such as Google Tag Manager and Zapier

 • Experience building systems or processes that improve media buying operations

 • Ability to manage multiple campaigns simultaneously in a fast paced environment



Key Responsibilities

Campaign Strategy and Planning

• Develop and execute scalable media buying strategies for lead generation campaigns

 • Plan campaign structures, audiences, creatives and funnels to maximise ROI

 • Identify opportunities to scale profitable campaigns across multiple traffic sources



Campaign Management

• Launch, monitor and optimise campaigns to meet target CPLs & CVRs across multiple advertising platforms

 • Manage campaign budgets and ensure efficient allocation of ad spend

 • Continuously test audiences, creatives and funnels to improve performance

 • Maintain consistent campaign performance across multiple accounts



Team Leadership

 • Manage and oversee a small team of media buyers

 • Provide guidance, training and performance feedback

 • Ensure campaigns are executed according to strategy and best practices

 • Maintain accountability for team performance and campaign outcomes



Systems and Operational Management

 • Develop and maintain systems that improve media buying efficiency and consistency

 • Create and manage SOPs for campaign setup, optimisation and reporting

 • Implement workflows that ensure campaign quality control and reduce errors

 • Improve processes to support campaign scaling and team productivity



Data Analysis, Research and Reporting

- Analyse campaign data to identify trends, opportunities and inefficiencies

- Conduct market and competitor research to inform campaign strategy

- Produce performance reports with actionable insights

- Use data to guide scaling decisions and budget allocation

- Comfortable with google sheets and other reporting tools



Advertising Platforms

•  Meta Ads

 • Google Ads

 • X 
) Ads

 • TikTok Ads



Creative Development

- Be comfortable writing direct response text copy & video scripts 

- Develop static ad creatives to improve campaign performance

- Work with designers to iterate and optimise creatives

- Experience developing video creatives is a strong advantage +



Landing Page Development

- Build and optimise landing pages, quiz funnels designed to maximise lead conversions

- Conduct test and improvements to increase conversion rates



Tracking and Software Integration

- Implement and manage tracking using tools such as Google Tag Manager

- Integrate marketing tools using platforms like Zapier

- Ensure accurate data tracking and attribution across campaigns

- Comfortable creating reports and dashboards using Google Sheet



Application Requirement

Applicants must include evidence of campaigns they have previously managed, such as:

• Screen recording or case studies showing campaign performance in lead generation verticals showcasing:  Ad spend managed, Cost per lead or acquisition achieved & Platform used (Meta, Google, TikTok etc)



Important: Applications that do not include specific campaign examples or case studies will not be considered.

title: Real Estate Video Editor (Part-Time) Final Cut Pro recommended
description:
Charlotte Real Estate Media is looking for part-time video editors to join our growing video team. This is not full-time employment. Editors are assigned projects as jobs come in.



Schedule & Availability

 • Workdays: Monday through Saturday

 • We do not work on Sundays

 • Projects are typically assigned by 10:00 PM EST

 • Videos must be submitted by 7:00 AM EST

 • Editors should be available to work evenings based on this schedule

 • Weekly workload will vary based on volume



Work Structure

 • Editors are assigned projects by a Video Team Leader

 • Projects are assigned as they come in

 • Some weeks may be busier than others

 • If volume slows, fewer projects may be assigned

 • This role is best for someone comfortable with flexible, project-based work



Pay

 • Paid per video ($20 for basic video, $35 for Premium video)

 • Rates discussed during the interview process

 • Final Cut Pro is recommended

 • A MacBook is strongly preferred

 • If you do not currently have a MacBook or Final Cut Pro, one may be provided

 • All music, fonts, sound effects, and creative assets are provided

 • Editors are not required to purchase any assets

 • Experience editing video (Final Cut Pro or similar NLE)

 • Good written English

 • Ability to follow systems and instructions

Experience

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Real Estate Branding Content)
description:
We’re hiring an additional short-form video editor to work alongside our current editor on real estate branding videos for Realtors.



This is a fast-paced, repeatable editing role. If you’re skilled, dependable, and comfortable working with clear systems and deadlines, this is a great opportunity.





What You’ll Be Editing

 • Short-form Realtor branding videos

 • 30–90 seconds per video

 • Agent-on-camera videos, testimonials, brand stories, and social clips

 • You will be given example links showing the exact style of videos you’ll be creating





Pay

 • $30 USD per completed video

 • Paid per video (contractor role)

 • Volume varies week to week





Turnaround Expectations

 • All videos must be delivered within 24 hours of receiving footage

 • Footage is typically uploaded by 10:00 PM EST

 • Final edits must be uploaded by 9:00 AM EST the following day

 • Most videos should take 2 hours or less once you understand the workflow

 • Timing and reliability are extremely important





Responsibilities

 • Download raw footage

 • Edit clean, engaging short-form videos

 • Use provided music, fonts, and brand guidelines

 • Upload final videos to Vimeo

 • Upload videos into our video delivery portal

 • Communicate clearly if questions arise





Requirements

 • Strong, fast, and reliable internet connection (required)

 • Ability to download and upload large video files quickly

 • Your own computer and editing software

 • Available up to 6 days per week if needed

 • Comfortable working independently and hitting deadlines

 • Teachable, humble, and detail-oriented





VERY IMPORTANT – Test Project (Required)



To be considered for this position, you must complete a short unpaid test project.



This is not free work.

This is the next step in the interview process so we can evaluate skill, speed, and attention to detail. We do a high volume of work and cannot train from scratch.

 • If selected, you will be sent a test project

 • You will have 24 hours to complete and submit it

 • Meeting the deadline is mandatory



If you are not willing to complete a test project, please do not apply.



Application Instructions (READ CAREFULLY)



To apply,
 us with the subject line:



TEST PROJECT



Applications without “TEST PROJECT” in the subject line will not be considered.



Please include:

 • A short introduction about yourself

 • Your internet speed

 • Editing software you use

 • Links to short-form or social media videos you’ve edited

title: FULL TIME Ecommerce Virtual Assistant
description:

title: Community Outreach Appointment Setter (Voice Role)
description:
We are looking for a confident and friendly communicator who enjoys connecting with people and building relationships with local business owners.



This role is part of a growing community-focused initiative that works with local businesses to strengthen neighborhood connections and visibility.



Our outreach begins in Tierrasanta, San Diego, and will quickly expand into nearby business communities such as Kearny Mesa, which has more than 4,000 businesses, with additional neighborhoods planned as the project grows.



This is an opportunity to be part of something meaningful that supports local businesses and helps build stronger community networks.



What Makes This Role Different:

This is not a scripted cold-calling job.



We are looking for someone who can have natural conversations, connect with people quickly, and speak with confidence and authenticity.



You should feel comfortable speaking with business owners, building rapport, and respectfully asking if they would be open to learning about a community initiative designed to support local businesses.



Responsibilities:

- Reach out to local businesses by phone

- Introduce a community-focused initiative

- Ask business owners if they would be open to a short conversation

- Schedule brief appointments when appropriate

- Help build positive relationships with businesses in targeted neighborhoods



What We’re Looking For

- Excellent spoken English

- Clear and confident speaking voice

- Neutral or American-style accent

- Friendly, professional, and respectful tone

- Strong interpersonal communication skills

- Ability to build rapport quickly

- Positive and persistent mindset

- Comfortable having natural conversations without reading from a script

This role is ideal for someone who genuinely enjoys talking with people, building relationships, and sounding confident and natural in conversation. Because you will be speaking with U.S. business owners, strong spoken English and a clear, easy-to-understand conversational style are very important for this role.



Schedule:

Night shift (Philippines time) covering U.S. Pacific Standard Time (PST) business hours.



How to Apply:

Please submit the following:

- A short introduction about yourself.

- A 60 second voice recording answering this question:

"Imagine you are calling a local business owner to introduce a community project and asking if they would have a few minutes to learn more."

- A short written answer to this question: Why do you think local businesses value being connected to their community?



Attention to Detail:

Attention to detail matters in this role.

When submitting your application, please begin your message with the word “Community” so we know you read the full job post.



Opportunity for Growth:

We are building something long-term that connects and supports local business communities.

The outreach begins with Tierrasanta, but we will quickly expand into other targeted neighborhoods such as Kearny Mesa and beyond.



As the project grows, there will be additional opportunities for those who demonstrate strong communication skills, professionalism, and commitment to helping local business communities succeed.

title: Performance Creative Strategist
description:
About Us



[vrsn] is a Hong Kong-based footwear brand redefining what pain-relief shoes can be: functional, stylish, and built for everyday life. After a successful Kickstarter launch (
) in 2024, we’re building out our global eCommerce business at [vrsn.co] (
). 



The Role



We’re looking for a Performance Creative Strategist to develop and oversee ad concepts from idea to launch. Your goal is simple: create ads that grab attention and drive revenue. This role blends creative ideation, structured testing, and close collaboration with editors, designers, and media buyers to turn concepts into high-performing campaigns.



What You’ll Do



- Research trends, competitors, and performance data to generate ad concepts, and maintain a balanced pipeline of both best-practice and outside-the-box ideas

- Write scripts, outlines, and briefs for UGC creators, editors, and designers, and collaborate during production to ensure concepts are executed effectively

- Partner with the media buyer to hand off creative, review results, and join feedback loops to identify what’s working and refine future concepts



What We’re Looking For



- 2–5 years experience in performance creative strategy for paid social (Meta/TikTok), either agency or in-house, ideally with DTC/eCommerce brands

- Working knowledge of ad operations, testing cadence, and how creative scales on Meta — you understand creative testing frameworks, fatigue curves, and what it takes to move metrics like CTR, hook rates and ultimately CPA/ROAS

- Strong mix of creativity and analytical rigor: able to propose fresh concepts and back them with data-driven rationale

- Experience scripting UGC content, briefing creators/editors, and collaborating hands-on with creative teams

- Passion for testing, learning, and iterating quickly; excellent communicator and collaborator



**Nice to Have**



- Active user of AI tools and workflows (ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney, Runway, etc.) to accelerate ideation, scripting, research, and production — you look for ways to use AI to do better work, faster

- Experience across multiple ad platforms (TikTok, YouTube, etc.)



To Apply



Please share:



- A portfolio or case studies showing ad concepts you’ve developed and the results they achieved

- A short note on how you approach balancing data-driven rationale with creative “outside the box” thinking

- (Optional) One example of how you've used AI tools to improve your creative workflow

title: Content Operations Specialist (AI-Assisted Text Processing)
description:
Content Operations Specialist (AI-Assisted Text Processing)



Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Job Type: Full time

Experience: 1–3 years (or equivalent experience with structured content and AI tools)



About Us:



We are building a new kind of knowledge platform focused on how people understand, organize, and engage with writing. Our work goes beyond traditional content systems, aiming to create more structured, meaningful, and connected ways to work with information.



Our goal is to build the underlying structure that allows knowledge to be captured, organized, and connected in more intelligent and flexible ways.



Role Description:



We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Content Operations Specialist to help transform raw text from external sources into clean, structured content for our platform. This role relies heavily on using AI tools to process, refine, and restructure documents according to precise guidelines.



You will be responsible for guiding AI tools, validating their output, correcting subtle errors, and ensuring that every document meets strict formatting and structural standards. This is not a software development role. It is an operations role focused on accuracy, consistency, and high-quality execution.



Key Responsibilities:



Use AI tools to clean, format, and restructure text documents from external sources.



Remove unwanted characters, artifacts, and formatting inconsistencies.



Apply detailed formatting and structural rules to documents.



Convert content into standardized JSON formats used by the platform.



Review AI-generated output for subtle errors and correct them manually when needed.



Ensure consistency and accuracy across large batches of documents.



Follow and refine written content-processing procedures.



Flag edge cases and ambiguities in source material or formatting rules.



Qualifications:



Strong ability to follow detailed, nuanced instructions.



Comfort working with AI tools as part of daily workflows.



Exceptional attention to detail and consistency.



Strong written communication skills.



Ability to stay focused on repetitive, precision-based tasks.



Comfort working with structured formats like JSON (no coding required, but accuracy is essential).



Organized, reliable, and process-oriented.



Interest in knowledge platforms, structured content, or information systems is a plus.



How to Apply:



If you enjoy working with AI tools, care deeply about precision, and like turning messy information into clean, structured data, we’d love to hear from you. Please submit your resume along with a short explanation of any experience you have working with structured content, AI tools, or detail-focused operational work.

title: **CLAUDE CODE DEVELOPER — AI Content Production Pipeline (LinkedIn Agency)**
description:
**Overview**



We're a LinkedIn content and lead generation agency working with 47 clients. Our entire operation runs on Claude AI — we've built a suite of 40+ custom skills (structured markdown prompt files) that handle everything from content strategy to visual production briefs to carousel generation.



The problem: our production workflow involves too many manual steps. A tea
mber runs each skill sequentially, copies outputs between tools, creates folders manually, and pushes briefs into Canva by hand. At 47 clients producing multiple content assets per month each, that's a lot of admin that shouldn't require a human.



We want to build a Claude Code pipeline that chains these steps automatically — so our designer focuses on QA and finishing, not copy-pasting and folder management.



---



**Current manual workflow**



Here's what happens right now, step by step:



1. Approved written content is taken from the client project

2. Tea
mber opens Claude, loads the Visual Architect skill, inputs the content ? receives structured Nano Banana image prompts (formatted for Manus image generation)

3. Tea
mber opens Claude, loads the Carousel Visualiser skill, inputs the content ? receives a carousel brief with slide-by-slide copy and layout direction

4. Carousel brief is manually pushed into Canva via the Canva MCP connector

5. Nano Banana prompts are manually taken into Manus for image generation

6. Finished assets are manually dropped into the correct Google Drive client folder



We want steps 2, 3, 4, and 6 automated. Step 5 (Manus image generation) remains manual for now.



---



**What we want to build**



A Claude Code script (or lightweight CLI tool) with a simple trigger. The designer inputs:



- Client name

- Approved written content (pasted or file path)



And the pipeline automatically:



1. **Runs the Visual Architect skill** against the content ? produces formatted Nano Banana prompts ready for Manus, saved to a structured output file

2. **Runs the Carousel Visualiser skill** against the content ? produces carousel brief with slide copy, layout direction, and content QA output

3. **Pushes the carousel brief into Canva** via Canva MCP — creating the design file in the correct client workspace

4. **Locates or creates the correct Google Drive client folder** and drops all outputs (prompts file, carousel brief, Canva link) into it, correctly named



The designer then opens the folder, takes the Nano Banana prompts into Manus manually, and does final QA on the Canva output.



---



**The tech stack**



- **Claude Code** — primary development environment

- **Anthropic API** — claude-sonnet
, skills loaded as system prompts

- **Canva MCP** — already connected (
/mcp), used for pushing carousel briefs and creating design files

- **Google Drive MCP** — already connected (
 — Drive access enabled), used for folder management and file storage

- **Our skill files** — 40+ structured .md files, two of which are central to this pipeline (Visual Architect v4.0, Carousel Visualiser v2.1). You'll receive full access

- **Google Drive** — client folders already exist and follow a consistent naming convention



---



**Specific deliverables**



1. A working Claude Code pipeline script that executes the full automated sequence described above

2. A simple interface for the designer — ideally a CLI prompt or basic input form. No complex UI required

3. Error handling — if a client folder doesn't exist in Drive, create it. If Canva push fails, log it and flag to the designer

4. Output logging — a simple run log per execution (client name, date, assets created, Canva link, Drive folder path)

5. Documentation — a plain-English setup and usage guide written for a non-technical designer. Step by step, no assumptions

6. A short walkthrough video of the working pipeline (Loom is fine)



---



**What we're not building**



- A full web app or dashboard

- Anything that touches Manus (that stays manual for now)

- Anything client-facing

- Complex UI — this is an internal production tool



---



**Scale context**



47 clients. Each client produces approximately:

- 10 personal LinkedIn posts per month

- 4 carousels per month

- 8 company page posts per month



The pipeline needs to handle single-client runs and ideally batch runs (multiple clients queued). Not all of this in v1 — but worth knowing so you don't architect something that can't scale.



---



**Who we're looking for**



- Solid experience with Claude Code and the Anthropic API

- Has worked with MCP integrations before — ideally Canva or Google Drive

- Comfortable reading and working with structured markdown prompt files (our skills)

- Builds things that non-technical people can actually use

- Asks good questions before building, not after

- Available for a short discovery call before starting



---



**To apply**



Please answer these three questions in your proposal:



1. Have you built anything with Claude Code before? Describe the project and what it did.

2. Have you worked with MCP integrations — specifically Canva MCP or Google Drive MCP? What was the use case?

3. How would you approach chaining multiple large system prompts (each 1,000–3,000 words) through the Anthropic API without hitting context issues?



Proposals without answers to all three will not be considered.

Let me know how much  you think the project would cost

title: AI GENERALIST - HOSPITALITY INDUSTRY
description:
Are you someone who does not just use AI -- but thinks in AI?

 

Residentas is an international hospitality company with premium properties in Lisbon and the USA. We are building one of the most AI-integrated operations in the short-term rental space, and we need someone who lives at that frontier with us.

This is not a traditional role. We are not looking for a VA or a marketer or an analyst. We are looking for an AI Generalist -- someone who sees a problem and immediately asks: how do I use AI to solve this better, faster, and at a higher standard than a human team could alone.

 

If you think AI is a tool you use occasionally, this role is not for you. If AI is how you think -- read on.

 

WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING:

+ Identifying repetitive or manual processes across our operations and automating them using AI tools and workflows. +Building internal tools, templates and systems using Claude, ChatGPT, Replit or similar platforms. 

+ Supporting our guest experience, listings,
 funnels and market research with AI-generated output that actually meets a luxury brand standard. 

+ Translating business problems into AI prompts, workflows and solutions -- without waiting to be told how. 

+Documenting what you build so the team can use it without you holding their hand. 

 

QUALITIES WE VALUE:

 

--Systems Thinking: You do not just complete tasks. You redesign them.

 

--AI Fluency: Claude, ChatGPT, Replit, Zapier, Make -- you move between tools and you know when to use which.

 

--Judgment: You know when AI output is good enough and when it is not. You do not ship garbage.

 

--Ownership: You treat problems like they are yours to solve.

 

--Integrity: You say what you think, especially when something is not working.

 

REQUIREMENTS:

 

-- You have used AI tools to build or automate something real -- not just write
s. 

-- Strong written English. Your output will represent a premium brand. 

-- Comfortable learning new platforms fast. We move quickly. 

-- Self-directed. You do not need daily instructions to make progress.

 -- Bonus: experience in hospitality, property management or e-commerce operations.

 

WHAT WILL DISQUALIFY YOU IMMEDIATELY:

 

+Applying without examples of real AI-assisted work you have produced.

+Generic applications that do not follow the instructions below.

+Treating AI as a shortcut rather than a standard-raiser.

 

THE BENEFITS:

 

+Starting pay: 30,000 PHP per month.

 

+100% Remote work.

 

+Direct line to the founder from day one.

 

+You will be building systems that define how this company operates for years.

 

+You will work with tools and methods most companies will not adopt for years.

 

HOW TO APPLY:

Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs. In the subject line, include the code AG1. I will then send you a link to our official application form. On that form, in the extra comments field, write AG1.
