title: Part-Time Executive Operations Assistant
description:
Hours: Part-time, 2-3 hours per day, Monday to Friday (consistent daily schedule required). Work can be completed during your evening hours to overlap with Australian/European business hours, or async with daily task handoff each morning.

Salary dependent on experience (part-time, 2-3 hours per day)



About Us

We're Pure Proposals, a PandaDoc consulting agency working with clients across Australia, the US, Canada, New Zealand, and the UK. The founder handles sales, scoping, and partner relationships. We have a project lead handling implementation delivery. What we're missing is someone to own the day-to-day operations so the founder can focus on growing the business.

This is not a traditional VA role. You won't be doing data entry or calendar management in isolation. You'll be the operational backbone of a small, fast-moving agency - managing client communications, keeping our CRM accurate, and coordinating with our software partner's sales team. You'll represent the business in
s and messages with real clients and partners. The standard is high, but the work is interesting and you'll have real ownership.

What You'll Own

Client communications and inbox management:



Triage the inbox daily. Flag urgent items for the founder, handle routine responses independently using your judgment and provided templates.

Send post-project check-in
s to clients at Day 14 and Day 45 after project completion.

Schedule calls and meetings across multiple timezones (Australia, US, UK, Europe).



CRM and reporting (HubSpot):



Keep HubSpot deals, contacts, and pipeline stages accurate and up to date.

Pull a weekly deal report and a separate commission tracking report.

Log notes from calls and
s into the CRM after each client interaction.



Partner coordination:



Send a weekly sourced-deal update to our PandaDoc partner contacts (account executives and partner managers).

Track which clients are registered on our partner account and flag any gaps.

Coordinate with PandaDoc account executives on shared opportunities - this means professional, relationship-aware communication with people at a US software company.



General operations:



Assemble case study drafts from project notes and client feedback (structuring information, not creative writing).

QA check AI-generated outputs before they go to clients.

Light research tasks as needed (competitor pricing, event details, client background).



What We're Looking For

Must-haves:



Excellent written English. Not just grammatically correct - professional, warm, and natural-sounding. You'll be
ing clients in Australia, the US, and the UK on behalf of the business. They should not be able to tell the
 wasn't written by the founder.

Experience with a CRM tool. HubSpot preferred, but Salesforce, Pipedrive, Zoho, or similar is fine. You need to understand deals, pipeline stages, contacts, and basic reporting.

Reliable and consistent. 2-3 hours per day, every weekday, no exceptions. We need someone who shows up on schedule and doesn't disappear.

Detail-oriented. CRM data needs to be accurate. Client
s need to be polished. Partner reports need to be correct.

Comfortable working asynchronously via Slack. You'll receive daily priorities and communicate updates through Slack, not calls.

Proactive. If something looks off or a client hasn't responded, flag it without being asked.



Nice-to-haves:



Experience in a professional services, consulting, or agency environment

Familiarity with PandaDoc, Notion, or Zapier/Make

Experience supporting a founder or executive in a small business (not a large corporate team)

Experience with partner or channel management

Bookkeeping or light financial admin experience



Put PROPOSALS at the start of your application. If you don't it will be automatically rejected.

title: Graphic Designer (Document & Brand Design)
description:
-ABOUT US-



We're Pure Proposals, a PandaDoc consulting agency that helps businesses build professional proposal and quoting systems. We work with clients across Australia, the US, Canada, New Zealand, and the UK. Our clients range from entertainment venue groups to construction companies to SaaS businesses. We need a designer who can make their documents look incredible.



What You'll Be Designing



Document and proposal designs - this is the core of the role. We build proposal templates, quotes, contracts, and booking confirmations inside a platform called PandaDoc for our clients. You don't need to know PandaDoc. Your job is to design the layouts in Figma or your preferred design tool, and our team implements them into the platform. You'll take a client's brand and create polished, professional document designs that we then bring to life. What matters is your eye for layout, typography, and clean document design.



Social media graphics - LinkedIn infographics, carousels, and post graphics. We need someone who can take a topic or set of data points and turn them into visually compelling, shareable graphics. Not templated filler. Think the kind of infographic or carousel that makes someone stop scrolling because it's genuinely useful and looks great. We'll provide the content and direction, you make it visual.



Case studies and one-pagers - single or multi-page PDFs that showcase client results. Clean, modern layout with strong visual hierarchy.



Ebooks and guides - longer-form designed documents (10-20 pages) for lead magnets and client resources.

Website design assets - banners, graphics, and visual elements for our Framer website.



Brand collateral - helping consolidate and maintain our brand guidelines, creating consistent assets across all touchpoints.



What We're Looking For



Must-haves:



Strong portfolio showing document layout and design (proposals, pitch decks, reports, case studies, or similar). This is the most important thing. If your portfolio is all logos and social media posts, this isn't the right fit.



Clean, modern design aesthetic. Think rounded edges, bold but not overwhelming colours, strong typography, plenty of white space. We like designs that feel premium without being overly corporate.



Proficiency in Figma and/or Canva. Adobe suite is a bonus but not required.



Responsive communication. We move fast and need someone who replies within a few hours during working hours.

Comfortable working asynchronously with clear briefs via Slack.



Nice-to-haves:



Experience with infographic design or data visualization

Experience with presentation/pitch deck design

Basic web design skills (Framer, Webflow, or similar)



How to Apply

Send us:



1. A link to your portfolio. This is the most important part of your application. We're evaluating your design style and quality before anything else. Show us document layouts, proposal designs, pitch decks, case studies, brand collateral. The more relevant to what we described above, the better.



2. A short message (3-4 sentences max) telling us: your timezone, your hourly rate, and your typical availability per week.



3. One example from your portfolio that you think best represents the style of work we're describing.



We will not respond to applications without a portfolio link.



Put PROPOSALS at the start of your application. If you don't it will be automatically rejected.

title: Revit Families BIM Modeler (Remote)

We're looking for a reliable, detail-oriented virtual assistant to join our team full-time and grow with us long-term. This is not a short-term project — we want someone we can trust and build with over time. There is real room to grow in this role.



Before a full offer is made, shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a short trial task. This is paid and designed to let you show your skills, work ethic, and attention to detail. We take this seriously and so should you — it is your opportunity to stand out.

What you'll be doing



SHOPIFY STORE MANAGEMENT

Upload and manage product listings across multiple market stores

Translate and localise product titles, descriptions, and pages for different markets

CUSTOMER SUPPORT

Manage customer
s and support tickets across multiple language markets

Maintain fast response times and a high level of customer satisfaction



DAILY REPORTING & BOOKKEEPING

What we're looking for



Strong English required — written and spoken. You will be handling customer
s, translating content, and communicating with our team daily. Poor English will result in immediate disqualification.

Proven experience with Shopify — theme editing, product listings, store settings

Experience editing videos in CapCut (text swaps, subtitle edits)

Previous customer support experience, ideally in ecommerce

Comfortable working across multiple languages (or working with translation tools accurately)

Proficient in spreadsheets (Google Sheets or Excel) for daily financial reporting

What we offer

A team that values trust and rewards reliability

How to apply

Any previous customer support roles or references

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role



We’re a boutique branding studio based in the Netherlands, working at the intersection of identity, systems, and design execution. We’re looking for a Brand & UI Systems Designer — someone who can translate brand identity into structured, scalable visual assets across decks, templates, interfaces, and documentation.



This is a part-time remote role (3 fixed days/week) with the potential to grow into a full-time position. You’ll work on both client-facing and internal design systems — creating clarity, consistency, and structure in everything you build.



If you enjoy making brands work — not just look good — this is for you.



---



What You’ll Do



- Apply and extend brand systems across digital and print applications

- Design structured layouts, branded decks, templates, and documentation visuals

- Build and maintain brand kits, internal design tools, and asset libraries

- Create light UI components and visuals that support interface design (e.g., Webflow mockups, content visuals)

- Work independently but collaboratively — with support from our design and strategy team

- Use Figma, Illustrator, and InDesign as your core tools

- Keep all files organized, scalable, and developer-ready where needed



---



What This Role is Not



This is not a generalist or social media content role.



It’s also not for junior designers focused purely on visual trends or aesthetics.



We’re looking for someone who:



- Thinks in systems, not just single-use visuals

- Builds brand architecture, not just one-off designs

- Can adapt identity into interface and layout logic



---



What We’re Looking For



- 5+ years of experience in branding, identity design, or UI-aligned visual systems

- Strong portfolio showing brand system implementation across multiple touchpoints

- Experience creating and managing assets like design kits, templates, and documentation

- Confident with tools like Figma, Illustrator, and InDesign

- Good habits around file structure, versioning, and organized delivery

- Excellent English (C1/C2 level) — both written and spoken

- Available to work 3 fixed days/week (6–8 hours/day)

- Comfortable working independently and owning deliverables



---



Nice to Have



- Experience with Shopify (designing assets, layout support)

- Familiarity with Webflow or other no-code platforms

- Proficiency with Premiere Pro and After Effects

- Interest in building internal systems and improving design operations



---



Compensation & Benefits



- Monthly range: 45,000 – 65,000PHP, depending on experience and portfolio 

- Final offer based on your portfolio, profile, and a short design use case test

- Path to grow into a full-time position if the collaboration is strong

- 13th month bonus for long-term contributors (including part-time)

- Be part of a team that values clarity, autonomy, and systems thinking



---



How to Apply



Send us:



- Your portfolio — focused on brand systems, templates, or UI-aligned identity work

- A short motivation explaining why this role fits your skill set and mindset



If there’s a potential fit, we’ll invite you to complete a short design use case as part of the evaluation.

title: Sales Account Executive
description:
How to Apply

* Send your most updated resume to 



About us:



Gushwork.ai builds AI Agents that help small and medium businesses automate their entire inbound marketing stack — from SEO and website content to reviews, blogs, and lead funnels. Our current focus is the manufacturing and industrial distributors industry.



In plain English: we’re replacing bloated marketing agencies with intelligent, always-on software.



Backed by Lightspeed, SIG, Beenext, and B Capital, Gushwork.ai is one of the fastest-growing AI companies globally.



In just a year, we’ve grown to $1.5M ARR and are scaling fast toward $15M ARR in the next 12 months — helping thousands of small businesses grow smarter, not harder.



The Role:



We’re looking for a closer who thrives in fast-paced, high-velocity sales environments. You’ll own the full sales cycle from discovery to close for qualified meetings booked by our 10-person BDR team. This is a quota-carrying role where you’ll close 4-8 deals monthly, with deal cycles ranging from 1-3 calls.



Working Hours: US Shift (9:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST)

Work Mode: Remote



What You’ll Do:



- Run discovery calls with qualified prospects (OEMs, distributors, manufacturers) to uncover pain points around lead generation and digital presence

- Deliver compelling demos that connect our AI SEO solution to specific business outcomes and revenue impact

- Navigate buying committees within SMB organizations, typically engaging with Marketing Directors, Sales Leaders, and C-suite

- Close deals on 12-month contracts with ACV of $5k-$25k, meeting or exceeding monthly quota

- Manage pipeline with discipline—forecast accurately, maintain detailed CRM hygiene, and move deals forward with urgency

- Partner with Growth Managers post-sale to ensure smooth handoffs and identify expansion opportunities

- Iterate on sales methodology by sharing wins/losses and collaborating on improving conversion rates



What Success Looks Like:



- Month 1-2: Ramp on product, market, and sales process; close your first 2-3 deals

- Month 3+: Consistently hit/exceed quota of 4-8 closed deals monthly

- Ongoing: Maintain 30%+ demo-to-close conversion rate and sub-30 day sales cycles



You’re a Great Fit If You Have:



- 2-4 years of closing experience in B2B SaaS, MarTech, or digital services

- Proven track record hitting/exceeding quota in a high-velocity sales environment

- SMB sales chops—you know how to build urgency, handle objections, and close without lengthy procurement cycles

- Consultative selling skills—you diagnose before prescribing and can articulate ROI clearly

- Comfort with ambiguity—you’re joining an early-stage startup where adaptability matters

- CRM proficiency (Zoho, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.) and strong process discipline

- Excellent English communication skills for engaging with global prospects

- Want to hustle like crazy to hit the numbers!



Bonus Points For:



- Experience selling to manufacturers, distributors, or industrial/B2B companies

- Background in SEO, content marketing, or lead generation solutions

- Track record in 1-3 call close environments

- Familiarity with AI-powered products

- Experience selling to US/international markets



What We Offer:



- Accelerators for over-quota performance—top performers earn significantly more

- Qualified pipeline delivered daily by our BDR team—focus on closing, not prospecting

- Fast feedback loops—short sales cycles mean you learn and earn quickly

- Career growth—as we scale, top performers move into senior AE or team lead roles

- Equity in a VC-backed rocketship

- Collaborative, high-performance culture where wins are celebrated and losses are learning 
nts

- Remote work



Our Sales Process



- BDR books qualified meeting ? hands off to you

- Call 1: Discovery (30-45 min) - understand business, pain points, buying process

- Call 2: Demo + Proposal (45-60 min) - tailored walkthrough, ROI discussion, pricing

- Call 3 (if needed): Negotiation/Close - handle final objections, terms, signatures

- Handoff to Growth Manager for onboarding



How to Apply

* Send your most updated resume to

title: Creative Strategist & Media Buyer
description:
We're building an AI-powered SEO automation platform launching next week. You'll get direct 1-on-1 access to the founder and work daily with our editor.



I'm looking for someone who can own both the creative and paid acquisition side of our growth. That means developing ad concepts, writing copy that converts, building and managing campaigns across Meta and Google, analyzing performance data, and iterating fast. You'll shape the brand voice, create assets, and make sure every dollar we spend on ads is working.

You should have strong creative instincts and know how to turn those into campaigns that actually perform. Experience running paid media for SaaS or tech products is a plus. You need to be comfortable using AI tools as part of your workflow.

This is an early-stage role with real ownership. If you thrive with autonomy and want to build a growth engine from the ground up, this is for you.



How to apply



Start your application with the letter: X

Then answer these two questions:



1. Walk me through one ad or campaign you ran that delivered strong results. What was the strategy, what creative decisions did you make, and what specifically made it work? Don't just send a screenshot; explain your thinking.

How are you using AI in your creative or media buying process today? Be specific about tools, workflows, and where it gives you an edge.



2. Keep your answers clear and specific. Generic responses will be ignored.



P.S. This starts as a contract position on an hourly basis, but strong performers move to full-time. You'll get a base rate plus performance incentives, so if you deliver results, you'll be paid well for it.

title: E-commerce & Shopify Skincare Specialist (with Strong AI / ChatGPT Skills) – Remote
description:
We’re a high-end online skincare and supplements retailer focused on professional, results-driven products. Every detail — from the product catalog to customer communication — is designed to feel premium, expert and trustworthy.



We’re looking for a long-term collaborator who combines Shopify mastery with advanced AI / ChatGPT prompting skills and a precise sense of structure, design and tone.



Role overview

1. Shopify product catalog & structure



Organise and categorise all products accurately (skin type, concern, product type, brand, etc.).



Improve titles, tags, filters and collections for consistency and clarity.



Set up metafields and attributes to support filters, quizzes and product recommendations.



Ensure all pages are clean, mobile-friendly and aligned with a high-end brand aesthetic.



2. Product content & optimisation (with AI support)



Rewrite and optimise product titles and descriptions in a premium, expert tone.



Use AI tools (ChatGPT or similar) for first drafts, then refine and perfect manually.



Highlight key benefits, active ingredients and usage instructions.



Add cross-sells and upsells to build routines or complete sets.



Apply basic SEO (headers, meta data, image tags, internal links).



3. AI / ChatGPT workflows & prompting



Design clear, structured prompts for:



Product descriptions



Routine and regimen recommendations



 campaigns and automations



Educational or blog-style content



Build internal prompt frameworks for consistent, on-brand output.



Review and refine all AI-generated content.



Document workflows for reuse and scalability.



4. Optional: consultation quiz / recommendation flow



(Not required, but a strong plus)



Help design or refine a guided skincare consultation flow.



Use AI to generate logic and text for questions and results.



Work with existing Shopify tools or third-party quiz/chat apps.



5. Merchandising & bestsellers



Highlight key products and bestsellers across the site.



Create product bundles and complete routines.



Continuously improve visibility and UX using store data and analytics.



6.
 marketing



Create high-quality, educational
 campaigns and automations.



Use AI to ideate and draft, then manually refine tone and flow.



Build automated flows (welcome, abandoned cart, replenishment, educational).



Segment lists by customer interests, behaviours and purchase history.



Maintain a refined, trustworthy brand voice throughout.



Key responsibilities



Manage and optimise the full Shopify catalog and structure.



Use AI / ChatGPT daily for copy creation, workflow building and optimisation.



Keep the tone premium, knowledgeable and consistent.



Ensure bestsellers, bundles and routines are clearly presented.



(Optionally) assist in creating a skincare quiz or consultation flow.



Requirements



Proven Shopify experience (send links to stores you’ve worked on).



Strong background in e-commerce, ideally in beauty, wellness or supplements.



Excellent organisational skills and attention to product data detail.



Advanced AI / ChatGPT prompting skills, including:



Clear role/system prompt structuring



Iterative refining for brand voice and style



Building templates for consistent results



Fluent written English and strong copywriting skills.



Understanding of on-page SEO and mobile-friendly design.



Experience with at least one
 platform (e.g. Klaviyo, Mailchimp).



Independent, proactive, self-organising mindset.



Nice to have



Experience with quizzes, chatbots or guided recommendation tools.



Knowledge of skincare ingredients and concerns.



Basic graphic or layout editing (Figma / Canva).



Familiarity with conversion optimisation or analytics.



Additional language skills (especially EU languages).



What’s offered



Long-term remote collaboration.



Work with premium skincare and wellness products.



Freedom to propose improvements and automation ideas.



Direct communication, quick decisions, and creative autonomy.



How to apply



Send:



A short introduction about yourself and your background.



Links to Shopify stores you’ve worked on (with a short description of your role).



Examples of product pages or
 campaigns you created.



A sample of how you use ChatGPT or AI in your daily workflow (prompt or result).



Your expected rate and availability.

title: Operations Manager - 8-Figure Ecommerce Brand
description:
## About Us



We are a fast-growing DTC nutraceutical company focused on women's health supplements. We've scaled from $0 to over seven figures per month in under a year, and we're just getting started. We're building a world-class remote team and need an Operations Manager who can own the machine that keeps everything running.



## Why This Role Is Critical



Our founder's highest-leverage work is creative strategy and growth. Right now, too much of his time is spent on operational firefighting—managing people, chasing supply chain updates, processing payments, and keeping systems running. This role exists to take full ownership of day-to-day operations so the business can scale without the founder being a bottleneck.



## What You'll Own



### Systems & SOPs



- Build, document, and maintain SOPs for every role and process in Notion

- Ensure every role has a clear playbook so new hires can onboard without tribal knowledge

- Audit and improve existing processes—identify bottlenecks and fix them



### People Management & Accountability



- Manage all tea
mbers day-to-day—you are the primary point of contact for the team

- Track and enforce KPIs on a weekly basis using job scorecards

- Run weekly team standups and 1:1 check-ins

- Conduct monthly and quarterly performance reviews

- Handle underperformance conversations and performance improvement plans

- Process contractor and team payments



### Hiring & Onboarding



- Manage the hiring pipeline when roles open: post jobs, screen applicants, coordinate assessments, schedule interviews

- Build and execute structured onboarding plans for every new hire

- Maintain and update job descriptions and scorecards for all roles



### Supply Chain & Fulfillment



- Own inventory tracking, demand forecasting, and reorder management

- Manage freight logistics and coordinate shipments (China ? US warehouses)

- Manage 3PL relationships—monitor SLAs, resolve issues, optimize costs

- Prevent stockouts and overstock situations through proactive forecasting



### Cost Visibility



- Track recurring business expenses (tools, subscriptions, vendors) and flag anomalies

- Deliver a monthly OPEX summary—where money is going and what looks off



## Requirements



- 2+ years in an operations or project management role in e-commerce or DTC

- Advanced Notion user (required)—you build systems in it, not just use it

- Actively uses AI tools daily to automate work, build systems, and solve problems

- Experience managing remote teams across multiple time zones

- Experience with supply chain: inventory management, 3PL coordination, freight, and demand forecasting

- Comfortable reading basic financials: OPEX tracking, vendor costs, budget vs. actual

- Has experience with hiring processes



## Character Traits We're Looking For



- **Ownership mentality** — treats the business like their own, doesn't wait to be told

- **Systems thinker** — sees a messy process and instinctively documents and fixes it

- **Proactive communicator** — surfaces problems before they escalate, provides updates without being asked

- **Comfortable with hard conversations** — holds people accountable while keeping them motivated

- **Organized to the extreme** — nothing falls through the cracks

- **Resourceful** — figures things out before asking for help



## This Is NOT For You If:



- You need to be told what to do every day

- You think operations is just admin work

- You're not comfortable managing people and having difficult conversations

- You don't actively use AI tools in your daily workflow

- You've never worked in e-commerce or DTC

- You've never built systems or SOPs from scratch

- You can't work autonomously across time zones



## Compensation & Perks



- $50,000–$70,000/year base

- Paid annual leave: 14 calendar days

- Fully remote

- Paid sick days



### How to Apply



If this sounds like you, please fill out the form below and you will hear back from us soon!



[
](
)



SLD Ecommerce is an equal opportunity employer that is committed to diversity and inclusion.



We encourage all applications irrespective of gender, race, sexual orientation, religion, age, nationality, marital status, and disability. We believe that diversity is at the heart of innovation and we welcome passionate candidates from all backgrounds. Come join the family and see for yourself!

title: Facebook Ads Launcher for Fashion Dropshipping Stores (Shopify)
description:
We are a fast-scaling fashion dropshipping company looking for a 
 Media Buyer (Ad Launcher Focused)* to join our team.



This role is specifically for *launching ads at scale*, not deep optimization. If you have hands-on experience launching campaigns for Shopify fashion stores and understand high-volume product testing structures, this is for you.



---



## About Us



We currently operate *4 Shopify fashion stores, with plans to scale to **15–20 stores at peak*.



Our model is structured, repeatable, and systemized. We test aggressively and launch at volume.



---



## Your Core Responsibility



Your primary role is to *launch
 ads daily* across multiple stores with precision and consistency.



### Daily Volume Per Store:



* 10 products per day

* 3 ads per product

* *30 ads launched per store per day*



At scale (15–20 stores), this becomes a high-volume launch operation.



---



## How Our System Works



* The *10 products per day are identical across all stores*

* The *ad creatives are identical across all stores*

* Only the *ad copy is translated* to match the store’s market language (via DeepL)

* UK = English (Control Store)

* France = French

* Germany = German

* Etc.



You will:



1. Launch ads in the *English Control Store first*

2. Then replicate the structure across all other stores

3. Translate copy using DeepL

4. Ensure everything matches the native language of that market



---



## Technical Setup



* All ads are launched via *Incogniton*

* Each store has its own:



  * Proxy

  * Private browsing profile

  * Ad account

  * Business Manager



You must be comfortable working with:



* Multi-store environments

* Proxies

* Anti-detect browsers (Incogniton)

* Structured naming conventions

*
 Ads Manager at scale



---



## Collaboration



You will work closely with our *Product Importer*, who handles daily product uploads and listings across all stores.



This is a synchronized workflow:



* Products go live

* Ads get launched same day

* Repeat daily



Speed and organization are critical.



---



## Who This Is For



? Someone who has worked with *Shopify fashion dropshipping stores*

? Someone who understands high-volume ad testing

? Someone who does not need hand-holding

? Someone who can follow structured systems precisely

? Someone comfortable with repetitive but high-impact execution



---



## Who This Is NOT For



? Beginners

? General VA ad assistants with no fashion dropshipping experience

? People looking to “learn media buying”

? Optimisation-only media buyers



This role is execution-heavy.



---



## Compensation



Open to:



* Hourly

* Monthly retainer

* Per-store compensation



Long-term opportunity available as we scale.



---



## How to Apply



Please include:



1. Your past or current experience with Shopify fashion dropshipping stores

2. Number of stores you’ve managed simultaneously

3. Your experience using Incogniton or similar tools

4. Confirmation you understand this is a *high-volume ad launching role*



At the very end of your application, type the word:



*VOGUE*



(If this word is missing, we will assume you did not read the job description.)



---



We are looking for someone experienced, structured, and ready to scale with us.



If that’s you — apply.

title: Video Editor for Engaging Meta Ads | Long-term Role
description:
Are you a skilled video editor with a passion for creating engaging, high-converting content? We’re looking for a Video Editor to join our fast-growing brand and help us craft compelling videos for Meta & TikTok ads. If you have an eye for storytelling, pacing, and the latest trends, this role is for you.



No freelancers! In this role the editor will be fully attached to our company and no other companies.



About the Role

As our Video Editor, you’ll be responsible for:



Editing engaging short-form videos – Cutting, enhancing, and optimizing content for Instagram and
 ads.

Optimizing for performance – Creating videos that capture attention quickly and drive engagement and sales.

Adding dynamic effects – Using transitions, text animations, and sound to make content stand out.

Keeping up with trends – Staying updated on what works in fashion and e-commerce content.

Repurposing existing content – Transforming raw footage, user-generated content, and old clips into fresh edits.

This is a long-term role with growth opportunities. We need someone who understands how to create videos that perform well and align with our brand identity.



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience in video editing – A strong portfolio of short-form videos for social media and ads.

Understanding of social media & ad content – Ability to create high-performing videos for different platforms.

Expert in video editing software – Proficiency in Adobe Premiere, Final Cut, CapCut, or similar tools.

Strong storytelling skills – Ability to structure videos with compelling pacing and flow.

Branding awareness – Ability to align edits with our aesthetic and maintain brand consistency.

Commitment & availability – Must be long-term focused with no other brand commitments.

This is a part-time role with potential for full-time. Fully remote.



Why Join Us?

Be part of a fast-growing international fashion brand.

Work in a creative environment with opportunities to make an impact.

Long-term career growth and stable work.

Competitive pay for valuable tea
mbers.



How to Apply

If this sounds like you, send us:



Your portfolio – Examples of past video edits (Reels, TikTok, ads).

A message with the word ‘pineapple’ in the title so we know you read this post.

title: B2B Content & Authority Lead
description:
B2B Content & Authority Lead

(UK Immigration | Compliance & Sponsor Licence Focus)



Immtell is a UK-based immigration consultancy specialising in:



• Sponsor licence applications 

• Sponsor licence compliance & mock audits 

• Skilled Worker visa strategy 

• UK business expansion support 



We are repositioning the business to focus on: UK corporate immigration, compliance risk, and sponsor licence governance

We are looking for someone to take ownership of our content, positioning, and website, and turn it into a high-authority, lead-generating asset.

________________________________________

The Role



This is a hands-on role.



You will be responsible for improving, restructuring, and creating content that attracts and qualifies corporate clients.

This is not about producing large volumes of content.



It is about producing the right content, aligned with real business outcomes.

________________________________________



Immediate Focus (First 60–90 Days)



You will take the lead on:



• Updating and rewriting core website pages in line with our new positioning 

• Adding structured FAQs and “Key Takeaways” sections to improve clarity and AI visibility 

• Finalising pricing pages and incorporating priceguide.ai 

• Creating key trust and authority pages: 

o Reviews / testimonials 

o Author / credibility pages 

o Policy / ethics / transparency pages 

• Organising existing content into a structured Learning Centre 

• Ensuring all content reflects current guidance and is regularly updated 



You are expected to take ownership of how this is done, not wait for step-by-step instructions.

________________________________________



Ongoing Responsibilities



• Develop and execute a structured content plan 

• Align content with real client questions, objections, and decisions 

• Important: Apply principles from: 

o They Ask, You Answer 

o Endless Customers 

• Support the development of content for additional channels (e.g. YouTube topics and structure) 

• Continuously improve how content supports sales conversations 

________________________________________



Leadership & Ownership



This is not a task-based role.



You are expected to:



• Take ownership of content and positioning 

• Propose improvements and challenge ideas constructively 

• Identify gaps and opportunities 

• Execute independently 



You will work directly with the founder but will not receive daily instructions.

________________________________________



The Type of Person This Suits



You may have experience as:



• Content Marketing Lead (B2B) 

• Inbound Marketing Manager 

• Growth Content Strategist 

• Marketing Manager (Professional Services or SaaS) 



You think in terms of:



• Buyer intent and decision-making 

• Lead quality (not just traffic) 

• Clear, structured communication 

• Commercial outcomes 

________________________________________



Technical Bonus (Not Essential)



Experience working directly with websites is a strong advantage.



This includes:

• Basic HTML/CSS 

• Updating pages within a CMS (we use Siteglide) 

• Improving layout, structure, and readability 

________________________________________



What Success Looks Like



• Clear, compliance-focused positioning across the website 

• Improved quality of enquiries 

• Content actively used in sales conversations 

• A structured, high-authority Learning Centre 

• Reduced low-value enquiries 

________________________________________



Requirements



• Strong written English 

• Experience creating structured, authority-led content 

• Ability to think commercially, not just creatively 

• Comfortable working directly with a founder 

• Ability to execute independently 

________________________________________



Working Arrangement



• Remote (Philippines preferred) 

• Full-time 

• Long-term contractor role 

• $1,800–$2,200 USD per month depending on experience 

• 90-day review period 

________________________________________



To Apply



Please include:



1. How would you improve the quality of enquiries from a professional services website? 

2. What would you prioritise in the first 30 days? 

3. Provide an example of content you would create for a UK immigration compliance or risk-based service.

description:

ABOUT THE ROLE

mbers with tools and technical setups

title: ADS MANAGER (Project-Based / Part-Time)
description:
Job Opportunity: ADS MANAGER (Project-Based / Part-Time)



We’re hiring an Ads Manager who is obsessed with driving ROAS, lowering CPAs, and scaling campaigns efficiently.



This is a project-based role designed for the performance marketing wizard who ensures every dollar spent is maximized across our advertising ecosystem.



If you understand that "creative is the new targeting," then you are our person. You are here to bridge the gap between our ad platforms (Meta/Google), our creatives, and our CRM (GoHighLevel), ensuring that our lead flow is consistent, qualified, and profitable. Your priorities are campaign architecture, aggressive A/B testing, and scaling budgets without sacrificing performance.





IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job listing carefully. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.





ABOUT THE TEAM

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! [youtu.be/smT-w2M_TcQ]





Our Core Values: 



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.







ABOUT YOU 



Do you get a dopamine hit when your campaigns break a 3x ROAS? Do you have a deep understanding of campaign structures, bid caps, and algorithm learning phases? Are you the person who finds the winning creative angle that everyone else missed? Do you take pride in writing scroll-stopping ad copy and split-testing hooks that empower our business to scale with confidence? Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!







PROJECT RESPONSIBILITIES



Phase 1: Account Architecture & Strategy Audit Perform a deep-dive audit of current ad accounts (Meta & Google Ads) to identify wasted spend and missed opportunities. Build out and organize clean campaign structures (CBO/ABO, Search/Performance Max) for testing and scaling. Conduct audience, competitor, and market research to develop fresh creative angles and targeting strategies.



Phase 2: Optimization, Testing & Scaling Launch and manage daily campaigns, closely monitoring key metrics like CTR, CPA, CPC, and ROAS. Execute rigorous A/B tests on creative assets (images/video), ad copy, and headlines to consistently beat control metrics. Scale winning campaigns efficiently without breaking algorithm learning phases or spiking acquisition costs.



Phase 3: Reporting & Creative Direction Provide weekly, data-backed reports that break down performance, highlight insights, and outline strategic next steps. Collaborate with the design/video team to provide feedback and creative direction based on what is actually converting. Monitor lead quality in GoHighLevel to ensure we aren't just driving cheap clicks, but actual qualified prospects.





REQUIREMENTS



Required Experience & Capability EXPERT-level knowledge of Meta Ads Manager and Google Ads. Deep experience with managing daily budgets, scaling campaigns, and navigating algorithm fluctuations. Strong direct-response copywriting skills—you know how to write hooks that grab attention and copy that converts. Familiarity with GoHighLevel to track lead quality and monitor the full funnel from click to close. Experience reading data to make swift, emotionless media buying decisions.

High attention to detail—you hate wasted ad spend and unexplained performance dips. Strong English communication skills to clearly explain strategy and performance to the wider team. A stable, high-speed internet connection (at least 150mbps).





Bonus Skills (Not Required)



Experience with TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads, or YouTube Ads. Familiarity with 3rd-party attribution tools (Hyros, Triple Whale, or SegMetrics). Basic graphic design or video editing skills (Canva, CapCut) for rapid creative iterating.





NOTE: This is a Project-Based / Part-Time role (20 hrs/week). We are looking for a specialist who can execute the initial campaign overhauls and provide ongoing, daily management as we scale.





APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS



STEP 1: Application Please submit your application HERE

To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.



STEP 2: Initial Interview If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.



STEP 3: Case Interview Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 30mins case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world media buying scenario or campaign challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, analytical logic, and how you tackle practical scaling situations in Meta/Google in real-time.



STEP 4: Reference Check This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.



STEP 5: Project Onboarding & Trial If an offer is made and accepted, you will be onboarded as our Ads Manager to execute the initial strategy and campaign setups. This period is dedicated to ensuring a strong mutual fit—both for the technical responsibilities of the role and alignment with our core values—as we evaluate long-term scaling needs.

title: Supply Chain Manager (E-commerce | Full Ownership Role)
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce company operating multiple Shopify dropshipping stores in the US fashion market.



We are looking for a high-level Shopify Supply Chain Manager who can take full ownership of our order flow, supplier communication, and fulfillment operations.



This is a full-time position.

This is NOT a basic VA role.

This is a high-responsibility role where you are expected to take ownership and manage critical parts of the business.



You will be directly responsible for making sure every order is fulfilled correctly, on time, and without issues.



Your Responsibilities



You will manage the full supply chain process from A to Z:



Order & Fulfillment Management

You monitor all Shopify orders daily and ensure no order stays unfulfilled beyond safe timeframes. You track fulfillment progress and identify delays early.



Issue Handling (CRITICAL)

You handle all order issues such as out of stock products, size issues, delays, address problems, RTS orders, and orders stuck in “info received”.

You act fast and prevent issues from turning into refunds or chargebacks.



Supplier Communication

You communicate daily with suppliers, send structured issue lists, and follow up until everything is resolved. You ensure suppliers meet deadlines and expectations.



Refund & Resolution Management

You handle refunds when necessary, but your goal is always to recover value first (store credit, replacements, solutions).

You follow structured processes and keep everything documented.



Inventory & Product Updates

You ensure out-of-stock products are updated correctly and prevent customer confusion on the store.



System & Sheet Management

You work inside structured tracking systems (SCM sheet, refund sheet, supplier tracking).

Accuracy and daily updates are mandatory.



Daily Reporting

At the end of each day, you report what is solved, what is pending, and where risks are.



Who We Are Looking For



You are:

Highly organized

Proactive (you take action without being told)

Detail-oriented

Strong communicator

Solution-driven

Able to work under pressure



You think like an operator and take ownership.



Requirements



Experience with Shopify (REQUIRED)

Experience in e-commerce operations (REQUIRED)

Experience with dropshipping fulfillment (REQUIRED — must be hands-on)

Experience working with suppliers (REQUIRED)

Strong English communication

Ability to follow structured SOPs and systems



Important



This is a full-time role only.

You must be fully available and committed.



You must have real, hands-on experience with dropshipping fulfillment.

We will not consider applicants without this.



We are looking for someone who takes ownership.

Not someone who waits for instructions.

We are building a serious operation and are only looking for people who want to grow long-term.



If you are proactive, structured, and ready to take ownership — apply now.

title: Technical SDR/BDR
description:
Who we are

Son of a Coder is a boutique Swedish Tech consultancy based in Stockholm. We design and deliver enterprise Cloud, Data and AI platforms for companies in Banking, FinTech & HealthTech. Our clients are EU enterprises. Our team is senior. Our work is technical and we need someone who can open the right doors.



The opportunity

This is a full-time remote role. You will work directly with our founder & a senior sales team. Your job is to find the right people, start the right conversations and move deals forward. When you get the right person on a call, the technical side is handled. Your job is to make that call happen.

This is a real sales role with a real base salary and real commission. No vague "performance bonuses." No cap on what you can earn.



Commission: 5-6% on closed deals (scales with volume)

- A single signed contract is typically worth $5,000–$20,000 USD

- No earnings cap



What you will do

Prospect outbound via LinkedIn,
, and phone targeting CTOs, IT Directors, and Heads of Engineering across Nordic, European, UK, and US markets

Qualify inbound leads and book discovery calls

Write and send proposals with support from our sales team

Build outreach sequences, scripts, and templates

Manage and maintain your pipeline in our CRM Sailsy.ai similar to HubSpot

Report weekly on activity: meetings booked, calls made, deals progressed



What we are looking for

- At least 5+ years of B2B outbound sales experience — tech, SaaS, or professional services preferred

- Excellent written and spoken English you will represent a Swedish firm to senior European and US executives

- Comfortable with cold outreach; disciplined, self-directed, and consistent

- Familiar with LinkedIn Sales Navigator, CRM tools, and outbound sequencing

- A genuine curiosity about technology. You don't need to code, but you need to hold a smart conversation about Cloud, Data, and AI



Before you apply

We read every application. We skip the ones that don't answer this:

What is one B2B deal you are proud of closing within Tech, SaaS and how did you do it? Two to four sentences is good.



We measure success by meetings booked and deals closed. If you are a hunter who takes pride in your numbers and wants to earn well doing serious, we want to hear from you.

title: Video Editor IA for Ad Creatives — Full-Time ($$$)
description:
About us

We manage several e-commerce brands on the French and European market. Our small, close-knit team works with trust, positive energy and a constant pursuit of excellence. We are growing fast and looking for someone who wants to evolve with us long-term.

Why this role?

We are looking for a full-time creative who can produce high-performing ad content on a daily basis. Not someone who just follows instructions, but someone who thinks, learns fast and is fully invested in their work.

Your missions

Organic TikTok content: engaging videos, trends, educational content

Static creatives: product visuals, ad images for Meta feed

AI-generated content: Sora, Veo, Kling, Midjourney, Higgsfield or equivalent

Volume: approximately 30 creatives per week

All content is produced in French — fluency in French is essential to understand the tone, hooks and trends of the French-speaking market

Internal communication and briefs in both English and French

Minimum 2 years of experience creating content for social media (Meta/Snapchat) and organic content (TikTok)

Strong portfolio showcasing both video AND static creatives

Proficiency with AI tools (Sora, Veo, Kling, Midjourney)

CapCut, Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

Canva, Photoshop or Figma for static creatives

MANDATORY: Fluent in both French AND English (written and spoken). All ad content is created in French, and team communication happens in both languages daily. This is non-negotiable.



What we value as much as skills



Genuine motivation and interest in e-commerce and content creation

Fast learning ability

Curiosity — you analyze trends on Meta and TikTok and bring new ideas to the table

Autonomy — you don't like being micromanaged

You are efficient and fast — you meet deadlines, every single time

Punctual and reliable — fixed schedule, no exceptions



Working hours

Monday to Saturday. Fixed schedule to be defined together based on your availability.

What we offer



Long-term position — we don't hire for a single project

Salary that grows with your involvement

Performance bonuses based on the results of your creatives

Profit sharing as the brands grow

Career growth: increased responsibilities, team management



How to apply

Incomplete applications will not be considered:



Portfolio: Meta ads, TikTok videos, static creatives and AI-generated content

In one sentence: what makes the first 2 seconds of a Meta ad effective?

Your main editing software

What AI tools do you use and for what purpose?

Why you and not someone else?

Are you available Monday to Saturday on a fixed schedule?

Please answer questions 2 and 5 in French and the rest in English — so we can assess your level in both languages.

title: Influencer Marketing Coordinator Full Time

title: Real Estate Admin VA
description:
Job Summary:



We are hiring a Real Estate Appraisal Virtual Assistant to support a busy residential appraiser with data entry and comparable sales research. The main focus of this role is entering appraisal orders into our software, pulling comps, and managing market data so the appraiser can spend less time in front of the computer. This is a part-time position with potential to grow into a full-time role over time.





Key Responsibilities:

- Enter new appraisal orders into Total appraisal software using AMC and lender documents

- Complete all required client, lender, and property data fields accurately

- Pull comparable sales and land sales for each appraisal assignment

- Conduct market data research using TrueTrack and True Footage

- Organize and manage incoming order documents from AMCs and banks

- Maintain high accuracy across all data entry tasks

- Support general administrative tasks as the role develops

- Flag any missing information or data issues proactively



Mandatory Skills:

- Familiarity with real estate appraisal processes and terminology

- Experience pulling comparable sales and working with market data

- Strong data entry skills with excellent attention to detail

- Experience with appraisal software such as Total or similar platforms

- Comfortable handling documents from AMCs, banks, and lenders

- Self-directed and able to work reliably with minimal supervision

- Good written communication and responsiveness



Preferred Skills:

- Experience with TrueTrack, True Footage, or similar tools

- Familiarity with Spark or other real estate data platforms

- Background in residential or rural real estate support

- Experience working with rural or non-standard property types

- Ability to spot and flag data inconsistencies without being prompted

- General real estate administrative background



Why Join Us:

This role offers stable, ongoing work with a growing residential appraisal practice. You will develop deep knowledge of appraisal support workflows and become a valued part of a small, focused team. If you are detail-driven and looking for a long-term remote position, we would love to hear from you.

title: Creative maker
description:

title: Virtual Customer Experience Officer (Receptionist, Admin + Project Work)
description:
Virtual Receptionist / Administrator

Full-time (20-30hrs/week) | $5-10 AUD/hour | Sydney AEST Hours | Long-Term Role



We are hiring a confident, caring, and detail-oriented Virtual Customer Experience Officer to support two thriving Australian Businesses:



Carte Blanche Hair – a luxury salon delivering exquisite, high-touch experiences for self-expressed clients

Fixio Physiotherapy – a progressive clinic offering intelligent, empathetic care with clinical excellence



We are seeking a Virtual Receptionist / Administrator to become a long-term part of our operations team. This is a key role where you are the front line; the voice, the organiser, and the calm hand that ensures our client journey is flawless. You will support our in-salon and in-clinic teams by keeping bookings smooth, clients, informed, and back-end tasks running efficiently.

It is best suited to someone who values structure, consistency, and professional growth in a stable remote role. It also requires uninterrupted availability during scheduled hours so we prefer applicants with minimal personal obligations during work time.



About the Role



This position combines front-line receptionist duties, administrative support, and light project management. You will be a key point of contact for our clients and an essential support for our internal team. You will be working closely with the business owners and 1–2 other admin tea
mbers in a professional, fast-paced environment.



3 Key Components of the Role



1. Receptionist Duties

You will be responsible for managing two phone lines throughout your shift.

Answering and making calls using DialPad

Booking and managing appointments via Fresha (Salon) and Cliniko (Clinic)

Responding to phone, SMS, and
 enquiries with clarity, warmth, and confidence

Guiding clients toward the correct services and practitioners

Maintaining a calm, professional tone at all times



2. Administration

Inbox and
 management

Calendar coordination and scheduling

Data entry and record management

Strong daily use of Google Workspace

Team communication via Slack, WhatsApp, and Outlook

Handling sensitive client and HR information with discretion and confidentiality

Reporting directly to the business owners



3. Project Management (Ad Hoc)

Supporting operational projects as needed

Creating or improving internal resources

Identifying efficiencies in workflows and systems

Assisting with the creation of policies and procedures

Taking initiative and thinking critically without constant supervision



We are looking for someone who is:



A confident and kind communicator with a clear phone manner

Experienced in reception, admin, or client-facing roles (bonus if in hair/healthcare)

Fluent in English with strong conversational, writing, and spelling skills

Highly competent with Google workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides, Gmail, etc.)

Comfortable learning and navigating systems like Fresha, Cliniko, Cliniqflows, and DialPad

Emotionally Intelligent, organised, and able to multitask

A proactive team player who values both excellence and warmth



Work Requirements



Must be available during Sydney (AEST) Timezone. You will need to be available for ALL of the hours below:

Monday to Friday at 8:00am – 6:00pm AEST

Saturday at 8:00am – 3:00pm AEST

Starting at 20 hours per week (with potential to grow to 30+ hours per week)

Flexibility to cover other shifts when required

Stable internet connection (backup preferred)

Reliable power supply

Professional, quiet work setup

Ability to remain online and responsive throughout the shift



What We Offer



Stable, long-term remote role

Clear expectations and structured workflows

Supportive team environment

Work with premium, established Australian brands

Potential for career growth into a leadership/practice manager role encompassing invoicing, billing, additional project work, and training of other tea
mbers.

Contract & Compensation

Rate: $5-10 AUD/hour (This will depend on experience and proficiency in required skills)

Initial 3-month Trial Contract

Role begins within 1 week with training to start

Long-term role with increasing hours and potential to grow full-time



**Please note that no other work is permitted during rostered hours due to workload. This role requires consistent daily presence and uninterrupted availability during scheduled hours. Please apply only if this aligns with your current lifestyle and work environment.**



How to Apply



All applications must be submitted exclusively via our Google Form. We do not accept applications or CVs through OnlineJobs.ph messages.

To apply:

Carefully read the role description to ensure it aligns with your availability, work environment, and long-term goals

Complete the Google Form in full, providing clear and thoughtful responses

Access the Link Here:

Only applications submitted through the Google Form will be reviewed. Incomplete or rushed responses will not be considered. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage, which may include a trial task.

title: Amazon PPC Manager – E-commerce Growth & ROI Specialist
description:
Role Overview: We are seeking a highly analytical, aggressive, and results-driven Amazon PPC Manager to take full ownership of our Amazon advertising strategy and execution. In this role, you will not just be "managing campaigns"—you will be the driving force behind our profitability, revenue scaling, and market share domination.



We are looking for a strategic expert with a proven, verifiable track record of scaling Amazon brands while lowering Total Advertising Cost of Sales (TACoS) and maximizing Return on Ad Spend (ROAS). If you are a problem-solver who thrives on data, scaling budgets profitably, and measurable outcomes, we want to hear from you.



Key Responsibilities (What You Will Accomplish):



Drive Scalable Revenue Growth: Architect, launch, and aggressively manage full-funnel Amazon advertising campaigns (Sponsored Products, Sponsored Brands, Sponsored Display, and Amazon DSP) to maximize daily sales velocity and net profit.

Relentless Optimization: Continuously audit and optimize bids, search terms, and targeting strategies to achieve aggressive target ACoS and TACoS. You will cut wasted spend with precision negative keywords while scaling winning campaigns.

Keyword & Competitor Domination: Execute deep-dive keyword research and competitor analysis to identify profitable gaps, win top-of-search placements, and aggressively defend our brand share against competitors.

Strategic Campaign Architecture: Build and refine advanced campaign structures (e.g., search term isolation, auto-campaign harvesting, and custom budget allocation based on product life cycles and profitability).

Actionable Reporting & Forecasting: Go beyond basic metrics. Deliver weekly performance insights detailing critical KPIs (Spend, Sales, ROAS, ACoS, TACoS, CTR, CVR) accompanied by proactive action plans and growth forecasts.

Inventory Alignment: Collaborate closely with the inventory team to align ad spend with stock levels—aggressively pushing overstock inventory while throttling or pausing campaigns to avoid stockouts on top-sellers.

A/B Testing & Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO): Continuously test ad copy, custom creative assets, video ads, and storefront traffic to improve Click-Through Rates (CTR) and overall Conversion Rates (CVR).





Required Skills & Qualifications:



Experience: Minimum 3–5 years of hands-on experience independently managing high-volume Amazon PPC budgets ($50k - $100k+/month spend).

Proven Track Record: Tangible history of scaling accounts while maintaining or improving profitability targets. (Note: You will be required to share your best case studies).

Technical Mastery: Deep, up-to-date understanding of the Amazon A9 Ranking Algorithm, Amazon Campaign Manager, Brand Analytics, and advanced targeting features.

Strategic Mindset: Proactive problem-solver who does not wait to be told what to do. You stay ahead of Amazon’s frequent platform updates and terms of service changes.





Performance KPIs (How Your Success Will Be Measured):



Overall Revenue Growth at the brand level.

Strict adherence to benchmark TACoS (Total ACoS) and target ROAS.

Increased organic ranking velocity driven by targeted PPC conversions.

Reduction of wasted ad spend (Zero-sale search term mitigation).





Compensation & Perks:



Pay Rate: HIGHLY NEGOTIABLE. We believe in paying top dollar for top talent. Compensation will be tailored to your experience, direct track record, and the results you can deliver. We are open to a strong base salary, performance-based profit-sharing, or commission structures for the right A-player.



Fully remote work environment with flexible working hours.



Opportunity to lead growth for an ambitious and rapidly expanding brand.



How to Apply: Please submit your resume along with a brief cover letter. With your application, you must include your best case studies detailing your past performance (e.g., how you successfully scaled an account, improved ROAS/ACoS, and the specific strategies you implemented to achieve those results).

title: Virtual Assistant - Data, Outreach & Automation
description:
ABOUT US



We are a growing influencer marketing agency that connects YouTube creators with brand sponsorships in the tech, gaming, and entertainment industry. 



This is not a typical VA role. You will not be doing one repetitive task. Every day looks different. You might run an automation workflow in the morning, audit an
 inbox before lunch, research YouTube creators in the afternoon, update a large dataset, and draft a client
 before end of day.



We are a small team where everyone delivers. We are looking for someone who works hard, is proactive, reliable, resilient, and delivers on time. If that sounds like you, you are welcome to apply.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



This is not a typical VA role. Every day looks different. In a single day, you might:



- Run automation workflows in n8n and Claude Code (30%)

- Manage large-scale databases in Google Sheets (25%)

- Launch and monitor cold
 and sponsorship outreach campaigns (20%)

- Research YouTube creators using AI tools like Claude and Perplexity (15%)

- Communicate with clients, creators, and agencies. Keep files and systems organized (10%)



You will be one of the key people making things happen - not a number at a big company.





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- 3-5 years work experience (this cannot be your first job)

- Advanced Google Sheets (VLOOKUP, IF, pivot tables, data validation)

- Experience with at least one automation tool (n8n, Zapier, or similar)

- Tech savvy - picks up new tools quickly without hand-holding

- Strong written and spoken English

- Handles multiple types of tasks every day without getting overwhelmed

- Extremely organized, diligent, and reliable

- Delivers on time. Communicates before problems become problems.





WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY



- If you have never used any automation tool

- If you prefer doing one type of task all day

- If you are looking for a relaxed, low-pressure role

- If you need to be spoon-fed instructions for everything

- If you struggle with deadlines

- If you are not proactive





WHAT WE OFFER



- ~$500/month, negotiable based on experience

- Work directly with founders on real campaigns with real creators and brands

- Learn n8n, Claude Code, AI tools, and influencer marketing operations

- Growth path to Operations Manager as we scale

- Performance reviews every 3 months



Work setup: 8-10 hrs/day, Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm Dubai time (UTC+4). Fully remote. Time tracking via Toggl. Stable internet (25+ Mbps) and backup power required.





HOW TO APPLY



>>  



Do not use AI to write your answers. We check. AI-written applications are disqualified.

description:
Welcome to Heroka Cosmetics — a fast-growing e-commerce beauty brand scaling aggressively with paid ads on Meta.

Someone who thinks like a marketer, edits like a creative strategist, and produces like a machine.

Edit high-performing video ads for Meta 
 & Instagram)

Create scroll-stopping hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Turn one concept into multiple variations (hooks, angles, formats)

Source and integrate relevant b-roll that enhances the story

Use modern tools and workflows to produce creatives efficiently at scale

Apply captions, motion graphics, and overlays that improve retention

Deliver consistent output of 20+ creatives per week — on time

You Are a Great Fit If You...

Have proven experience editing Meta ad creatives (not just general videos)

Understand why ads convert (hook, retention, pacing, psychology)

Can quickly create multiple variations from one concept

Are highly efficient in your workflow (not just “manual editing”)

Are proficient in CapCut and/or Premiere Pro

Are resourceful and can source your own b-roll

Respect deadlines and communicate proactively

Take ownership, move fast, and don’t need constant direction

?? Important (Read Carefully)



You will be part of a team where your work directly impacts others.



If edits are delayed, it blocks:



The Creative Strategist (who needs to review)

The Media Buyer (who needs to launch ads)



???? This means: meeting deadlines and clear communication are critical.



We value people who:



Deliver on what they promise

Communicate early if something is delayed

Take responsibility for their output



Requirements

Portfolio with Meta ad creatives (mandatory — no portfolio = no review)

Minimum 2+ years experience in e-commerce ad editing

Stable internet + own equipment

Available at least 10 hours per week

A-Player mindset only



Compensation

$10–$20 per video depending on experience, quality, and speed.

Hitrate bonus

Long-term opportunity with room to grow as we scale.



How to Apply



Send us:

Your portfolio (or at least 3 Meta ad creatives you’ve edited)

A short video (60–90 sec) where you explain:

What makes a great hook

How you approach creating multiple variations efficiently



At the top of your application, write: BLUE. Applications that don't start with this word will not be considered, as it shows you have not properly read the application.



We will review your application and reach out via WhatsApp if we see a strong fit.



Applications without the video and portfolio will not be considered.



???? Important Filter

If your workflow relies fully on manual editing without scalable systems, this role is likely not a fit.

title: Customer Service Representative UK - Full Time Job Position
description:
Customer Service Representative



Full-time, remote work. Immediate start. 1-2 people needed for growing team.



***We repost our ad regularly for improved visibility when we have an open position. If you have responded to the work ad once, you do not need to remessage to the latest ad.***



We are an established hardware company looking for Customer Service Representatives to support the growth of our international business. Primary responsibilities include attending to customer queries over
 and WhatsApp instant messages and identifying which products customers should purchase. A successful candidate will be passionate about delivering an enjoyable customer experience, have excellent English written communication skills, very high attention to detail, and the ability to work in an organised manner.



You will not have to voice speak with any customer. All communication will be text-based.



We are looking for people who want to work with us long-term. Consequently, we seek to be a company with a work environment, culture people will also enjoy working with long-term.



Job Responsibilities

- Must be able to work UK work hours Monday to Friday - 8 am until 5 pm and weekend shifts when assigned.

- Other work shift times may be included: Weekend shifts & late UK shifts.

- Daily monitoring of incoming
 & instant messenger customer queries.

- Categorising & labeling customer queries for providing timely & accurate responses.

- Attending customer queries by helping them identify which specific products they should purchase.

- Dialoging with customers and requesting additional information from customers when necessary to help with the product identification process.

- Providing customers with an overall excellent customer experience in regards to timeliness of responses, quality of communication, and the accuracy of purchase advice given.

- Flagging and escalating difficult queries for experienced tea
mbers to follow up.

- Please respond to this job application with 'REF:
in your title so we know that you've read it thoroughly (make sure the reference is in the title itself, not just in the message content).



Experience & Skills

- Excellent verbal and written English communication skills.

- Minimum 3-4 years of experience in a customer service role with a track record of providing customers with excellent service.

- Very high attention to detail and interest in learning technical products as well as able to spot even small differences between similar hardware products.

- Highly customer service oriented, positive and pleasant personal disposition.

- Highly organised, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects and tasks.

- Self-starter who is able to identify, scope, and manage projects from end to end.

- Team player willing and interested in helping other tea
mbers.



Benefits

- Full-time work

- Fully remote work

- Paid annual time off (4 weeks / 20 days)

- 13-month pay bonus when customer service targets are met

- Monthly bonus available: Tea
mbers who have graduated to working independently automatically qualify for a monthly bonus (usually takes about 3-6 months to reach this level)

- Experienced senior tea
mbers able to work independently can be offered flexible working hours or part-time work opportunities.

- Growing CSR team offers career progression and salary increase opportunities through senior tea
mber and training roles.



Hiring process

- 2-3 product identification assignments and a video interview

title: Senior Funding Advisor / High-Ticket Closer (Business Credit & 0% APR Funding)
description:
Job Overview:



We are a fast-growing business funding company helping entrepreneurs secure $20K–$150K+ in 0% interest business credit through strategic credit card stacking.



We’re looking for experienced Senior Funding Advisors / Closers who can confidently handle qualified inbound leads, educate prospects, and close high-ticket deals ($3K–$10K+ fees).



If you understand credit, can control a sales conversation, and know how to close without sounding salesy, this role is for you.



What You'll Be Doing:

Taking pre-qualified inbound calls (no cold calling)

Analyzing client situations (credit profile, business age, funding goals)

Educating prospects on how 0% APR business credit funding works

Handling objections and guiding prospects toward the best funding strategy

Closing clients into our done-with-you funding program

Updating CRM and maintaining clean pipeline management

Working closely with fulfillment team for smooth onboarding



What You Must Understand:



This is NOT traditional lending.



We help clients access funding via:



Business credit cards (not loans)

0% interest for 9–12+ months

Approval based heavily on:

Personal credit profile

Business age



You should be comfortable explaining concepts like:



Credit utilization

Authorized users (AU)

Inquiry management

Funding tiers ($20K ? $100K+ scaling)



Ideal Candidate:

Proven experience as a Closer / Funding Advisor / Credit Consultant



Strong understanding of:

Business credit

Personal credit optimization

High-ticket sales ($2K+ deals)



Fluent in English (neutral or American accent preferred)

Ability to build trust quickly and control the call

Not order-taking — we need someone who can lead the conversation

???? Compensation:

$1500/mo base for the first 90 days and then $2000

Bonus on Performance

10 Closes = $100

20 Closes = $250

35 Closes = $400



???? Why Join Us:

Warm inbound leads (no chasing)

Proven offer with strong demand

Clear SOPs + training on our funding process

Opportunity to grow into Team Lead / Sales Manager

Work with a team that understands systems, scale, and performance

?? Important:



This is a performance-driven role.



If you’re someone who:



Needs micromanagement

Struggles with objection handling

Or has only done low-ticket sales



This is NOT a fit.



???? To Apply:



Reply with:



Your experience in funding / credit / high-ticket closing



Your average deal size closed



A short voice note or Loom explaining how you’d handle this:



Prospect has 720 credit score but high utilization and is hesitant to pay upfront



???? Bonus Points If You:

Have worked in business funding / credit repair / MCA / credit stacking

Understand how to position funding as leverage, not debt

pany page

We are hiring a Fulfillment Coordinator to manage the backend execution of approved deals. This role is client-facing and focuses on onboarding, coordination, and oversight—not heavy technical work.
