Monitor deal progress and ensure timely submission + follow-ups

Maintain accurate records in CRM and internal systems

Handle sensitive client data (SSN, DOB, financial details) with professionalism and discretion



? Requirements

MUST HAVE:

Experience working with U.S. credit systems (credit repair, funding, tradelines, lending, etc.)

Strong understanding of:

Personal credit profiles

Business funding / credit stacking (preferred)

Bank & lender application processes

Excellent spoken and written English (client-facing role)

Comfortable discussing financial and sensitive information with U.S. clients

Organized, responsive, and able to manage multiple clients simultaneously

NICE TO HAVE:

Experience in credit stacking or business funding companies

Familiarity with CRMs (HubSpot, GoHighLevel, etc.)

Experience working with offshore teams



???? Role Structure

Part-Time (20–25 hours/week)

Fully remote

U.S. business hours (EST availability required)

High deal volume environment (consistent pipeline, no lead shortage)



???? Compensation

We offer a lean base + performance structure aligned with company revenue:

Base: $2000/month (part-time)

Performance bonus:

$50–$100 per successfully funded client

title: Video Editor
description:
Dear,



For our fast-growing e-commerce brand, we are on track to hit 8 figures this year. Therefore, we are looking for a highly skilled Video Editor with proven experience creating high-converting video ad creatives for e-commerce brands to become a core part of our creatives team.



We are not looking for beginner editors or basic freelancers. We are looking for someone who understands performance marketing, direct response advertising, and how to create video ads that actually generate revenue through paid advertising.



You must understand what makes video advertisements perform well and be extremely creative, detail-oriented, and efficient when producing video creatives.



To prove you have read this carefully, please apply with the word cranberry before you introduce yourself.



Read on to find out what tasks we expect you to perform, as well as the experience we require for this job.



Please answer the following questions if you are interested:



Do you have experience creating video ad creatives for e-commerce brands?



Have you previously worked with 6–7 figure Shopify brands?



Please include 3–5 video ads you created that were used in paid advertising campaigns.



If available, can you share performance metrics such as CTR, CPA, or ROAS for the ads you created?



Which software do you primarily use for editing (Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut, etc.)?



What do you believe makes a video ad perform well in paid advertising?



Are you comfortable creating multiple video variations quickly for testing and scaling campaigns?



Are you available full-time, 6–7 days a week, and responsive during business hours?



As a Video Editor you must have:



Strong experience creating video ad creatives for e-commerce brands (Must)



High-level proficiency in video editing software such as Premiere Pro, After Effects, or equivalent (Must)



Deep understanding of direct response advertising and performance creatives (Must)



Ability to create high-converting video ads for paid advertising campaigns (Must)



Strong understanding of hooks, pacing, retention, and storytelling for short-form content (Must)



Ability to edit engaging ads using subtitles, sound effects, transitions, and visual effects (Must)



Ability to produce multiple ad variations quickly for testing and scaling campaigns (Must)



Highly responsive and professional communication (Must)



Prior experience working with 6–7 figure brands or marketing agencies (Pre)



If you do not meet the requirements, please do not apply. (thank you)



Your duties will be:



Creating high-converting video ad creatives for platforms such as
 and Instagram



Editing performance-focused video ads using provided raw footage and briefs



Producing multiple video variations for testing and scaling advertising campaigns



Implementing strong hooks, fast-paced edits, subtitles, and engaging visual elements



Following creative briefs and brand guidelines provided by the marketing team



Collaborating with the team to develop new creative angles and advertising concepts



Maintaining organized project files and editing workflows



Delivering creatives quickly and consistently to support advertising campaigns



Ensuring all creatives meet brand standards and performance goals



FULL SOPs AND CREATIVE REFERENCES PROVIDED



PAID CREATIVE TEST REQUIRED FOR SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES



ROOM TO GROW INTO A SENIOR CREATIVE ROLE



FAST-PACED TEAM BUILDING AN 8-FIGURE BRAND



If you believe you are the right fit for this role and can create world-class video ad creatives that drive real revenue, please respond to this post.



Best regards,

Romeo

title: Senior Google Ads Expert Needed for DIY Home Improvement E-Commerce Brand
description:
Job Title:

Senior Google Ads Expert Needed for DIY Home Improvement E-Commerce Brand



Job Description:

We are looking for a true senior-level Google Ads expert to join us on a gig basis.



This is for an e-commerce brand in the DIY home improvement space, and we need someone who really knows Google Ads inside and out. We already have experience in this area ourselves and also have a team of experts, but we are looking to add another highly skilled person who can bring strong strategy, strong execution, and real value to the team.



This is not a beginner or intermediate position.

Please do not apply unless you have at least 5+ years of hands-on Google Ads experience and consider yourself a true expert.



We need someone who is highly experienced with:



Google Search Ads

keyword research

campaign setup

ad copy creation

conversion-focused strategy

targeting

optimization

scaling

troubleshooting

improving ROAS

reducing wasted ad spend

helping e-commerce brands grow through Google Ads



You should know how to build campaigns correctly from the ground up, create compelling ad copy, improve performance over time, and help guide strategy at a high level.



This role will begin on a gig basis at $12 to $15 USD per hour and will involve Zoom calls, screen-sharing sessions, and working directly with our team in real time. This will usually be an hour here and there as needed for setup, strategy, review, troubleshooting, and optimization.



Many of our tea
mbers started with us this same way on a gig basis, and over time it turned into something much more steady and long-term. For the right person, this can absolutely grow into a longer-term opportunity and become a strong source of supplemental income.



What we need help with:



Setting up and managing Google Ads campaigns properly

Keyword research and campaign structure

Writing compelling ad copy that gets attention and drives results

Improving targeting and reducing wasted spend

Helping increase traffic, conversions, and sales

Reviewing landing page alignment and campaign performance

Troubleshooting weak spots and identifying opportunities

Consulting with our team on strategy and next steps

Joining Zoom calls and screen-sharing sessions to work side by side in real time

Helping us build and improve the Google Ads side of the business over time



Important:

We are looking for someone who is:



senior-level

highly experienced

strategic

confident

able to guide the process

able to contribute at a high level from the start



We are not looking for someone who is just familiar with Google Ads.

We are looking for someone who truly knows their way around the platform and can help us build this the right way.



Our brand:

We are building and promoting an e-commerce brand in the DIY home improvement space. More details will be shared during the interview process with qualified candidates.



Pay:

$12 to $15 USD per hour

Gig basis to start



To Apply:

Please reply with:



Your years of Google Ads experience

Your experience with e-commerce brands

Why you consider yourself a true expert

Examples of similar work you have done

Your resume, portfolio, or case studies if available

Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role

Your desired hourly rate in U.S. dollars



Again, please do not apply unless you are truly advanced or expert-level. We are looking for someone seasoned who really knows their stuff and can help us build this the right way.



God bless,

Eric B.

title: Legal Accounts Officer (Trust & Accounts Payable)
description:
About the Role



As the Accounts Officer, you will play a critical role in supporting the financial operations of our client’s growing firm. Working closely with the Finance Manager, you will manage day-to-day accounts payable activities, ensure accurate financial processing, and maintain the integrity of our financial records.



This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, enjoys working with numbers, and has experience in Australian law firm accounting. You will be the primary point of contact for accounts payable inquiries, manage transactional processing, and support month-end and audit-related tasks.



If you thrive in a structured environment, demonstrate strong problem-solving skills, and take pride in delivering accurate, high-quality work, we’d love to meet you!





Key Responsibilities

Accounts Payable Management:



Process all supplier invoices for general business expenses.

Manage and process matter-related EFT payment requests for both the office account and trust account.

Monitor, manage, and action all
s in the Accounts Payable shared inbox.

Act as the main contact for internal and external queries related to accounts payable.

Financial Processing & Reconciliation:



Code disbursements and trust transactions in the practice management system.

Complete daily bank reconciliations for payable and trust transactions.

Reconcile credit card expenses, including follow-ups with employees for receipt and expense verification.

Month-End & Audit Support



Assist with month-end accounts processes, including trust reporting.

Support audit requirements, variance analysis, and documentation preparation.

Contribute to timely completion of assigned month-end tasks.

General Finance Support:



Attend to finance-related queries from employees and clients in a timely manner.

Provide support to the Finance Manager on ad hoc tasks as required.

Maintain accurate financial records and contribute to continuous process improvement.



Other Responsibilities



Assist with audit preparation and documentation.

Ensure compliance with internal financial procedures and relevant regulations.

Contribute to a positive and collaborative team environment.

Take initiative in identifying efficiency improvements in finance workflows.



About You



Strong attention to detail with high standards for accuracy.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

Highly organized with good time management and the ability to work autonomously.

Experience in an Australian law firm (required)

A positive attitude, willingness to learn, and a proactive approach.

Comfortable liaising with internal teams, clients, and external stakeholders.

Intermediate proficiency in Excel and the Microsoft Office suite (required).

Experience using Xero and legal practice management software (required).

Minimum of 5 years’ experience in a similar accounts or bookkeeping role within an Australian law firm (required).

A university degree is preferred but not essential.

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat!
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: E-commerce Operations Controller & Sourcing Manager (Bilingual EN/FR)
description:
About us



We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand in the beauty and personal care industry. We operate two online stores (France and Germany) processing 100 to 150 orders per day. We work with sourcing agents in China and are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented right-hand person to manage our sourcing operations and financial tracking on a part-time basis.



The role



You will be added directly to our WhatsApp group chats with our sourcing agents in China. You will be the person making sure everything adds up — every invoice, every cost, every payment. You will communicate in English with our agents and in French with our internal team and management. Both languages are used daily — this is non-negotiable.



Your missions



Sourcing & agent management:



Communicate daily in English with our sourcing agents in China via WhatsApp

Negotiate product prices, packaging, shipping costs and terms (MOQ, lead times)

Track stock orders, shipments and delivery timelines

Manage factory relationships (samples, certifications, custom packaging)

Translate and relay key information between the agents (English) and internal team (French)



Financial audit & cost control:



Verify every invoice from our agents daily (product costs, shipping fees, remote area fees, etc.)

Cross-check invoices against actual orders to detect discrepancies or overcharges

Audit all our monthly subscriptions and paid tools to maintain full cost traceability

Monitor balances and ongoing payments



Dashboards & profitability tracking:



Build and maintain Excel / Google Sheets dashboards tracking profitability per product and per store

Create COGS calculators including all costs (product, shipping, packaging, customs, tools)

Produce regular financial performance reports

Centralize all expenses (agents, tools, subscriptions, advertising) into one master tracking sheet



Requirements



MANDATORY: Fluent in both English AND French (written and spoken). You will use English daily with Chinese agents and French daily with our internal team. This is a strict requirement.

Advanced Excel / Google Sheets skills (formulas, pivot tables, automations)

Extremely detail-oriented and rigorous with numbers

Self-starter — you don't wait to be told what to do

E-commerce, dropshipping, sourcing or logistics experience is a big plus

Familiarity with terms like COGS, MOQ, 3PL, fulfillment, gross/net margin



What we offer



A key role in a fast-growing brand

Direct collaboration with the founder

Long-term position — we are looking for someone who wants to grow with us

Remote work

Part-time to start, with potential to evolve into full-time as the business scales



How to apply



Send your CV and a short message explaining why this role is right for you. Please include a few sentences in both English and French so we can assess your level in both languages. If you have an example of a tracking sheet or calculator you have built, attach it — it's a huge plus.

title: Thumbnail Designer
description:
They would be **direct-impact thumbnails with instant readability**, built around these key elements:



* ???? **Very high-contrast colors** (red, yellow, black, and white).

* ???? **Huge, bold text**, very few words, clear message (“BREAKING”, “THE END”, etc.).

* ???? **One dominant face in close-up** with a serious or dramatic expression.

* ???? **Arrows or circles** to guide attention to a specific focal point.

* ???? **A secondary contextual image** (military scene, relevant background) to reinforce the topic.

* ???? Designed to be understood on mobile in under 2 seconds.

* ? No unnecessary elements or excessive text.



In short: **one strong face + one powerful scene + 3–6 giant words + aggressive contrast**. Simple, direct, and built for immediate clicks.



2-3 thumbnails per day.

title: Social Media Shopper for Luxury Watches
description:
Applications that do not include all required items in the “How to Apply” section will not be reviewed. We value attention to detail and the ability to follow instructions—key traits for this role. If any part of this application is incomplete or missing, your submission will be automatically disregarded.?



Browse. Discover. Hunt for hidden watch deals.

(No set hours. Total freedom. Serious fun.)



Do you love scrolling through social media and online marketplaces?

Are you obsessed with finding rare gems and scoring amazing deals?

Do you think watches are fascinating — or just plain beautiful?



If you just shouted “YES!”, this might be your dream gig.



About us:



Majestix Collection is a premier destination for buying, selling, and trading luxury timepieces. We curate an exceptional selection of watches for collectors around the world, driven by a commitment to authenticity, transparency, and unparalleled client service. Our main headquarters is located in Garden Grove, California.



What You’ll Do

Scan
 groups, marketplaces, Instagram, and other online platforms for watch listings.

Identify undervalued or rare timepieces (don’t worry — I’ll train you to spot them).

Enter potential deals into a Google Sheet with a built-in calculator to evaluate value.

Help grow our collection of rare, desirable watches.



Why You’ll Love This

Total freedom — work anytime, anywhere. No fixed hours.

Paid to scroll — get paid to do what you already love on your phone or laptop.

Hands-on mentorship — learn directly fro
 how to spot high-value deals and develop an investor’s eye.

Niche, valuable skills — gain knowledge about watches, deal analysis, and market trends.

Fun & flexible — perfect for curious minds, treasure hunters, and explorers.



You’re a Great Fit If You:

Love browsing online for interesting items.

Have a sharp eye for detail and enjoy comparing deals.

Are curious about watches and eager to learn more.

Are independent, self-motivated, and reliable.



Bonus: You already follow watch pages, groups, or forums.





To apply, send the following:



1. Your DISC test - Take it here - 
 - Please send a link to your results.

2. Your personality test - Take it here - 
 - Please send a link to your results.

3. Your updated resume, showcasing your most relevant experience.

4. Typing Test - Take this typing test (30 seconds):

• Support the growth of organic engagement around new releases and content

Since 2013, Prodigy Media has built more than brands — we've created an Amazon-native empire. With 12 years of proven success and 28+ product lines under our belt, we don't play small. Our mission? Launch culturally resonant, design-led, emotionally sticky products that dominate Amazon and beyond.



Now, we're leveling up — and we want a design assassin who’s mastered AI workflows, commands Midjourney like a wizard, and turns prompts into visual gold.



WHO WE WANT



This is not your average graphic design role. We're looking for a hybrid Creative Director / Prompt Engineer / Graphic Design savant who can:



Think like a marketer. Design like an artist. Prompt like an AI god.



You’ll own the visual storytelling for our brands, using both traditional tools and bleeding-edge AI systems to pump out Amazon-optimized assets that convert.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



Craft Ultra-High-Converting Amazon Ads – static, lifestyle, 
-tier, and scroll-stopping. Own A+ Content Design – full module execution with story arcs that build obsession. Design Labels & Packaging – pixel-perfect, regulatory-ready, and unforgettable on the shelf. Prompt, Edit & Produce AI-Generated Visuals – using tools like Midjourney, DALL•E, Runway, Spline, Veo3, Sora, and others. Run 3D Product Renders – via Blender, KeyShot, or AI-powered 3D tools. Develop Scroll-Hook Videos – using After Effects, Premiere, Runway AI, etc.



Systematize Brand Visuals Across 30+ Products – while keeping it all aligned, emotional, and conversion-focused.



WHO YOU ARE



5+ years in design, at least 2+ years in Amazon/e-commerce brand creative

Fluent in Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, Blender, After Effects

Pro-level Midjourney / AI prompt engineer – this is non-negotiable

Obsessed with Amazon visual psychology, packaging psychology, and design that sells

Able to juggle 10 brands and still hit deadlines

Operate with a Creative Director mindset — not just execution, but strategy

Bonus: Experience creating creative systems, art direction templates, or leading a team



MUST-HAVES

Portfolio with Amazon ads, A+ pages, labels, 3D renders, videos, and AI-gen examples

Real-world use of AI tools integrated into your workflow

Available Mon-Fri 7:00am–3:30pm PST

title: Eligibility and Benefits Specialist
description:
1. Insurance Verification and Benefit Explanation:

• Call insurance companies to verify patient benefits and eligibility.

• Complete the Insurance Verification Form (IVF) for each patient annually and ensure its accuracy 

• Clearly convey benefit information to clients, answering their inquiries and addressing concerns.

2. Billing and Claims Management:

• Post insurance payments accurately and in a timely manner into the EHR.

• Follow up on denied claims, appealing and resubmitting as necessary.

• Maintain comprehensive knowledge of coding standards and ensure accurate coding on all claims submitted from the practice.

• Collaborate with providers and staff to resolve billing-related issues and ensure compliance with insurance requirements.

3. Administrative Tasks:

• Assist with basic administrative tasks, including answering patient inquiries about balances owed.

• Work closely with the HR manager to support credentialing efforts for new providers.

• Participate in contract negotiations with the CEO and various insurance panels.

• Collaborate on requesting periodic raises from insurance payors.

• Attend all staff meetings to stay updated on practice-related matters.

4. Communication and Documentation:

• Respond to all
s within a 48-hour timeframe on business days.

• Generate patient statements once a month (1st of each month) to ensure timely billing. (This is now done automatically with our new EHR system.)

5. Integration and Technology:

• Have familiarity with Office Ally clearinghouse and understand its integration with the practice’s EHR system.

• Utilize electronic billing and coding software effectively, ensuring accurate and efficient processing.

Requirements:

• Minimum of 3 years of experience in medical billing and coding, preferably in a mental health or integrative healthcare setting.

• Thorough knowledge of the HCFA form and coding systems.

• Proficiency in using a clearinghouse and other relevant billing software.

• Strong understanding of insurance verification processes and benefit explanation to clients.

• Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in claims management and documentation.

• Strong organizational and time management skills.

• Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a team environment.

• Effective communication skills to interact with insurance companies, providers, and clients.

• Availability to work three days a week, with flexible hours divided as per preference.

Preferred Qualifications:

• Certification in Medical Billing and Coding.

• Familiarity with IntakeQ system and their integration with Office Ally.

• Prior experience with insurance negotiations and contact management.

• Knowledge of credentialing processes for healthcare providers.



Note: This job description is intended to outline the general responsibilities and qualifications for the Eligibility and Benefits Specialist position. It is not an exhaustive list of all duties and expectations. The responsibilities and requirements may evolve as the practice grows and additional providers are hired.

title: Sales representative
description:
Sales Representative Test Task – MKB Media Solutions

Welcome,

This test is designed to assess your ability to initiate conversations and generate leads for MKB Media Solutions.

As a Sales Representative, your role will be to connect with potential clients and open the door for new business opportunities through effective outreach.

The Goal

At MKB Media Solutions, we help businesses improve their online presence and attract more customers through media mentions.

Your responsibility will be to reach out to potential clients, start meaningful conversations, and create interest in our services.

The Test

Instructions:

Please complete the following two tasks. Keep your responses clear, concise, and natural. We are looking for messages that feel human and effective, not overly scripted.

Cold Outreach (DM)

Write a short cold DM to a business owner (e-commerce brand) introducing our services.

Your goal is to start a conversation, not a hard pitch, personalize the message, and spark curiosity and interest.

Warm Outreach (Referral Message)

Write a message you would send to a friend, acquaintance, or connection asking for referrals.

Your goal is to keep it low-pressure, make it easy for them to help, and sound natural and genuine.

Evaluation Criteria

Your responses will be evaluated based on relevance, clarity, effectiveness, tone and style, and creativity.

We are looking for messages that fit the situation, are easy to understand, and would realistically get a response. Your tone should feel human, confident, and professional while still standing out.

Additional Information

You may use AI tools, but your final answers should feel authentic and personal. Keep responses short and to the point, and focus on real-world effectiveness.

Deadline

April 14, 2026.

Submission

Please submit your responses to both tasks along with your CV.



Good Luck!!

title: Spiritual Content VA
description:
Repurpose 200+ hours of audio into short videos & manage sales funnel



Must have:



- Experience with Notebook LM (or similar AI repurposing tool) to turn long audio into 60?second clips with hooks.



- Manual video editing (e.g., CapCut, Descript, Adobe Premiere Rush, or TikTok’s built?in editor). You will receive timestamps from Notebook LM; you must cut the original audio/video accordingly.



- Ability to add simple text overlays (CTA) and export as 60?second MP4 for TikTok and YouTube Shorts.



- Ability to post daily on TikTok and YouTube Shorts (scheduling tools like Later or Buffer are fine).



- Familiarity with Google Drive (shared folders, organised file management).



- Basic HubSpot (free version) – can create landing pages and simple
 sequences.



- English fluency, reliable communicator, interested in personal development / spirituality.



Note: Notebook LM will generate the timestamps and hooks. You will do the actual cutting and posting. No advanced editing skills needed – just basic trimming and overlay text.



Optional but nice: experience with Gumroad, Canva (for simple captions/overlays), and community management (WhatsApp/Telegram group).



Compensation: Hourly for first month (setup). Thereafter, base hourly + A$19 commission per Personal Alchemy sale (A$111 product). This incentivises quality repurposing – more views = more sales.



To apply: Send a short Loom video showing one example of repurposed content (any niche) + your understanding of the funnel: free PDF ? $2.99 trial ? $47/month ? $111.



You don’t need to build the funnel – just follow the existing plan: post clips with the CTA, ensure the link works, and track basic metrics (views, clicks).

title: Financial Accountant - AU Company
description:
Who is Bare?

Bare is the new way to funeral. We are a holistic end of life care provider, allowing our families to grieve in their own way, at their own pace, knowing their loved one is cared for by a team who truly understand their needs.



By combining empathy with technology, we’re creating end-of-life experiences that are simple, personalized and affordable. In only five years, we’ve served more than 30,000 families, have become Australia’s most awarded end-of-life provider (with awards in customer service, innovation and digital disruption), and have built a team of more than 100 people committed to changing the way Australians deal with end-of-life. And we’re just getting started.



We’re looking for a passionate and detail-oriented Financial Accountant to join our high-performing remote team. If you're a proactive finance professional who thrives on ownership, continuous improvement, and meaningful work, we’d love to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing

As our Financial Accountant, you’ll be a key player in ensuring accurate, insightful, and timely financial reporting. You’ll collaborate across teams, drive process improvement, and uphold the financial integrity of our mission.



Key Responsibilities:

-Own the Month-End Close

Lead all aspects of EOM: journal entries, reconciliations, accruals, and financial statement prep.

-Deliver Insightful Reporting

Produce monthly and quarterly management reports, including variance and trend analysis.

-Ensure Regulatory Compliance

Prepare BAS, IAS, and statutory filings, ensuring alignment with AASB and tax standards.

-Champion Continuous Improvement

Streamline workflows, introduce automation, and enhance internal controls.

-Collaborate Cross-Functionally

Partner with Marketing, Operations, and other non-finance teams to align on budget and strategy.

-Support Strategic Projects

Get involved in cost analysis, ERP upgrades, and special projects that shape our financial future.



Why Join Bare?

Make a Meaningful Impact: Your work directly supports families during one of the most vulnerable times of their lives.

Remote-First Flexibility: Work from anywhere in Australia with the tools and autonomy to succeed.

Mission-Driven Culture: Join a team that leads with empathy and integrity—where your voice matters.

Growth & Innovation: Help shape scalable systems in a business that's growing fast and disrupting the norm.



About You

You’re not just technically sharp, you bring heart and high standards to everything you do. You thrive in fast-paced environments and care about doing work that matters.



Must-Haves:

-Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or similar.

-CPA/CA qualification (or in-progress).

-2–3+ years' experience in financial accounting, ideally in service-led sectors.

-Familiarity with Australian accounting standards, BAS/IAS, and financial reporting.

-Understanding of various accounting standards relevant to Bare and consolidations of many entities.

-Attention to detail and excellent reconciliation skills

-Strong ERP (MYOB, Xero, SAP) and Excel skills.

-Strong Excel/Sheets skills and automation of manual processes in your mindset-DNA



Nice-to-Haves:

• Experience in mission-driven sectors (healthcare, aged care, funeral services).

• Adaptability in high-growth or high-volume environments.

• Resilient, working with little or no supervision.

• Experience of managing international teams, interaction with multi-entity organizations, and experience within companies with a minimum annual revenue of $50 million.

• Handle ambiguity, competing priorities, and strict deadlines. Create and implement scalable processes, including training. Integrate AI and automation.



Core Values We Look For

• Empathy: You care deeply about people—colleagues and customers alike.

• Accountability: You take ownership and deliver results with pride.

• Clarity: You communicate financial information in a clear, human way.

• Curiosity: You’re always looking for a better way and love solving problems.



Perks & Benefits

-Fully remote work setup with flexible hours

-Purpose-driven work with real human impact

-Growth and learning opportunities in a scale-up environment

-Supportive, inclusive team culture



Please include your resume when submitting your application. Thank you!

title: STR Support
description:
Remote STR Support (AU Short-Term Rentals)

Philippines-based | Full-time | AEST-aligned



Join One of Australia’s Largest Short-Term Rental Businesses



This is a rare long-term opportunity to work directly with one of Australia’s most established short-term rental operators — supporting a growing portfolio of up to 800 properties across NSW.



Staff Connect Australia is building a high-performing offshore team, and we’re looking for a proactive, detail-driven Property Operations Coordinator to become one of our foundational hires. If you’re sharp, confident on calls, and love problem-solving in a fast-paced environment, this role has serious growth potential.



You’ll be right at the heart of daily operations — handling bookings, guest and owner communications, issue resolution, and admin support — with exposure to every part of Australian short-term rental management.



What You’ll Be Doing



This is a hands-on, dynamic role. Your responsibilities will include:

- Guest & Owner Support

- Handle inbound and outbound calls with guests and property owners via Aircall

- Respond to enquiries and issues via Airbnb, 
, direct bookings

- Resolve problems efficiently and follow through to completion





Operations & Coordination

- Monitor bookings, availability, and calendars using Homhero, RMS, and other systems

- Coordinate cleaning schedules and ensure properties are guest-ready

- Assign and follow up maintenance tasks with trades or contractors

- Track cleans, maintenance, guest issues, and owner communications



Admin, Reporting & Growth

- Manage booking calendars, pricing, and blackout dates

- Assist with onboarding new properties and system setup

- Support compliance documentation (smoke alarms, council registration, etc.)

- Prepare weekly/monthly reports using spreadsheets or dashboards

- Help draft and improve SOPs, internal docs, and guest manuals

- Identify workflow gaps and suggest smarter processes or automations



As the business grows, your role will grow with it — including pricing, owner reporting, SOP ownership, and broader operational oversight.



Who We’re Looking For



You’re someone who:

- Is confident on the phone and professional with both guests and property owners

- Thrives in fast-paced, customer-facing environments

- Is organised, proactive, and solutions-focused

- Can juggle multiple tools and tasks without being micromanaged

- Takes ownership and actually cares about doing things properly



Skills & Experience



Required:

- Excellent spoken & written English

- Stable internet connection

- Confident handling phone calls

- Experience (or fast learning ability) with Aircall, Homhero

- Familiarity with Airbnb, 
, and direct booking sites

- Strong organisational & multitasking skills

- Proficient in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook)



Preferred (but not mandatory)



- 2+ years in short-term rentals, property management, or admin support

- Experience working with Australian clients

- Exposure to cleaning teams or remote contractors



We’re open to candidates with less experience if you show initiative, strong communication skills, and the right mindset.



Tools You’ll Use

Core Systems:

- Homhero, RMS, Breezeway, Orana

- Comms & Support:

- Aircall, Slack, Zoom, MS Teams, Google Meet, WhatsApp

- Automation & Docs:

- ChatGPT, Zapier, Google Docs, Canva, Microsoft Office, WordPress



Bonus Tools:

- PriceLabs or other pricing platforms





What You’ll Get:



- Full-time role – 40 hrs/week (AEST-aligned)

- Structured roster – 7-day operation with rotating shifts

- You’ll work one or both weekend days

- Always two consecutive days off each week

- Paid training & onboarding

- Direct mentorship from leadership

- Long-term career growth in a scaling business

- Exposure to end-to-end Australian STR operations



A role where initiative, ownership, and ideas are genuinely valued

To apply, please submit the following:



A link to your updated resume (PDF format only).



A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) made specifically for this job post. Tell us about your experience in content creation, why you thrive working autonomously, and why you’re the right fit for this high-level role.



A portfolio or links to internal documents, SOPs, or multimedia content (videos/graphics) you have designed.



A brief cover letter that includes your expected salary.



Note: Generic or pre-recorded videos will not be accepted. Incomplete applications will NOT be considered.



The Role:

We are a busy, Australian-based window blinds manufacturing company seeking a high-level Executive Virtual Assistant to support our Directors. This isn't just an admin role; we need a creative "right hand" who can take a concept and run with it. If you have a sharp eye for design, a talent for creating professional internal content, and the ability to work with zero hand-holding, we want to meet you.



What You’ll Be Doing:



Multimedia Content Creation: Designing and producing high-quality internal documents, training resources, and visual assets that "look the part."



Executive Support: Managing traditional VA tasks for two busy directors with efficiency and discretion.



Research & Initiative: Sourcing tools, information, or assets independently. You are expected to find solutions before asking for guidance.



Documentation: Building and refining SOPs and internal guides to a professional, boardroom-ready standard.



Outcome Management: Taking full ownership of projects from brief to completion, ensuring high-quality delivery every time.



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:



Exceptional Autonomy: You are a self-starter who knows "what looks good" and can deliver polished work without constant feedback loops.



Multimedia Savvy: Strong skills in tools like Canva, Adobe Suite, or similar video/graphic software.



Advanced Communication: Impeccable written and verbal English—able to communicate clearly with Australian leadership.



Attention to Detail: You have high standards for your own work and rarely need a second set of eyes to catch mistakes.



Proactive Mindset: You don't just wait for instructions; you anticipate needs and research the "how-to" yourself.



Experience: Proven track record in executive assistance and creative content/document production.



If you’re a professional who takes pride in high-level execution and wants to join a supportive, fast-paced international team, we’d love to see what you can do!

title: Executive Operations & Investor Support Manager
description:
Executive Operations & Investor Support Manager (Full-time, Remote – Asia Timezone)



We are looking for a highly capable, proactive, and detail-oriented professional to join our team as an Executive Operations & Investor Support Manager.



This is not a standard assistant role. You will work directly alongside the founder and act as a right hand in daily operations, investor communication, and project management.



About the Project

You will be working on a 5-star beachfront resort backed by international investors and a fully managed hotel concept.

The role involves online communication with investors, lawyers, external partners, and the internal team.



Your Role

You will take ownership of the operational and communication side of the business, ensuring everything runs smoothly and nothing slips.



Key responsibilities:

- Managing and organizing
 communication (investors, lawyers, partners)

- Responding to detailed questions about the project (based on provided information)

- Following up with leads, investors, and ongoing conversations

- Preparing structured answers to legal and financial questions

- Keeping track of all ongoing discussions and deadlines

- Planning calls, meetings, and follow-ups

- Acting as a filter and organizer for incoming information

- Proactively identifying what needs attention and pushing for action

- Supporting in documentation, updates, and investor communication



Who You Are

We are looking for someone who is:

- Extremely proactive and takes initiative without being asked

- Highly organized and structured

- Strong in written English (near-native level required)

- Comfortable communicating with investors and lawyers

- Able to understand complex information and translate it clearly

- Detail-oriented and precise

- Calm under pressure and able to manage multiple threads at once

- Not afraid to challenge, remind, and push things forward



You are the type of person who says:

“We still need to answer this, let’s handle it now.”



Requirements

- Full-time availability

- Based in or working within Asian timezones

- Excellent written communication skills in English

- Experience in operations, project management, or executive support

- Experience in real estate, hospitality, or investment is a plus



What This Role Is Not

- Not a passive assistant role

- Not task-only execution

- Not someone waiting for instructions



This is a high-trust, high-responsibility position.



What We Offer

- Opportunity to grow into a senior operational role

- Longterm collaboration

- Monthly pay-out





How to Apply

Start your application with the word “PURPLE” so we know you’ve read everything carefully.

title: Senior Salesforce Developer & IT Generalist — Ongoing Part-Time Contract
description:
Remote | Part-Time | Long-Term Engagement



We are a fast-growing Australian direct-to-consumer retailer with an expanding sales team. Salesforce Sales Cloud is the engine of our sales operation, and we need an expert to help us get the most out of it — and out of our broader tech stack.



This is a strategic, hands-on role. You will be our internal Salesforce lead and IT sounding board — building CRM infrastructure that drives sales performance, surfacing insights for marketing, and using tools like Claude Code to build solutions across the business. Critically, you will also be a regular presence in team conversations — working directly with our Director, Sales Manager, Operations Manager, and CX Manager to understand what each team needs and deliver accordingly.





Primary focus — Salesforce Sales Cloud

- Build and maintain a robust lead management system — inbound capture, routing, and scoring

- Design lead scoring models based on source, behaviour, and engagement signals

- Track and report on close rates, conversion rates, and pipeline velocity by rep and by channel

- Build pipeline valuation reporting to give marketing visibility into lead quality and revenue contribution

- Develop real-time dashboards for sales leadership across the full funnel

- Automate follow-up workflows, stage progressions, task creation, and rep activity tracking

- Manage integrations with Shopify, Klaviyo, and telephony tools — data must flow cleanly into Salesforce

- Own CRM data integrity — deduplication, field standardisation, and ongoing hygiene



Stakeholder communication & team collaboration

- Attend regular team calls with the Director, Sales Manager, Operations Manager, and CX Manager

- Translate each team's operational needs into technical requirements and deliver against them

- Provide clear, jargon-free updates on what you are building, what is live, and what is coming next

- Proactively surface recommendations — you should be bringing ideas to us, not just waiting for a brief



Broader IT & tooling

- Act as our IT sounding board — advising on app stack, access management, and system architecture

- Use Claude Code to build internal tools across sales, finance, operations, and customer service

- Identify and implement automation opportunities across business functions beyond Salesforce



What we are looking for

- 5+ years of Salesforce development experience with deep Sales Cloud expertise

- Demonstrated experience building lead scoring, pipeline reporting, and sales performance dashboards

- Strong Apex, LWC, Flow Builder, and SOQL skills

- Comfortable across third-party integrations via REST APIs and middleware

- Excellent spoken and written English — you can hold a business conversation at any level of the organisation

- Broad IT competency — you can think beyond Salesforce and advise on systems holistically

- Self-directed and proactive — you take ownership and do not need to be micromanaged

- Salesforce certifications preferred — Administrator, Platform Developer I or II, Sales Cloud Consultant



Tooling & environment

We are an AI-native business. We provide full Claude Code access to accelerate development across all projects. We value developers who embrace modern tooling, move fast, and bring initiative. Curiosity and adaptability matter as much as technical depth.



To apply, please complete the application form here:





Note: If you are unable to click the application link due to the OnlineJobs.ph interface, please copy the link and paste it directly into your browser.

title: Bookkeeper/Accountant
description:
## **Virtual Bookkeeper / Accountant (Full-Time or Part-Time) – Remote (Philippines Only)**



We are a growing U.S.-based company seeking a **reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Bookkeeper/Accountant** to manage our day-to-day financials and keep our books clean and accurate.



This is a long-term position for someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, and understands U.S. accounting standards.



---



### **Responsibilities**



* Maintain accurate financial records in **QuickBooks Online** 

Create invoices and maintain Spreadsheets information

* Categorize transactions and reconcile bank/credit card accounts

* Manage Accounts Payable & Accounts Receivable

* Prepare monthly financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)

* Clean up and organize books when needed

* Assist with budgeting and basic financial analysis

* Ensure books are always audit-ready

* Communicate weekly updates on financial status



---



### **Requirements (DO NOT APPLY if you don’t meet these)**



* Minimum **3+ years bookkeeping/accounting experience**

* Strong experience with **QuickBooks Online (REQUIRED)**

* Experience working with **U.S.-based companies**

* Solid understanding of:



  * Chart of Accounts

  * Reconciliation

  * Financial statements

* High attention to detail (no sloppy work)

* Strong English communication (written & verbal)

* Reliable internet and ability to work consistently



---



### **Preferred (Big Plus)**



* Experience with **multiple businesses or clients**

* Experience with **cleanup/catch-up bookkeeping**

* Knowledge of **U.S. tax basics**

* Experience with tools like **Gusto, Stripe, or payroll systems**



---



### **Compensation**



* Based on experience (competitive for Philippines market)

* Performance-based raises over time

* Long-term opportunity with consistent work



---



### **How to Apply (IMPORTANT – Filter Step)**



To be considered, follow these steps exactly:



1. Start your application with: **“I am your next bookkeeper because…”**

2. Include:



   * Years of experience

   * QuickBooks experience (what exactly you’ve done)

   * Example of a business you’ve handled (brief)

3. Record a **2-minute Loom video** explaining:



   * Your experience

   * How you ensure accuracy in bookkeeping

4. Please let us know the day you could start? Also include your Whats app number so we can schedule an interview.

5. Please Send a 30 Second Video of yourself telling us why you would be good for our company?



Applications that do not follow instructions will NOT be considered.



---



### **What We’re Looking For**



We want someone who:



* Takes ownership (not just task completion)

* Catches mistakes before we do

* Keeps things organized without being asked

* Thinks like a business owner, not just a worker



---



If you’re dependable, detail-oriented, and want a long-term role with a growing company — we want to hear from you.



---

title: SHORT FORM VIDEO EDITOR | Flexible Work Schedule
description:
We’re hiring someone who knows how to turn long-form content into sharp, high-retention short videos for platforms like TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts.



This role is for someone who understands pacing, hooks, and visual rhythm in short-form content, and knows how to edit with intention rather than just cutting clips.



—-----------------------------------------------------------------------------



READ THE ENTIRE JOB LISTING CAREFULLY. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



--- ABOUT THE TEAM ---

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!



What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM!   





Our Core Values:

1) DELIGHT THE CLIENT:  We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.

2) MASTER YOUR CRAFT:  We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.

3) FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS:  When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.



Our core values are important and the right candidate will share our values. We are building an awesome place to work, not just cutting together videos for our real estate business.



--- ABOUT YOU ---

Do you have strong creative instincts and know how to spot 
nts that make people stop scrolling? Are you proactive, adaptable, and detail-oriented? Do you have a sharp sense of pacing, an instinct for hooks, and a clear understanding of how short-form videos need to flow to hold attention? Do you take pride in clean edits and delivering videos that feel intentional and finished? Do our core values sound like a fit for who you are?



Then keep reading to see if we're a fit!



Responsibilities:

Short-Form Editing & Story Selection

- Review long-form videos, transcripts, or raw footage to identify short-form clip opportunities

- Select 
nts that are clear, engaging, and platform-appropriate

- Edit vertical videos optimized for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Create strong hooks, clean cuts, and natural pacing

- Deliver publish-ready videos that meet brand and platform standards



Captions, Visuals & Formatting

- Add on-screen captions (burned-in or SRT as required) with proper timing and readability

- Apply basic motion, zooms, punch-ins, and visual emphasis where appropriate

- Follow platform-specific formatting (aspect ratio, duration, safe margins)



Iteration & Workflow

- Implement feedback efficiently and meet agreed turnaround times

- Maintain clear file naming and folder organization

- Track edits, revisions, and delivery status as required



Requirements:

- A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION, REQUIRED (at least 150mbps)

- Experience with Final Cut Pro X (or other editing software, such as Adobe After Effects and Premiere Pro) is required

- Strong preference for MacOS users

- Experience editing short-form vertical content for social platforms, required

- Strong understanding of short-form pacing, hooks, and retention

- Experience working from transcripts or long-form content, required

- Clean file organization and understanding of post-production workflo

- Portfolio of completed short-form video projects, required

- General understanding of brand, content marketing, YouTube, etc, required

- GREAT interpersonal and communication skills, required

- Ability to self-start, work on a tight schedule, and manage multiple project deadlines, required

- Ability to follow directions and a LOVE of completing lots of projects according to consistent specifications, required

- Growth mindset, required



--- APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS ---

STEP 1:

Fill out the application form through the link below and write "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field.


 



STEP 2:

Qualified candidates may be invited to participate in two PAID test projects, $10-20 USD for each test project estimated to be 2-3hrs of work for each (a total of $40 USD!).



STEP 3:

Candidates who advance through the test project rounds will be invited to an interview.



STEP 4:

Before extending a trial offer, we will conduct a CHARACTER REFERENCE CHECK for the final candidate(s). CONDUCTING A REFERENCE CHECK will be the last step in the hiring process.



STEP 5:

Upon receiving a trial offer, you will be onboarded as a Video Editor with a 90-day PAID trial period. During this period, we expect you to demonstrate your video editing expertise, meet project deadlines, be a team player, and excel at what you do. A successful trial will lead to a permanent offer to join the team.

title: Virtual Marketing Coordinator
description:
The nLIVEn Team is an Australian based business executive coaching and management consulting business on a mission to help individuals, teams and organisations unlock their full potential. We work with ambitious people who want real, lasting change — and our marketing needs to reflect that energy.



We're looking for a Part-time Marketing Coordinator with a passion for growing a boutique professional service firm style businesses to join us and help bring more of the right clients into our world.



What you'll do - things like:



- Run our content calendar across LinkedIn, Instagram, and

- Write copy that sounds like us — real, energetic, and value-packed

- Grow and nurture our
 list with campaigns that convert

- Track what's working and double down on it

- Help promote events, webinars, and new offers



You're a great fit if you…



- Have 5+ years in marketing or content — coaching/consulting experience is a big plus

- In your late 20s to early 30s and looking for a great, secure place to settle into the next stage of your career

- Write with personality and can adapt to a brand voice quickly

- Take ownership and don't need hand-holding

- Get excited by watching numbers move in the right direction

- Want to be part of something that genuinely helps people



What we offer:



- Flexible part-time hours — work when it suits you (e.g. 5 hours per day, Monday to Friday, with a 1 hour unpaid lunch break)

- A collaborative, high-energy team that's growing fast

- Real ownership of your work — your impact is visible

- Opportunity to grow with the business

- A coaching culture that values personal and professional learning, growth and development 



How to apply: 



- Send us a short intro (3–5 sentences on why you're the one), a link to any work samples or your LinkedIn, and your answer to this question: "What's one underrated marketing tactic that boutique coaching and consulting businesses should be using?"

- Applications without the question answered will not be considered — we want to see how you listen, think and speak (in writing)



The role could grow to full-time position in the future, or we can add other virtual tea
mbers if you prefer to stay part-time.

This role requires excellent communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment. The ideal candidate is proactive, organised, and capable of working both independently and as part of a team.

Base remuneration advertised as US$6/hour x 15 hours/week x 4.33 weeks per month = US$389.97 to US$6/hour x 20 hours/week x 4.33 weeks per month = US$519.96.

title: Sales Representative For Digital Creator
description:
We are a digital media management company that helps online creators maximize their revenue through direct messaging and fan engagement. We are looking for dedicated, emotionally intelligent Sales Representatives to join our team on an ongoing basis.

This is NOT a "reply to messages" job. This is a relationship-building, sales-driven role where you will be the voice behind a creator's brand — connecting with fans, building genuine rapport, and driving revenue through conversations. If you're a people person with sharp instincts and a hunger to earn, keep reading.

What You'll Be Doing



Representing a creator's voice and personality through direct messages with subscribers on a creator platform

Building genuine relationships with fans to increase loyalty, retention, and long-term value

Selling premium content through natural, emotionally intelligent conversation — not spamming

Following scripts and sales frameworks while adapting creatively to each fan's personality

Tracking and reporting your shift performance (messages sent, response time, revenue generated)



What We're Looking For

Must-Haves:



Excellent written English — near-native fluency required (you'll be representing a Western creator, so vocabulary, slang, tone, and nuance all matter)

Fast typing speed (60+ WPM preferred)

Reliable internet connection and a proper desktop or laptop setup (no phones, no tablets)

Available to commit to consistent 8-hour shifts (multiple shifts available — morning, day, and night)

Familiarity with CRM tools such as Infloww or Supercreator is a strong plus — if you know what these are, mention it in your application

Sales-oriented mindset — you don't just answer questions, you guide conversations toward a goal

Self-disciplined and organized — you show up on time, follow systems, and take ownership of your work



What separates good from great:



Background or genuine interest in psychology, sales, or relationship-building

Creative problem solver — if a fan wants something you can't offer, you find a way to redirect and still deliver value

Hungry to grow — you're not just looking for a paycheck, you want to develop a real skill and earn more over time

You welcome feedback, take notes, and improve daily



Compensation



Base pay: $3–$5/hour depending on experience and performance

Commission on sales you generate. Our creators generate significant monthly revenue. Top-performing tea
mbers who consistently drive sales and build strong fan relationships earn well beyond base pay. How much you earn is directly tied to how good you are.

Structured onboarding with training and supervised practice before you go live

Clear growth path — high performers get access to higher-traffic accounts and better commission structures



Shift Availability

We need coverage across the following windows (all times US Eastern / EST):



Morning Shift: 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM EST

Day Shift: 2:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST

Night Shift: 10:00 PM – 6:00 AM EST



Please indicate in your application which shift(s) you are available for.



How to Apply

Read carefully — applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Click "Apply for this Job" and write your application message. Do NOT send a generic copy-paste message. Tell us briefly why you're a good fit for this role.

In your application message, include the following:



Your name and age

Which shift(s) you are available for (Morning, Day, and/or Night)

Your typing speed in WPM (test for free at 
 and include your result)

Your English proficiency level (fluent, advanced, or intermediate)

Any relevant work experience — especially if you have used tools like Infloww or Supercreator

A short answer to this question: "A long-time paying subscriber messages you saying he's been feeling ignored lately and is thinking about cancelling. What do you say to him?" (There is no single "right" answer — we want to see how you think.)





At the very bottom of your application message, include the exact phrase: "I have read and understood the full job description."



We are looking for effort and thoughtfulness, not one-word answers. Applicants who clearly put thought into their responses will be contacted with next steps.

Strong candidates will be kept in our pipeline for future openings even if no position is immediately available.

title: Growth Content Operator (Short-Form Video Editor + Ads Assistant)
description:
Title: Growth Content Operator (Short-Form Video Editor + Ads Assistant)



About Us:

We are building a fast-growing brand and launching paid social media campaigns. We already have content, strategy, and systems (Notion OS, creative direction, mood boards) in place.



Now we need someone who can help us execute fast, improve content performance, and support our ad campaigns.



Role Overview:

We are looking for a Growth Content Operator, someone who can turn raw content into high-performing short-form videos and help us test and improve ads.



This is NOT a basic VA role. You will play a key role in helping us grow from $0 to $10k/month.



Your Responsibilities:



* Edit short-form videos (TikTok, Instagram Reels, paid ads)

* Improve weak videos (hooks, pacing, captions, engagement)

* Create multiple variations of each video (especially different hooks)

* Turn long-form or raw footage into short-form content

* Follow our Notion system to manage content and tasks

* Assist with launching ads in Meta Ads Manager

* Duplicate and test creatives inside campaigns

* Help us increase content output and improve performance over time



What Success Looks Like:



* 20–30 high-quality short-form videos per week

* Clear improvement in hooks, pacing, and engagement

* Faster content production and iteration

* Organized execution inside our systems



What We’re Looking For:



* Strong experience editing short-form content (TikTok/Reels/UGC ads)

* Deep understanding of hooks (first 1–3 seconds are critical)

* Ability to improve content — not just edit it

* Fast turnaround and strong attention to detail

* Comfortable following systems and executing consistently

* Basic familiarity with Meta Ads Manager (or willingness to learn quickly)



Bonus (Not Required):



* Experience with direct response ads

* Understanding of metrics like CTR, CPA, ROAS

* Experience working with growing brands or startups



Compensation:

$700–$1,200/month (depending on experience and skill level)

Opportunity to grow with the company as we scale



How to Apply:

Please include:



1. Portfolio of short-form videos (TikTok/Reels/ads)

2. 2–3 examples of videos you’ve edited that performed well

3. A short explanation of what makes a good hook

4. The word “Growth” at the top of your application



Important:

We will provide a paid test task before hiring.

title: Social Media and Content Manager
description:
***At Polaris, we’re on the lookout for a driven, detail-oriented, and marketing-savvy Marketing and Acquisitions Assistant to join our world-class team. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, love the idea of being the operational backbone of a company’s marketing engine, and have strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, content creation, CRM systems, and social media, this role is for you.



***About us:

Polaris is a consulting agency with a bold mission: To help 1 million Founders to leverage time, reclaim freedom, and scale without sacrifice. We’re the only firm blending coaching and done-for-you services through a hybrid model — empowering our clients with strategic delegation, streamlined operations, and scalable systems. 



***Who we are looking for:

The ideal candidate is a detail-oriented, creative and dependable team player with experience working as a part of a high performing team and someone with a strong background in social media and content strategy.

You have a proven track record of planning, creating and executing engaging content in the online education and high-ticket service space (i.e. Coaches, agencies, advisors). Leading to increased visibility, higher engagement and creating content that convert followers into leads. 



In addition to consistent content output, it is expected that you’ll display a high level of proactiveness towards improving the management and sharing of content, maximizing the use of current tools or materials of the organization in a smart way and working closely with the Founder as a key part of the team. 



***Key Responsibilities

Content management:

- Create content that aligns with current trends and industry best practices, while managing content calendars to ensure posts go out consistently and on time.

- Collaborate with the leadership team to ensure content reflects key brand messages and marketing goals.

- Set up and manage tools like website domains, business
s, text messaging, and Google profiles, and keep marketing automations and workflows running smoothly.



Video editing:

- Apply video edits such as cuts/transitions, audio overlays, cinematic inserts and other edits that align with the brand and content goals.

- Create engaging short-form reels for platforms such as Instagram and TikTok

- Assist in editing long form videos for podcast interviews and youtube. 

- Create eye catching thumbnails

- Audience Management and prospecting:

- Send connection requests, monitor, respond to, send and engage with comments, messages, and mentions on social media platforms to build meaningful connections and foster a positive brand image.

- Ensure the contact database is regularly updated and accurately organized, while segmenting
 lists to enable targeted and effective communication



CRM Workflows

- Efficiently manage client relationships through customized CRM workflows

Tracking leads in real time, automating follow-ups, and syncing seamlessly with your favorite tools.

- Monitor KPIs in real time to refine strategies and ensure every campaign, workflow, and funnel delivers measurable ROI.



Tracking and reporting:

- Generate regular reports and provide analytics on content,
, and campaign performance.

- Monitoring and reporting on paid media performance by tracking metrics such as CPM, CPL, leads generated, and CPA.

- Overseeing and monitoring pipeline and opportunities, ensuring that leads are effectively tracked, followed up on, and moved through the stages



RESULTS (KPIs)

- 100% on time publication of content according to content calendar

- Minimize response time towards audience engagements and inquiries

- Increase overall social media engagement, audience growth and lead generation

- Consistent and accurate reporting of content and marketing performance metrics



SKILLS REQUIRED:

- Proficient in using video editing tools like Capcut, Descript, Davinci Resolve

- Ability to edit graphics using tools like Canva and Photoshop

- Proficient in using CRMs like Active Campaign, GoHighLevel and Clickfunnels

- Experience in Google Workspace (Gmail, GDrive, Docs, Sheets)

- Experience in Microsoft Office Workspace

- Understand the algorithm of different social media platforms

- Prior experience managing social media and content of personality-driven businesses



WORK SCHEDULE:

- Full time position. 8 hours per day. Monday to Friday.

- Exact shift times will be based on the job role.

- Depending on the demand, you may be required to work during any of these timezones: All North American time zones, European time zones, Australia/Asia Pacific time zones.



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE AND PERKS:

- Hourly rate starting from 4 USD / hour

- Eligibility for quarterly bonuses upon hitting performance KPIs. Up to 800USD

- Pay rise potential according to experience and performance

- Opportunity to be hired for projects at higher one-off fees on top of standard salary

- Work from home privilege

- Opportunity to work with a high-performing team



***HOW TO APPLY:

If you meet all the above requirements and are confident that you are a great fit for this position, submit your application by clicking on the following link:

???? 
/to/z3OTqcwU

???? We also prefer you to like Pink Elephants 



Please do NOT private message us regarding this job. We have a hiring process in place and will only accept applicants who can follow the process.



Place the word "I am" at the start of your full name in the application form.
