title: Digital Marketing & Campaign Lead
description:
We are a long-standing Singapore home appliance brand looking for a proactive Digital Marketing & Campaign Lead to drive brand growth and support online sales through strong planning, coordination, and execution.



This is primarily a planning and coordination role, not a content creation or video editing role. You will take ownership of our social media calendar, EDM planning,
 channel, campaign launches, KOL outreach, and cross-department coordination, while working closely with our in-house design team and other stakeholders to ensure campaigns and marketing initiatives are delivered well and on time.



Key Responsibilities

Own and manage the brand’s social media calendar across relevant platforms

Plan EDM strategy, campaign flow, and monthly/weekly sends

Manage and grow our
 channel

Propose fresh marketing ideas and new initiatives to improve GMV and brand image

Plan and coordinate product launch campaigns and ad hoc marketing pushes

Drive KOL, creator, and brand partnership outreach and planning

Plan and execute giveaway and community engagement campaigns

Work closely with our in-house designers to brief, review, and deliver campaign assets on time

Coordinate across departments to ensure smooth execution of campaigns and promotions

Track timelines, follow up on deliverables, and keep projects moving

Plan sales mechanics and promotional setups across channels

Create and launch new product listings where needed

Relay orders and POs clearly to the warehouse team for fulfilment coordination

Support TikTok livestream setup and planning



What We’re Looking For

Strong written and spoken English

Strong planning and project coordination skills

Good sense of branding, marketing, and visual direction

Experience in digital marketing, campaign planning, and EDM management

Comfortable working across departments and following up with different stakeholders

Able to take ownership and push projects forward independently

Organized, proactive, and detail-oriented

Comfortable working remotely with a Singapore team



Nice to Have

Experience with Klaviyo, Shopify, TikTok Shop, or similar tools

Experience with KOL or influencer outreach

Experience with
/community management

Experience with livestream planning

Content Creation Ability



Who This Role Is For

This role is for someone who can act like a mini owner for the function — someone who can plan, push, coordinate, and execute, while keeping brand standards and commercial goals in mind.

title: Zoho CRM Administrator (Deluge & Integrations)
description:
Overview

We are seeking an experienced Zoho CRM Administrator with strong Deluge scripting and integration expertise to manage, customize, and optimize our Zoho CRM and Zoho One environment. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience building custom automations, API integrations, and webhooks, particularly integrating Zoho CRM with WordPress-based systems and external platforms.

This role involves designing scalable workflows, writing custom Deluge code, and implementing API-based integrations to streamline business processes.



About Us:

We are a luxury watch–focused brand seeking to enhance our content and e-commerce strategy. Our audience values accurate, detailed, and refined information on high-end timepieces, including Rolex, Patek Philippe, Audemars Piguet, Omega, and other leading brands.



Key Responsibilities

Zoho CRM Administration

Manage and maintain Zoho CRM and Zoho One applications

Configure modules, fields, layouts, workflows, and automation

Monitor CRM data quality and system performance

Manage user roles, permissions, and access controls

Implement best practices for CRM architecture and data structure

Deluge Development

Develop custom Deluge scripts to extend CRM functionality

Create and maintain custom functions, workflows, and automation

Implement complex logic for business processes

Build custom configurations across Zoho One apps

API & Integration Development

Design and implement API integrations between Zoho CRM and external systems

Manage webhooks to and from our WordPress website

Integrate Zoho CRM with third-party tools and services

Troubleshoot and maintain integration reliability

Ensure secure and efficient data exchange between systems

WordPress Integration

Connect Zoho CRM with WordPress forms, plugins, and backend systems

Configure webhook endpoints and API calls

Maintain and optimize data synchronization between WordPress and Zoho

System Optimization & Support

Identify opportunities to improve workflows and automations

Debug errors in Deluge scripts and integrations

Maintain documentation for CRM configurations and integrations

Support internal teams with CRM improvements and training



Required Skills & Qualifications

Technical Skills

Strong experience with Zoho CRM administration

Advanced knowledge of Deluge scripting

Experience with Zoho One ecosystem

Solid understanding of REST APIs

Experience implementing webhooks

Experience integrating Zoho CRM with WordPress

Knowledge of JSON, HTTP requests, and API authentication

Experience building custom automation and workflows

Preferred Skills

Experience with Zoho Flow or other integration platforms

Familiarity with WordPress plugins and backend integrations

Experience integrating CRM systems with marketing, payment, or SaaS tools

Understanding of data structures and system architecture



Experience Requirements

Proven experience writing Deluge scripts

Demonstrated experience building API integrations and webhooks

Experience integrating CRM systems with WordPress



Nice to Have

Experience with Zoho Creator

Experience with automation and workflow optimization

Knowledge of CRM data analytics and reporting



Key Success Metrics

Reliable and scalable CRM automation

Stable integrations between Zoho CRM and external systems

Reduced manual processes through automation

Improved data accuracy and workflow efficiency



Work Setup

Full time remote position

Flexible working hours

No time tracker. We focus on results and deliverables

Collaborative, asynchronous communication environment



How to Apply?

To help me get to know you better, please send:



 Your DISC test -

 Your typing test -

a. Introduce and tell us about yourself. Hobbies/passions. Career/life/financial goals and in what amount of time? Be very specific here. What have you been saving money for? What specific item/asset is it? When do you expect to acquire it? How do you plan on achieving that goal?

title: Intermediate Level WordPress Developer
description:
About the Role

We are hiring a WordPress Developer with experience in user-centered design, AI-assisted development, CRM integration, workflow automation, and WooCommerce.

We already have a working WordPress website, a live WooCommerce store, and some existing CRM integrations in place. This is not a build-from-scratch role. We need someone who can step in, understand what we have, and take it further — improving the user experience, expanding CRM and automation capabilities, and maintaining what is already running.



Responsibilities

Web Design and User Experience

Review and improve the existing WordPress website with a focus on usability, navigation, and conversion

Apply UX principles such as visual hierarchy, cognitive load management, and common scanning patterns to optimize current page layouts

Ensure responsive, mobile-first performance across devices and browsers

WooCommerce (Existing Store)

Maintain and optimize the existing product pages, checkout flows, and payment/shipping configurations

Troubleshoot store issues and improve performance

AI-Assisted Development

Use AI coding tools such as Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, or similar platforms to support development, debugging, and code generation

Integrate AI-driven features into the website where applicable 

Stay informed on new AI development tools and evaluate them for practical use

CRM Integration — Zoho CRM and GoHighLevel (Expand Existing Setup)

Review and improve existing CRM integrations between WordPress and Zoho CRM and/or GoHighLevel

Expand integration coverage to include additional contacts, deals, pipelines, custom fields, workflows as needed

Knows how to use Zapier, Make, Pabbly, or n8n to connect WordPress with CRM

Troubleshoot and resolve issues with current integrations

Custom WordPress Development

Build or customize themes using block-based, Full Site Editing, or classic theme approaches

Write backend logic in PHP using WordPress hooks, actions, filters, and the REST API

Create custom post types, taxonomies, meta boxes, and advanced field configurations



Requirements

2–3+ years of WordPress development experience (themes, plugins, and full-stack builds)

WooCommerce experience including store customization, custom extensions, and performance optimization

Understanding of UX design principles and how user behavior applies to web page layouts

Hands-on experience with AI coding tools such as Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, or equivalent

Experience working with Zoho CRM and/or GoHighLevel integrations (contacts, deals, pipelines, webhooks)

Working knowledge of at least one of: Zapier, Make, Pabbly, n8n

Proficiency in PHP, JavaScript, HTML.

Comfortable inheriting and improving existing codebases and integrations



What We Offer

Flexible schedule — work when you're most creative, no time tracker, no micromanagement

Performance-based salary growth — Strong performers move up fast

A collaborative team that values creative input and fresh ideas

Access to AI tools and a professional development budget

Competitive compensation based on experience

A supportive team environment where asking questions is encouraged

Manageable workload with clear priorities — we focus on one thing at a time, not everything at once

Hands-on guidance and clear direction from the team — you will not be left to figure everything out alone

Ready to Apply?



I'd love to see what you can create! To help me understand if we're a great fit, please share the following:

title: Google Ads Manager - eCommerce $1800-$2200/month
description:
Google Ads Manager -  $1,800 - $2,200 USD/Month + Bonus 

Remote Full-Time  Philippines



ABOUT US

We are the Golden Horde, an e-commerce company with 2 brands generating $10M+ in yearly

revenue. Our Google Ads account has been running for 5+ years - we're not starting from

scratch, we're scaling what already works, and we need someone who can own that.



THE ROLE

You'll take full strategic ownership of our Google Ads account - currently spending

$40,000/month - across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and YouTube. You work directly

with the CEO and brief our internal creative team on assets needed to win. In 90 days, we

expect improved ROAS, a clean account structure, and a scaling roadmap you own.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Account Strategy & Execution

Audit, own, and continuously optimize our existing 5-year Google Ads account

Launch and manage campaigns across Search, Shopping, Performance Max, and

YouTube

Scale ad spend profitably - your job is not just to maintain, it's to grow

Manage daily budgets responsibly with a clear view of ROAS at all times



Data & Attribution

Use WeTracked and Triple Whale to make attribution-led decisions - not gut feel

Analyze performance data weekly and translate findings into clear actions

Identify what's working, what's wasting spend, and act on it fast



Creative & Team Collaboration

Brief our internal creative team on ad assets - hooks, formats, seasonal creative

Plan ahead for seasonal campaigns (holidays, peak periods) - briefs go out before the

deadline, not during it

Communicate performance data to the creative team in plain language they can act on



Reporting & Communication

Send weekly performance updates to the CEO - proactively, without being asked

Flag issues, budget concerns, or opportunities before they become problems



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Solid years of experience managing Google Ads accounts spending $30K–$100K+/month and can show the results — not just the account access

You have direct DTC e-commerce experience — lead gen backgrounds will not be considered

Experience in using WeTracked, Triple Whale, Northbeam, or Hyros — you understand attribution beyond native Google data

You know Google Shopping, Performance Max, Search, and YouTube — not just one of them

You send updates before being asked. You flag problems before they escalate. That's

how you operate.

You think like a business owner, not a platform operator — ROAS matters more to you

than impressions

Strong English communication — you'll be briefing a creative team and reporting directly

to the CEO



If you've scaled a Google Ads account past 5 figures in monthly spend and have the numbers to

prove it, apply now. Compensation includes a base of $1,800–$2,200/month plus bonus - for

the right person, this role pays more.



How to Apply? Kindly fill out the application form: 
 or
 your Updated CV to 
 with a subject line: Google Ads Manager - [Total years of experience as a Google Ads Manager in Ecommerce]

title: Customer Support Specialist – E-Commerce (Shopify & Gorgias) | Part-Time 30h/week
description:
We're looking for an experienced and reliable Customer 

Support Specialist to join our team and help deliver 

outstanding service for a fast-growing international 

e-commerce brand in the health and wellness space.



You'll be the first point of contact for our customers, 

handling inquiries across
, live chat, and social 

media — all managed through Gorgias, our helpdesk platform.



This is a long-term, part-time remote position 

(approximately 30 hours per week) with flexible scheduling 

and room to grow into a full-time role as the brand scales.





ABOUT THE BRAND

???????????????

We are an international e-commerce brand that sells 

health and wellness products. Our customers are primarily 

based in the US, UK, and Europe. The brand is growing 

fast and we are looking for a dedicated support team 

member to grow with us.





WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

????????????????????

- Respond to customer inquiries via
, live chat, 

  and social media (Instagram,
)

- Handle order-related questions: tracking, shipping 

  status, delivery issues

- Process return and refund requests following our SOPs

- Manage cancellation requests

- Handle PayPal disputes and chargebacks professionally

- Use Gorgias macros and tags to keep tickets organized

- Escalate complex issues to the team lead when needed

- Maintain a high CSAT score and fast response times

- Collaborate with the team via Slack





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

??????????????????????



Must-Have:

- Excellent written English (C1 level or higher) — this 

  is non-negotiable, our customers are native English 

  speakers

- At least 1-2 years of customer support experience in 

  e-commerce

- Experience with Gorgias (or similar helpdesk: Zendesk, 

  Freshdesk, Re:Amaze)

- Experience with Shopify (navigating orders, customer 

  profiles, fulfillment status)

- Ability to handle difficult customers calmly and 

  professionally

- Reliable internet connection

- Own laptop or PC with working webcam



Nice-to-Have:

- Experience with health, wellness, or supplement brands

- Experience handling PayPal disputes or chargebacks

- Familiarity with Slack

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing tools





SCHEDULE & HOURS

????????????????

- Part-time: approximately 30 hours per week

- Flexible scheduling — we'll find a schedule that works 

  for both sides

- Must be available for at least some overlap with 

  European business hours (CET)

- Potential to grow into full-time as the brand scales





WHAT WE OFFER

?????????????

- Competitive salary (based on experience)

- 100% remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines

- Long-term position with a growing brand

- Full training and onboarding provided (SOPs, macros, 

  workflows — everything is documented)

- Supportive team environment via Slack

- Opportunity to grow into a senior or team lead role





HOW TO APPLY

????????????

If this sounds like a great fit for you, please include 

the following in your application:



1. A short introduction about yourself and your 

   experience in e-commerce customer support



2. Your experience with Gorgias and/or Shopify — 

   please be specific (which brands, how long, what 

   you did)



3. Your English level and any relevant certifications



4. Your expected hourly rate in USD



5. Your available working hours and timezone



6. A short video (2-3 minutes, in English) introducing 

   yourself and explaining why you'd be a great fit for 

   this role



7. Please upload your video to Google Drive and share 

   the link with "Anyone with the link can view" 

   enabled. Alternatively, you can use Loom (
) 

   or any other platform that allows us to view your 

   video without needing to download it or log in. Send this link with your message via chat. 



?? Applications without the video will not be considered.



We review all applications carefully and will respond 

within 3-5 business days.



Looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Meta Ads Creative Strategist & Static Ad Creator (Facebook Ad Library Expert)
description:
We are a growing business based in the UK looking for a talented Meta Ads Creative Strategist who can create high-converting static ads while also digging deep into competitors' campaigns.

Your main role will be to:



Regularly monitor and analyze our competitors' ads in the
/Meta Ad Library.

Reverse-engineer what’s working: identify strong hooks, emotional triggers, colour psychology, layouts, social proof, urgency/scarcity elements, and overall psychology behind high-performing static ads.

Turn those insights into clear, detailed creative briefs and directions that we (or other designers) can use to produce winning ads.

Create static ads yourself (using tools like Canva, Photoshop, or similar) — including variations for testing (A/B testing angles, headlines, visuals, etc.).

Stay on top of Meta ads trends and suggest new creative ideas based on data and competitor research.



Key Responsibilities:



Daily/weekly competitive analysis via
 Ad Library.

Break down successful (and failing) competitor static ads — explain the psychology and why they convert (or don’t).

Produce 5–15 static ad variations per week (or as needed for testing).

Write clear creative briefs with hooks, messaging angles, visual direction, and testing hypotheses.

Work closely with our team to iterate based on ad performance (CTR, conversions, ROAS feedback).



What We’re Looking For:



Proven experience with Meta/Facebook ads creative (especially static image ads).

Strong ability to analyze
 Ad Library and turn insights into actionable strategies.

Good understanding of advertising psychology, direct-response marketing, and what makes people stop scrolling and click/buy.

Excellent English communication (written) — you need to explain your thinking clearly in briefs.

Proficiency in design tools (Canva, Photoshop, Figma, etc.) for creating clean, professional static ads.

Bonus: Experience in e-commerce, D2C, or performance marketing.



Requirements:



At least 1–2 years of hands-on experience creating or strategizing Meta ads.

Portfolio or examples of past ad creatives + any competitor analysis/briefs you’ve done (please share links or screenshots when applying).

Reliable internet and availability for UK business hours overlap when needed (we’re flexible).

Long-term commitment preferred (this is not a one-off project).



What We Offer:



Long-term, stable remote work.

Competitive hourly rate (depending on experience and quality — we increase for proven results).

Opportunity to directly impact our ad performance and scaling.

Clear feedback and collaboration with a UK-based team.



If you love spying on ads in the Ad Library, understanding why certain creatives crush it, and turning that into scroll-stopping static ads + smart briefs — this role is for you.

How to Apply:

Please send:



Your updated resume/portfolio.

2–3 examples of static ads you’ve created (or briefs you’ve written).

A short message explaining why you’re a good fit and any experience with competitor Ad Library analysis.



We review applications quickly and will reply only to strong matches.

title: Technical Virtual Assistant
description:
Technical Virtual Assistant



Job Type: Full-time

Pay: Php23,000.00 - Php29,000.00 per month

Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.



How to Apply:

Read the full job description and complete our application form:

Application Form: 



______________________________________________________________________



Company: Letsreach (
)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Salary: Php23,000-29,000

Hours: Full-time (8 hours/day, 5 days/week)

Start Date: Immediate



About the Role:

Letsreach is a fast-growing influencer marketing agency working with gaming, tech, and entertainment creators. We're looking for a technically capable Virtual Assistant who can run and learn automation workflows, manage complex data systems, and execute campaigns with precision.



This role is built around:

1. Automation platforms (n8n, Make, Zapier) - running workflows and learning our systems

2. Google Sheets - advanced database management with formulas and data validation

3. Instantly.ai -
 campaign management across multiple domains

4. Project management systems - Notion for documentation, Slack for communication

5. Client communication and coordination - account management for different clients

6. AI tools - Claude and Perplexity for research and creator discovery



This is for someone who:

- Has worked with automation tools before (Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar)

- Is comfortable learning complex workflows and technical interfaces

- Is detail-oriented and catches errors before they become problems

- Can work independently with documentation and SOPs



What You'll Do

- Run automation workflows - Execute n8n/Make workflows for creator discovery and data processing

- Manage complex databases - Maintain creator and brand databases in Google Sheets with advanced formulas

- Handle
 campaigns - Manage Instantly.ai platform across multiple domains and campaigns

- Execute technical tasks - Troubleshoot workflow errors, validate data accuracy, organize systems

- Research using AI tools - Use Claude and Perplexity for creator research and analysis

- Maintain operations - Keep files organized, update documentation, communicate progress via Slack



Requirements



Must Have:

- 4-5 years professional work experience

- Experience with automation tools (Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar platforms) - even basic workflows count

- Advanced Google Sheets (VLOOKUP, IF statements, pivot tables, data validation, complex formulas)

- Detail-oriented - high accuracy in data entry and technical tasks

- Comfortable with technical complexity - won't be intimidated by workflows with multiple steps

- Excellent written English for professional communication

- Independent problem-solver - troubleshoots first, asks specific questions when stuck

- Stable internet (25+ Mbps) and backup power solution



Preferred:

- Familiar with influencer marketing or creator economy

- Used Claude, Perplexity, or similar AI research tools

- Experience with
 campaign platforms

- Remote work background



NOT a fit if you:

- Need constant guidance or hand-holding

- Get overwhelmed by technical interfaces

- Haven't worked with any automation tools before



What We Offer:

Compensation: $400-$500/month based on experience and technical proficiency



Growth Opportunity:

- Advanced automation platforms (n8n is highly valuable skill)

- Work with AI tools (Claude, Perplexity) for real business applications

- Exposure to influencer marketing with major gaming/tech creators

- Direct collaboration with founders - small team, big impact

- Build technical skills that significantly increase your market value



Work Environment:

- Independent work with clear documentation

- Flexible hours with some Dubai timezone (UTC+4) overlap

- Results-focused, not micromanaged

- Tools and systems for productive remote work



How to Apply:

Read the full job description and complete our application form:

? Application Form: 



Timeline: We review applications weekly. Shortlisted candidates receive a practical assessment, then video interview with founders.



Important:

* Automation experience required - even if basic, you must have worked with Make, Zapier, n8n, or similar

* We assess technical skills through practical tests for shortlisted candidates

* Documentation and SOPs provided, but you must learn independently

* This is technical operations work, not basic administrative support



Job Type: Full-time?Pay: Php23,000.00 - Php29,000.00 per month

Only applications submitted through the form will be reviewed.

title: Loan Data Analyst
description:
About the Role

We are an Australian-based private  lender looking for a detail-oriented Loan Data Analyst to support our credit team. You will play a key role in preparing and organising customer financial data to assist our assessors in making responsible lending decisions.



?



Key Responsibilities

 • Review and organise customer bank transaction data (last 90 days)

 • Categorise income, expenses, and liabilities accurately

 • Identify key financial behaviours (e.g. gambling, BNPL, payday loans, overdrafts)

 • Prepare clean, structured summaries for credit assessors

 • Flag inconsistencies or missing information for further review

 • Maintain strict data handling and privacy standards at all times



?



What We’re Looking For

 • Experience working with bank transaction data, financial data, or lending/fintech platforms

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to spot patterns or anomalies

 • Experience categorising transactions (manual or via tools)

 • Understanding of personal finance (income vs expenses, liabilities, etc.)

 • Ability to follow structured processes and compliance requirements

 • Excellent English communication skills



?



Important – Privacy & Data Handling

You will be working with sensitive financial data. All work must be completed in line with strict privacy and confidentiality requirements. No customer data is to be stored, shared, or used outside of the platform.



?



Application Requirement (Important)

As part of your application, please provide examples of how you have previously categorised bank transaction data, ensuring:

 • All personal information is removed or anonymised

 • No real customer names, account numbers, or identifiable details are included

 • Examples clearly show how transactions were grouped (e.g. income, rent, utilities, gambling, BNPL, discretionary spending)



?



Why Join Us?

 • Work with a fast-growing Australian lender

 • Be part of a scalable, tech-driven lending model

 • Long-term opportunity with growth potential

title: Customer support representative
description:
We are looking for a friendly, professional virtual receptionist to assist with answering phone calls and helping guests with their reservations. This role involves providing excellent customer service, assisting guests with rescheduling or canceling bookings, and clearly explaining what our facility offers.



The ideal candidate should have strong English communication skills, a warm and welcoming tone, and experience handling customer inquiries over the phone. You will be representing a luxury wellness sauna lounge, so professionalism, calm communication, and attention to detail are important.



Responsibilities:

 • Answer incoming phone calls from guests

 • Assist with rescheduling or canceling reservations

 • Explain our facility, amenities, and how sessions work

 • Answer common guest questions about hours, pricing, and policies

 • Provide a friendly and professional guest experience



We are looking for someone reliable, detail oriented, and comfortable speaking with guests to help create a smooth and welcoming experience for everyone contacting RAFA Sauna Lounge.

title: Digital Marketing and Tech Savvy VA
description:
We run a finance education and strategic finance business with a large LinkedIn audience. We're hiring a Digital Marketing and Tech Savvy VA who can operate the full marketing engine day-to-day: newsletters,
 sequences, campaigns, social publishing, community engagement, lead magnets, landing pages, automations, and reporting.



We need an operator with a solid track record, strong judgment, tight execution, and high standards.



What you’ll own:



1.
 + beehiiv



Draft and edit newsletters (tight, precise, finance-literate writing).



Build and manage
 sequences, automations, segmentation, tagging, and campaign sends in beehiiv.

Maintain list hygiene and deliverability basics (engagement-based segmentation, clean sending practices).

Track performance (open rate, CTR, conversions) and recommend improvements.



2. Socials + repurposing



Repurpose long-form content into platform-native posts (LinkedIn pages + other platforms).

Schedule, publish, and QA posts (formatting, links, tracking, assets).

Manage community posts and engagement cadence.

Use platform tools to drive engagement (ManyChat and other platform-specific tools where appropriate).



3. Lead magnets + assets + design coordination



Propose new lead magnet ideas aligned to the audience and products.

Coordinate creation of lead magnets and post visuals with the designer (briefs, iteration loops, final QA).

Maintain an organized asset library and content calendar.



4. Web + landing pages + SEO



Create and manage landing pages for lead magnets and offers (copy updates, embeds, forms, HTML edits if needed).

Basic SEO implementation (titles, meta descriptions, on-page updates).

Track performance in Google Analytics and deliver a simple weekly report with insights.



5. Automations



Build and maintain 
 automations (and Zapier when needed).

Connect forms, tagging, sequences, and reporting with reliable logic and error handling.

Document what you build so it’s maintainable.



6. Non-negotiables



Excellent editor. You can tighten copy without changing meaning, introducing errors, or adding fluff.

Finance-literate. You understand basic finance/accounting language and can keep it accurate.

Strong beehiiv skills. You have actually built sequences, segmentation, automations, and campaigns.

Digital Margeting expertise. You understand funnel building, conversion tracking, segmentation, engagement, etc

Reliable execution. You hit deadlines, QA your work, and follow systems.

High integrity: confidentiality, discretion, loyalty. 

Responsible AI use. You can use AI to accelerate drafts, but you do not invent facts, stats, or claims. Anything factual must be verified and sourced properly. No confidential uploads into unapproved tools.



Tools you should be comfortable with



beehiiv 

Canva 


 and Zapier

HTML 

Gamma app 

Google Analytics and basic SEO

ManyChat 

Notion

ClickUp 



How we work



You’ll receive priorities and voice guidelines, then you run execution with minimal hand-holding.

Weekly live (PST availability) + async work

Clear file naming, version control, and organized folders are mandatory.

You flag issues early and propose solutions.



Trial assignment - Live on camera



Final candidates will complete a paid test that includes:



Editing a newsletter draft 

Building a simple beehiiv flow from a short spec (tagging + segmentation + sequence)

Repurposing one LinkedIn post into 2–3 platform-native variants



To apply share your linkedin, work samples as appicable and availability for a live test

title: Customer Service Overflow
description:
Job Title: Customer Service Overflow

Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full-Time



Maid My Day is a Cleaning Company operating across Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane and Canberra within Australia. We service the Australian Aged Care Industry by having our workers provide cleaning services for the elderly who still live in their homes. We have been operating for 16 years and we have approximately 250 cleaners working for our company.



- The Role -

Due to recent growth, we are now looking for a passionate Customer Service Representative to manage the overflow tasks on our busy customer service desk. We currently have 24 full-time VA's who work from their homes in the Philippines. We have an experienced full-time Customer Service team and your role would be to support them by looking after the following functions;

1. Attendance monitoring - ensure all cleaners are logged in on their shift and have started on time

  - Coordinate with the aged care, client or the team any concerns with the attendances

2. SMS monitoring and real-time processing of concerns. 

3. Answer and manage the overflow of calls coming into our Customer Service desk

Please note: This involves a high influx of outbound calls,
s and SMS 





- Skills and Experience Required -

Minimum 2 years of experience working on an English-speaking customer service desk managing calls,
s and SMS

Organised and able to manage time effectively

Detail-oriented but also capable of multi-tasking

Positive and helpful attitude, especially when dealing with cleaners and clients

Comfortable in a tight-knit team environment

Willing to take responsibility for own work and be accountable for KPIs

Experience with cloud-based software is beneficial to hit the ground running





- Requirements -

Reliable Internet Connection

Noise Cancelling Headphones

Quite place to work with no distractions

Reliable backup 





- What we offer -

Compensation: starts at $665AUD with possible growth after 3 months & KPI incentives

Opportunity to work remotely.

Work alongside fellow Filipino tea
mbers who will support you as you grow in your role.

title: AI / Technical Automation Specialist
description:
Technical Automation Specialist — Remote

About the role

We're a fast-moving group of companies operating across solar sales, recruitment, and lead generation — and we're looking for a sharp Technical Automation Specialist to own our automation stack. You'll work directly with the founders to build, maintain, and scale workflows across our CRM, outreach, lead pipelines, and internal systems. This is a hands-on builder role — not a consultant.

What you'll be doing



Build and manage automation workflows in Make (Integromat), n8n, and Zapier

Connect and integrate third-party tools via REST APIs, webhooks, and native connectors

Manage and troubleshoot CRM integrations (Go High Level, 
, Airtable)

Set up lead enrichment pipelines,
 automation sequences, and booking flows

Debug failing scenarios, maintain error handling, and monitor automation health

Support ad platform data flows — Meta, Google, and TikTok pixel/CAPI event routing

Document all workflows clearly so they can be handed off or replicated



Must-haves



Make (Integromat)

n8n

Zapier

REST APIs & webhooks

JSON / data mapping

CRM integrations



Nice to haves

Go High Level · Clay · Airtable · Supabase · Meta CAPI · 
 · Basic JS or Python · OpenAI API

Who you are



You can read API docs and figure it out without being told every step

You're proactive — you spot inefficiencies and propose fixes without waiting to be asked

You communicate clearly — no jargon, quick updates, honest on timelines

You've worked in a startup or small team and are comfortable with fast iteration



How to apply

Send a short Loom or written overview of an automation you've built — what it did, what tools you used, and why.

title: Sales Executive $3.00 per hour WITH COMMISSION
description:
About Us

We are a premier health and safety training centre in Northern Ireland and the UK, dedicated to delivering accredited courses and compliance solutions. We are seeking a dynamic, multi-skilled Sales Executive to drive business growth. This is not a traditional sales role—we need a proactive, versatile individual who can combine sales tenacity with creative design capability to engage clients and el-evate our brand presence.



The Role

This is a high-autonomy, work-from-home position requiring a results-driven pro-fessional who can manage the full sales cycle while also producing high-quality visual marketing materials. You will be responsible for generating leads, convert-ing enquiries into bookings, nurturing client relationships, and creating the sales collateral that supports these efforts. The ideal candidate thrives on variety, takes ownership, and is fully committed to a single role with no outside work.



Key Responsibilities

Sales & Business Development

• Lead Generation: Proactively identify and pursue new business oppor-tunities across Northern Ireland and the UK, targeting businesses requiring health and safety training, auditing, and consultancy services.

• Consultative Selling: Engage with prospective clients via phone,
, video conferencing, and occasional meetings to understand their training needs and recommend tailored solutions.

• Pipeline Management: Manage the full sales cycle from initial contact to closing, maintaining accurate records within the CRM system.

• Client Retention: Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with existing clients, identifying opportunities for upselling and repeat business.

• Target Achievement: Consistently meet or exceed monthly and quar-terly sales targets.

• Enquiry Conversion: Respond promptly and professionally to inbound enquiries, converting them into confirmed course bookings and corporate contracts.



Graphic Design & Marketing Collateral

• Sales Collateral Creation: Design professional, branded sales materials including pitch decks, proposal templates, course brochures, and one-pagers using tools such as Canva or Adobe Creative Suite.

• Digital Content: Create visually engaging content for
 campaigns, social media (LinkedIn,
), and the company website to support lead generation and brand awareness.

• Presentation Design: Develop compelling presentations for client meetings, webinars, and corporate pitches that effectively communicate the value of company’s services.

• Brand Consistency: Ensure all designs adhere to the company’s brand guidelines and maintain a high standard of professionalism.



Client Coordination & Administration

• Course Bookings: Liaise with the operations team to coordinate course schedules and ensure seamless booking experiences for corporate clients.

• Proposal & Quote Preparation: Prepare accurate, professional quotes and proposals tailored to client requirements.

• Post-Sale Follow-Up: Conduct post-training follow-ups with clients to gather feedback, secure testimonials, and identify future opportunities.

• CRM Management: Maintain meticulous records of all sales activities, client interactions, and opportunities within the CRM system.



Process & Self-Management

• Sales Process Improvement: Contribute to the development and re-finement of sales processes, scripts, and workflows to improve efficiency and conversion rates.

• Autonomous Working: Manage your own schedule effectively, demon-strating self-discipline, organisation, and the ability to work independently in a home-based environment.

• Ad-Hoc Tasks: Adapt to additional duties as required, supporting the wider team to meet business objectives.



Person Specification

Essential Criteria

• Sales Experience: Proven experience in a sales or business development role, ideally within B2B services, training, or professional services sectors. Demonstrable track record of meeting or exceeding targets.

• Graphic Design Proficiency: Demonstrable ability to create profes-sional marketing and sales collateral using design tools such as Canva, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, InDesign), or equivalent. A portfolio or examples of work will be required.

• Communication Skills: Exceptional verbal and written communication skills, with the ability to present persuasively, negotiate effectively, and build rapport with decision-makers.

• Computer Proficiency: Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office 365 (Outlook, Excel, PowerPoint, Teams), CRM software, and digital communi-cation tools.

• Organisational Ability: Excellent time management and organisation-al skills, with the ability to juggle multiple leads, tasks, and deadlines with-out supervision.

• Resilience & Drive: Self-motivated, resilient, and target-driven, with a proactive approach to problem-solving and business development.

• Integrity: Honest, diligent, and trustworthy, with a commitment to rep-resenting the company professionally at all times.

• Home Working Capability: A quiet, dedicated home workspace with reliable high-speed internet access.



Desirable Criteria

• Previous experience selling health and safety training, auditing, or consul-tancy services.

• Knowledge of the corporate training requirements.

• Experience with
 marketing platforms and social media manage-ment tools.

• Basic knowledge of health and safety legislation to facilitate informed cli-ent conversations.



Terms of Employment

• Working Arrangements: This is a fully remote, work-from-home posi-tion. 

• Exclusivity: This is a full-time role requiring complete commitment. No other concurrent employment, freelance work, or external business activities are permitted.

• Hours: Standard office hours, Monday to Friday. Flexibility may be required occasionally to attend client meetings or respond to business needs out-side core hours.

• Equipment: The successful candidate must have their own computer (with sufficient capability for design software) and reliable high-speed in-ternet connection.



How to Apply

Please submit your CV, a cover letter detailing your sales achievements and de-sign capabilities, and examples of your design work (portfolio, PDF samples, or links to materials you have created). Applications without design examples will not be considered.

title: Operations Administrator
description:
About Us

We are a leading health and safety training centre based in Northern Ireland. We are committed to delivering high-quality training and compliance solutions. To support our growing operations, we are seeking a dedicated and versatile Opera-tions Administrator to join our team remotely.



The Role

We are looking for a highly organised, proactive, and honest individual to oversee the day-to-day operations of our training centre. This is a multifaceted role requir-ing a unique blend of administrative rigour, creative design capability, financial accuracy, and process improvement skills. The successful candidate must be computer proficient and capable of working independently in a home-based en-vironment, with no other outside employment.



Key Responsibilities

Operations & Administration

• Oversee the day-to-day operational workflow of the training centre, ensur-ing all administrative processes run smoothly and efficiently.

• Manage course scheduling, delegate bookings, and trainer coordination.

• Act as the first point of contact for client enquiries, providing excellent cus-tomer service via phone,
, and digital platforms.

• Maintain accurate and organised digital filing systems, ensuring all records are compliant with data protection regulations (UK GDPR).

• Prepare and issue course certificates, delegate materials, and pre-course documentation.

Graphics & Design

• Create and edit professional marketing materials, including course bro-chures, social media graphics, presentation templates, and client-facing documents.

• Design internal process documents, flowcharts, and visual aids to support training delivery and operational procedures.

• Ensure all design work aligns with the company’s brand identity and main-tains a high standard of professionalism.



Bookkeeping & Finance Support

• Perform basic bookkeeping tasks, including processing invoices, tracking payments, and reconciling accounts using accounting software.

• Assist with credit control, following up on outstanding payments in a pro-fessional and timely manner.

• Prepare financial summaries and reports for management as required.



Process Improvement & Automation

• Analyse existing administrative and operational processes to identify inef-ficiencies.

• Build, document, and implement new workflows and automated systems to streamline repetitive tasks.

• Leverage technology to reduce manual data entry, improve accuracy, and enhance overall productivity.



General & Ad-Hoc Duties

• Provide general clerical support, including data entry, report generation, and minute-taking for meetings.

• Adapt to additional tasks as required, supporting the wider team to meet business objectives.

• Proactively identify and resolve operational issues before they escalate.



Person Specification

Essential Criteria

• Computer Proficiency: Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Office 365 (Word, Excel, Outlook, Teams, PowerPoint) and Google Workspace. Ability to quickly learn and master new software and CRMs.

• Graphic Design: Proven experience with design tools such as Canva, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop/InDesign), or similar to produce profes-sional marketing and internal materials.

• Bookkeeping: Experience with basic bookkeeping principles and famili-arity with accounting software such as QuickBooks, or Sage).

• Process Improvement: Demonstrable experience in building workflows and automating processes 

• Organisational Skills: Exceptional ability to manage multiple priorities, meet deadlines, and maintain attention to detail in a fast-paced environ-ment.

• Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with a professional and courteous manner.

• Integrity: Must be honest, diligent, and trustworthy, with the ability to handle sensitive financial and client data responsibly.

• Home Working Capability: A quiet, dedicated home workspace with reliable high-speed internet access.



Desirable Criteria

• Previous experience working in a health and safety training environment or similar professional services sector.

• Qualification in bookkeeping or business administration.

• Knowledge of various softwares and tools 



Terms of Employment

• Working Arrangements: This is a fully remote, work-from-home posi-tion.

• Exclusivity: This is a full-time role. Due to the nature and demands of the position, no other concurrent employment or freelance work is permitted. Full commitment and focus on operations are required.

• Hours: Standard office hours, Monday to Friday. Flexibility may be required occasionally to meet business needs.

• Equipment: The successful candidate must have their own computer and reliable high-speed internet connection. Specific software licenses may be provided by the company.



How to Apply

Please submit your CV and a cover letter detailing your experience in operations, design, bookkeeping, and process workflows. Include examples of design work (portfolio or links) if available.

title: Virtual Assistant: Automation Support
description:
ABOUT US



We are a growing influencer marketing agency that connects YouTube creators with brand sponsorships in the tech, gaming, and entertainment industry. 



This is not a typical VA role. You will not be doing one repetitive task. Every day looks different. You might run an automation workflow in the morning, audit an
 inbox before lunch, research YouTube creators in the afternoon, update a large dataset, and draft a client
 before end of day.



We are a small team where everyone delivers. We are looking for someone who works hard, is proactive, reliable, resilient, and delivers on time. If that sounds like you, you are welcome to apply.



WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING



This is not a typical VA role. Every day looks different. In a single day, you might:



- Run automation workflows in n8n and Claude Code (30%)

- Manage large-scale databases in Google Sheets (25%)

- Launch and monitor cold
 and sponsorship outreach campaigns (20%)

- Research YouTube creators using AI tools like Claude and Perplexity (15%)

- Communicate with clients, creators, and agencies. Keep files and systems organized (10%)



You will be one of the key people making things happen - not a number at a big company.





WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- 3-5 years work experience (this cannot be your first job)

- Advanced Google Sheets (VLOOKUP, IF, pivot tables, data validation)

- Experience with at least one automation tool (n8n, Zapier, or similar)

- Tech savvy - picks up new tools quickly without hand-holding

- Strong written and spoken English

- Handles multiple types of tasks every day without getting overwhelmed

- Extremely organized, diligent, and reliable

- Delivers on time. Communicates before problems become problems.





WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY



- If you have never used any automation tool

- If you prefer doing one type of task all day

- If you are looking for a relaxed, low-pressure role

- If you need to be spoon-fed instructions for everything

- If you struggle with deadlines

- If you are not proactive





WHAT WE OFFER



- ~$500/month, negotiable based on experience

- Work directly with founders on real campaigns with real creators and brands

- Learn n8n, Claude Code, AI tools, and influencer marketing operations

- Growth path to Operations Manager as we scale

- Performance reviews every 3 months



Work setup: 8-10 hrs/day, Mon-Fri, 9am-6pm Dubai time (UTC+4). Fully remote. Time tracking via Toggl. Stable internet (25+ Mbps) and backup power required.





HOW TO APPLY



>>  



Do not use AI to write your answers. We check. AI-written applications are disqualified.

to join our remote team. Your main responsibility will be to build and

This position requires prior experience with:

title: Welcome to K-POP Universe: Office Admin Role (Entry-Level) for E-Commerce – Join the Beat !
description:
- Recruitment validity period: Until 3 business days from the date of the first recruitment announcement

- A PH VA team of more than 5 people has already been formed, and business collaboration is possible using Tagalog in a comfortable atmosphere.

- Providing educational tutorial videos and operating a mentorship program to help new comers quickly adapt



[About Us]

* Company Introduction (Video):

youtu.be/dO2mWWZANx8



[Join Summitree and Write Your K-POP Legacy Alongside Filipinos]

Summitree envisions leveraging their Filipino employees' intelligence and English fluency to expand globally while sharing their passion for K-POP. They highlight the Philippines' crucial role in their expansion plans, emphasizing collaboration with their Filipino team to make a mark in the K-POP world. Joining Summitree means joining a multicultural team (Korea, Philippines, Mongolia, Others) with a shared goal of making K-POP history.



[Responsibilities]

We are looking for a “Full-Time” Office Admin to handle our business.

You will be doing a variety of tasks, almost all of which we will create tutorials for you.

1. Order fulfillment and shipping label generation

You will be responsible for gathering and processing customer orders accurately and efficiently. This includes coordinating with third-party logistics (3PL) providers for inbound and outbound shipments to ensure smooth operations.

2. Product listing and scheduling

As a distributor of K-POP records and merchandise, you will be involved in registering new products into our system. This includes managing inventory, updating product information, and ensuring accurate data entry. Additionally, you will be responsible for scheduling release dates and managing timelines using tools like Google Calendar.

3. Customer service support

providing excellent customer service is crucial to us. You will be responsible for addressing customer inquiries, resolving issues, and ensuring customer satisfaction. Your communication skills and problem-solving abilities will play a vital role in maintaining strong relationships with our valued customers.



[Required qualifications & skillset (must have)]

* Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

* Experience in puchasing K-POP Album or knowledge of K-POP related products (album, merchandise)

* Idea of how to promote K-POP albums and gain traffics in our shopping mall in PH online K-POP community for each artists



[Desired qualifications & skillset (nice to have)]

* Experience in handling customer service

* Experience in Photoshop

* Experience in
 Ads or Google Ads

* Knowledge and Experience of Microsoft Excel & Familar with Using Various Formula

* Experience in experience in Amazon Business (Familiar with Interface and function) or other E-commerce Platform



[Compensation & Employment Terms]

Position Classification:

This is an entry-level position. All candidates, regardless of prior experience, will undergo structured training under a designated mentor to adapt to our internal systems and operational standards.



• Payment Term: Monthly basis

• Probationary Period: 6 months

o Months 0–3: USD 280/month

o Months 4–6: USD 300/month, subject to satisfactory performance evaluation after the first 3 months

o The probation period may be shortened if you demonstrate fast work adaptation and receive an excellent evaluation. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)



• After Probation Evaluation (Regularization): USD 300/month

o Performance & Total Compensation Structure:

Upon regularization, employees receive a guaranteed 13th Month Pay and at least one annual performance bonus equivalent to one month’s base salary during peak sales seasons. Additional bonuses may be granted based on company performance. When annualized, the total compensation is equivalent to approximately USD 350–380 per month.

o Continued employment and salary maintenance are subject to overall performance evaluation.

o If performance does not meet expectations, adjustments may be made in accordance with company standards.

• Additional Compensation:

o Performance-based incentives may be provided based on work attitude, responsibility, consistency, and overall contribution.



• After Regularization:

o Annual contract renewal is standard

- Salary adjustments may be made based on performance, teamwork, and overall evaluation.

o If overall performance—including work capability, teamwork, reliability, and internal evaluations—is considered outstanding, salary increases may be granted within a shorter period. (This has occurred in multiple past cases.)

o Exceptional performance may also lead to early promotions or salary increases prior to the annual review.



[Perks & Benefits]

1. Regular Employee Benefits

- 13th Month Salary provided

- 10 additional paid leave days upon regularization

2. Performance-Based Incentives

- Additional incentives may be provided during high-performance sales periods

(Example: major comeback seasons for artists such as BTS or Stray Kids)

3. Birthday Benefit (After 6 Months of Employment)

- Receive one free K-POP album of your favorite artist on your birthday

4. Paid Holidays (Regardless of Employment Status)

- January 1st (New Year’s Day) and Christmas Day are paid holidays

- Applies to both probationary and regular employees

5. Long Service Incentive Program

- 1 Year Service: PHP17,000

- 3 Year Service: PHP22,500

- 5 Year Service: PHP28,000



[How To Apply for the job]

Just Fill out 10 Simple Questions through Google Form






Interview via google meet will be conducted after first screening and candidates will be notifed to their
s or
 



Thank you



Human Resource Dept.

Summitree

title: Amazon Graphic Designer - CRO/CTR Focus + AI (Part-Time, Long-Term)
description:
Hi there!



I run a growing e-commerce business where around 90% of revenue and day-to-day operations are Amazon-focused. I also sell on eBay and via our own brand website, but Amazon is the core engine.



I’m hiring a Amazon Graphic / Packaging Designer who wants to work directly with me as the founder in a long-term role and take ownership of our Amazon visual assets that drive CTR and conversion.



If you enjoy clean design, structured workflows, and improving performance through data, please read on.



ABOUT THE BUSINESS

I’m a Dutch founder from Amsterdam and have been building and scaling brands in e-commerce for multiple years. The business is strongly brand-driven and focused on building and defending clear brands in defined niches, not a scattered portfolio of generic products.



Amazon is the main channel (roughly 90%), so the majority of your work will be focused on Amazon listing images and A+ content. We also sell on eBay and via our own brand website, so there will occasionally be supporting design work for those channels too.



My goal as founder is to stay focused on:

- Product and brand development

- Company structure

- Scaling strategy



Your goal is to help me protect that focus by owning our design execution and creative iteration loop.



ABOUT THE ROLE

I’m looking for someone who can consistently create high-quality Amazon visuals and improve them based on performance data.



You will work directly with me and my PPC expert. I will provide context, brand direction, priorities, and product information. You will be responsible for producing assets, keeping files organized, iterating based on feedback and data, and making sure we always have strong creative live on Amazon.



The goal of this role is simple: Create and improve Amazon visuals that increase CTR and conversion, without me having to micromanage the process.



RESPONSIBILITIES

1) Amazon listing images (core responsibility)

- Create and improve main images, secondary images, infographics, and lifestyle images

- Strong focus on clarity, compliance, and scroll-stopping CTR impact

- Ensure consistent branding across all ASINs and variations

- Maintain clean working files and export final assets in the right specs



2) A+ Content and brand assets (Amazon)

- Create A+ content modules

- Create storefront graphics, brand story assets (when needed)

- Work from a structured brief and improve layouts over time



3) Data-driven creative iteration (CRO/CTR focused)

- Use performance data to guide creative decisions (CTR, CVR, session data, conversion changes)

- Propose test ideas (new main image angles, new infographic hierarchy, new hooks)

- Track changes you made and the hypothesis behind them so we can learn over time



4) Occasional packaging and print assets 

- Create or update packaging layouts when needed (labels, boxes, inserts, manuals)

- Ensure print-ready files are correct (dimensions, bleed, dielines if provided, export settings)

- Keep packaging consistent with brand guidelines and compliant with marketplace requirements

- Coordinate with me and suppliers on revisions and final print files



5) AI-assisted image generation workflows 

- Use modern AI tools to support and speed up creative production (Nano Banana and similar tools)

- Create variations efficiently while keeping results realistic, brand-appropriate, and high quality

- Know how to blend AI output with strong manual design judgment (not “AI spam”)



6) Optional: video creation 

- If you have the skill, create full product videos (Amazon listing videos and/or short-form content)

- This is not required, but a strong plus if you can do it well



TOOLS AND WORKFLOW

- Adobe (Photoshop/Illustrator) and/or Figma (depending on your workflow)

- Canva is fine for some assets, but you must be able to produce high-quality, professional outputs

- OneDrive / Google Sheets for asset tracking and briefs

- Notion for SOPs, notes, and documentation

- Microsoft Teams for communication and a weekly sync



REQUIREMENTS

- Proven experience creating Amazon listing images and A+ content

- Strong eye for layout, hierarchy, and conversion-focused design

- You understand Amazon image compliance and how to balance rules with performance

- You can work from briefs and still think proactively

- You are highly organized (clean files, clean naming, clean versioning)

- Strong written English and clear communication

- Experience with AI image generation tools and workflows is a big plus

- Experience with video editing is a plus (not required)



PERSONALITY FIT

This role fits someone who is:

- Structured and methodical

- Calm and consistent

- Proactive with a strong sense of ownership

- Not a “talker” but a “doer”

- You enjoy building repeatable creative systems and improving assets based on results



HOURS AND ENGAGEMENT

- Part-time: up to 5 hours per week

- Async-friendly and outcome-focused (results matter more than online time)

- Weekly sync with me via Microsoft Teams

- Long-term collaboration preferred

- Some overlap with Europe time is helpful (I’m in the Netherlands)



COMPENSATION AND GROWTH

Hourly paid, $5 to $10 USD per hour, depending on experience and fit. We will start within this range and review performance over time. If you consistently show ownership, reliability, and strong judgment, I’m happy to grow responsibility, hours, and pay over time as the business scales.



GROWTH PATH

This is not a short-term gig. My ideal outcome is to find someone who starts up to 5 hours/week and grows into a bigger role over time. As we grow, you can take ownership of more creative operations and become a key person in the business.



APPLICATION INSTRUCTION

When applying, please answer these questions:

1. What does “ownership” mean to you in a design role, and can you give one example of how you showed it in the past?

2. Share 2–3 examples of Amazon listing images or A+ content you created (portfolio links are fine).

3. Which AI tools have you used, and how do you use them in a real workflow?



Cheers,

Friso

title: Shopify Landing Page Specialist
description:
We are looking for a full time landing page specialist to create high converting Shopify landing pages for our ecommerce brand.



Your main job is to build daily landing pages that bridge paid ads to product pages. These pages will usually be advertorials, listicles, and other pre-sell formats designed for unaware and solution aware audiences.



You must understand how to match the landing page angle to the ad creative. Congruency matters a lot. The headline, structure, hook, visuals, and CTA should feel like a natural continuation of the ad, not a disconnected page.



What you’ll do



• Create Shopify landing pages daily

• Turn ad angles into advertorials, listicles, and pre-sell pages

• Match each page to the original ad creative and audience awareness level

• Use product benefits, social proof, reviews, and storytelling to warm up traffic before sending to the product page

• Work fast and iterate with AI tools when useful



What we’re looking for



• Strong experience building landing pages for ecommerce

• Good understanding of Shopify

• Experience with advertorial and listicle style pages

• Strong sense of direct response, conversion, and page flow

• Ability to think through ad to landing page congruency

• Fast executor with good creative judgment

• Comfortable using AI to speed up production



To apply

Start your application with fire horse or we will not review it.



Please include:



• 2 to 5 examples of landing pages you created

• A short explanation of your role in each one

• The tools you use

• Your expected monthly salary

• Your availability

This is a production role, not a creative one. You'll follow a defined workflow to take video concepts from start to finish — including scripting, video creation, and publishing — using a suite of AI tools we'll train you on. Expect to manage a high daily output across multiple channels.



What We're Looking For

Nice to Have

Compensation

title: Software Developer
description:
***PLEASE READ ON HOW TO APPLY***



Job Title: Software Developer

Location: Remote | Philippines based ONLY

Salary Range: Php 180,000 per month

A MUST: Minimum of 5 years of solid experience



We’re looking for talented Software Developers to join our remote-first team. In this role, you’ll be responsible for

building and maintaining responsive, high-performing full- stack web applications using Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and

Supabase. 



Our ideal candidate writes clean, maintainable code, takes ownership of their work, and thrives in a fast-paced

startup environment where autonomy, communication, and craftsmanship are valued.



Key Responsibilities

- Design, develop, and maintain web applications using TypeScript, React, and Next.js.

- Work with Supabase (PostgreSQL) to design, query, and optimise relational database schemas.

- Integrate third-party APIs, including reading, understanding, and applying API documentation.

- Implement responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces with Tailwind CSS.

- Utilise AI-powered tools (e.g. Cursor, Claude, and similar) to accelerate development while

maintaining high code quality and exercising sound engineering judgment over AI-generated output.

- Collaborate with other developers and/or stakeholders to refine requirements, propose technical solutions, and deliver features on agreed timelines.

- Work with background jobs and scheduled tasks using Inngest (or similar services) for cron-like and event-driven workflows.

- Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve issues across the stack, including in production environments.

- Produce clear technical documentation for features, architectural decisions, and processes.

- Communicate proactively and clearly within a remote team, including written updates and participation in online meetings across UK-Philippines time zones.



Must-Have Skills:

- Strong proficiency in TypeScript, React, and Next.js

- Experience with Supabase or relational databases (PostgreSQL)

- Ability to read and integrate third-party API documentation

- Strong understanding of Tailwind CSS and responsive design principles

- Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and modern development workflows

- Ability to work independently and manage time effectively in a remote environment

- Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

- Comfortable using AI-assisted development tools while maintaining engineering judgment and security best practices



Nice-to-Have Skills

- Experience with React Native and mobile development tools (Expo, Xcode, Android Studio)

- Experience with Inngest or similar background job / cron orchestration tools

- Familiarity with Vercel serverless and edge functions



???? Tech Stack



Primary:

- TypeScript

- React

- Next.js

- Tailwind CSS

- Supabase (PostgreSQL)



Secondary / Bonus:

- React Native

- Expo

- Python



Tools & Platforms:

- Git / GitHub

- Vercel

- Supabase

- Inngest

- Standard remote collaboration tools (Slack/Teams, Jira/Linear or equivalent)



***PLEASE READ ON HOW TO APPLY***



How to Apply:

To apply for this role, please submit a link to your resume and a brief Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and highlighting your skills relevant to the role. In your video, please address the following:

- A short introduction of yourself and why you're interested in this role.

- Your previous experience as a Software Developer and specific experience with Next JS/Supabase

- Key skills or qualifications that make you a strong fit for this position.



Please note: Applications without a video will not be reviewed. We look forward to welcoming a passionate developer who prioritizes clean code, performance optimization, and delivering exceptional user experiences.

title: Brand Manager Lead Generator
description:
Role Title: Brand Manager & Lead Generation Specialist

Company: Grove London



Overview:

Grove London is seeking a proactive and commercially driven Brand Manager to lead brand partnerships, drive lead generation, and manage relationships with key clients. This role is central to the agency’s growth, requiring a strong balance of strategic outreach, relationship management, and CRM expertise to ensure consistent deal flow for the sales team.



Key Responsibilities:



Brand Sourcing & Lead Generation:

Identify, research, and onboard new brand partners aligned with Grove London’s services and client roster. Build a consistent pipeline of high-quality leads to support revenue growth.



Relationship Management:

Develop and nurture strong, long-term relationships with brands. Act as the main point of contact, ensuring clear communication and alignment on campaign objectives and expectations.



Sales Collaboration:

Work closely with the sales team to convert sourced leads into active deals. Ensure smooth handover processes and provide insights that help close partnerships effectively.



CRM Management & Optimization:

Utilize CRM systems to track leads, manage pipelines, and maintain accurate records of all brand interactions. Continuously improve workflows, automations, and reporting to increase efficiency and visibility across the team.



 Marketing & Outreach:

Create and execute high-performing
 outreach strategies. Develop compelling
 templates tailored to different brand categories, ensuring strong open rates, engagement, and conversion.



Client Communication:

Conduct professional meetings with brands via Zoom and other platforms. Present partnership opportunities, negotiate terms, and maintain a high standard of communication at all times.



Campaign Alignment & Growth:

Ensure brands are aligned with Grove London’s campaign strategies and talent offerings. Identify upsell opportunities and ways to expand partnerships over time.





Key Skills & Experience:



Proven experience in brand management, partnerships, or lead generation within a marketing or influencer agency



Strong working knowledge of CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Salesforce, 
, etc.)



Demonstrated ability in
 marketing and outreach, including building high-converting
 templates



Excellent communication and presentation skills, particularly in client-facing environments (Zoom calls, pitches, etc.)



Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple brand relationships simultaneously



Commercial mindset with a focus on revenue growth and deal creation



Experience working closely with sales teams and pipelines





What We’re Looking For:



A driven and strategic individual who understands how to source and build valuable brand relationships, while also ensuring those relationships translate into tangible business outcomes. You should be confident, organized, and results-focused, with a strong understanding of how CRM systems and outreach strategies fuel agency growth.

title: PV (Pharmacovigilance) Quality Assurance Assistant
description:
The Quality Assurance Assistant provides administrative support to the Quality Assurance (QA) department. Responsibilities include delegating administrative tasks related to various aspects to support the quality assurance processes and associated functions. Assist with updating and maintaining systems, procedures and work practices to a level that will pass international quality assurance audits in accordance with the specifications of ICH GCP, SA GCP, FDA and other relevant guidelines.



Essential Functions:

• Assist with relevant preparation for planned audits of Company documents and systems.

• Assist with maintenance of relevant tracking databases, as required.

• Provide general administrative support to the QA team, as required.

• Assist with frequent reviews of national and international regulatory websites, to stay abreast of updates on general clinical research guidelines.

• Other ad hoc tasks associated with QA functions, as required.

• Assist with administrative tasks and responsibilities in other departments, as required.



Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities:

• Computer and word processing skills (Microsoft Office).

• Self-motivated, positive attitude.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

• Excellent organizational skills and strong attention to detail.

• Ability to handle multiple tasks effectively.

• Good English language and grammar skills.

• The ability to work unsupervised / independently.

• Excellent team player with team-building skills.

• Adequate knowledge of relevant Company SOPs, ICH GCP and SA GCP guidelines.



Position Requirements:

Education: National Senior Certificate (Grade 12) or its international equivalent as a minimum.

Preferred Job-related Experience: Adequate experience and a high level of administrative competency, preferably demonstrated in a clinical research setting.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: PV (Pharmacovigilance) Clinical Trial Safety Reporting Administrator
description:
Position Summary:

The Clinical Trial Safety Reporting Administrator is a full WFH remote setting and is responsible for ensuring timely, accurate, and compliant submission of individual case safety reports (ICSRs) related to clinical trials. This role supports pharmacovigilance and clinical operations teams by managing safety documentation, coordinating with stakeholders, and maintaining regulatory compliance in accordance with ICH-GCP, FDA, EMA, and other global regulatory requirements.



Key Responsibilities:

• Coordinate the collection, tracking, and submission of ICSRs and periodic reports to partners, regulatory authorities, ethics committees, and investigators.

• Maintain safety reporting logs, ensuring data accuracy and completeness.

• Monitor safety reporting timelines and escalate delays or issues to appropriate stakeholders.

• Collaborate with clinical teams, CROs, and vendors to ensure proper documentation and reporting of safety events.

• Assist in the distribution and submission of safety-related documents, including Development Safety Update Reports (DSURs), line listings, and other deliverables as required.

• Support audits and inspections by providing documentation and responding to queries related to safety reporting.

• Ensure compliance with applicable global regulatory requirements and internal SOPs.



Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Life Sciences, Nursing, Pharmacy, or a related field.

• 1–3 years of experience in clinical trial safety reporting, pharmacovigilance, or clinical operations.

• Knowledge of MedDRA and WHO Drug Dictionary coding.

• Knowledge of ICH-GCP, FDA, EMA, and other relevant regulatory guidelines.

• Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

• Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

• Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.



If you qualify and are interested in the job, please send your updated CV to 
 and we will get in touch with you for a quick interview.

title: Digital Project Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We're looking for a Digital Project Manager to oversee the day-to-day delivery of automation projects for our MSP (Managed Service Provider) clients. You'll make sure our engineers are always working on the right tasks, clients are kept updated, and nothing falls through the cracks.



This is a high-ownership role. You sit between our engineering team and our clients — assigning work, clearing blockers, tracking progress, and sending clear status updates to each MSP client.



WHAT YOU'LL DO



Engineer & Team Management

-Assign tasks to engineers based on availability and client priority

-Monitor daily activity to make sure all engineers are actively working — no one is idle

-Identify and remove blockers preventing engineers from moving forward

-Track workload per engineer and flag issues before they affect delivery

-Run regular check-ins to review task status, deadlines, and progress



Client Management & Communication

-Manage the relationship between our team and our MSP clients

-Proactively update clients on task progress, milestones, and delays — before they ask

-Communicate updates in a clear, easy-to-understand way for clients

-Keep detailed workflow notes so every client briefing is ready and accurate



Project & Task Oversight

-Maintain the master task tracker — every task needs an engineer, due date, priority, and updated status

-Prioritize requests based on SLA agreements and business impact

-Conduct weekly reviews of all open, blocked, and at-risk tasks

-Escalate high-priority issues to leadership when needed



Documentation

-Log workflow updates for team visibility and client reference

-Keep client profiles up to date: contacts, SLA terms, contract types, and assigned engineers

-Spot recurring issues and recommend process improvements





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

-Experience in project management, operations, or a client-facing coordination role

-Experience managing or coordinating teams

-Strong organizational skills — you can juggle multiple clients and projects at once

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills

-Comfortable with task tracking tools (spreadsheets, project management platforms)

-A proactive attitude — you keep things moving and stay on top of everything

Send your application to 
 including your expected salary.
